description.zh_CN: AI21 Jamba 1.5 Large 是基于 Mamba-Transformer 混合架构的开源模型，在长上下文处理速度和效率上具有显著优势。
description.en_US: Jamba 1.5 Large is part of AI21's new family of open models, offering superior speed, efficiency, and quality. It features a 256K effective context window, the longest among open models, enabling improved performance on tasks like document summarization and analysis. Built on a novel SSM-Transformer architecture, it outperforms larger models like Llama 3.1 70B on benchmarks while maintaining resource efficiency. Read their announcement to learn more.

description.zh_CN: Jamba 1.5 Mini 是全球首款生产级 Mamba 架构模型，结合 Mamba 状态空间与 Transformer 注意力，在长上下文效率和质量方面取得突破。
description.en_US: Jamba 1.5 Mini is the world's first production-grade Mamba-based model, combining SSM and Transformer architectures for a 256K context window and high efficiency. It works with 9 languages and can handle various writing and analysis tasks as well as or better than similar small models. This model uses less computer memory and works faster with longer texts than previous designs. Read their announcement to learn more.

description.zh_CN: AI21 Jamba Large 1.6 是融合状态空间模型与 Transformer 架构的高性能混合基础模型，在长文档处理和大规模推理任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: AI21 Jamba Large 1.6 is a high-performance hybrid foundation model combining State Space Models (Mamba) with Transformer attention mechanisms. Developed by AI21, it excels in extremely long-context handling (256K tokens), demonstrates superior inference efficiency (up to 2.5x faster than comparable models), and supports structured JSON output and tool-use capabilities. It has 94 billion active parameters (398 billion total), optimized quantization support (ExpertsInt8), and multilingual proficiency in languages such as English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, German, Arabic, and Hebrew. Usage of this model is subject to the Jamba Open Model License.

description.zh_CN: AI21 Jamba Mini 1.6 是基于 Mamba-Transformer 混合架构的轻量高效模型，在保持良好性能的同时大幅降低推理成本，适合高吞吐量场景。
description.en_US: AI21 Jamba Mini 1.6 is a hybrid foundation model combining State Space Models (Mamba) with Transformer attention mechanisms. With 12 billion active parameters (52 billion total), this model excels in extremely long-context tasks (up to 256K tokens) and achieves superior inference efficiency, outperforming comparable open models on tasks such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and grounded question answering. Jamba Mini 1.6 supports multilingual tasks across English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, German, Arabic, and Hebrew, along with structured JSON output and tool-use capabilities. Usage of this model is subject to the Jamba Open Model License.

description.zh_CN: Jamba Instruct 是 AI21 Labs 第一代 Jamba 系列指令微调模型，采用 Mamba 状态空间与 Transformer 混合架构，支持 256K token 超长上下文。
description.en_US: The Jamba-Instruct model, introduced by AI21 Labs, is an instruction-tuned variant of their hybrid SSM-Transformer Jamba model, specifically optimized for enterprise applications. - 256K Context Window: It can process extensive information, equivalent to a 400-page novel, which is beneficial for tasks involving large documents such as financial reports or legal documents - Safety and Accuracy: Jamba-Instruct is designed with enhanced safety features to ensure secure deployment in enterprise environments, reducing the risk and cost of implementation Read their announcement to learn more. Jamba has a knowledge cutoff of February 2024.

description.zh_CN: Jamba Large 1.7 是 AI21 Labs 的旗舰混合架构模型，融合 Mamba 与 Transformer 设计，拥有 256K token 超长上下文，在推理效率和长文档处理上表现突出。
description.en_US: Jamba Large 1.7 is AI21 Labs' flagship hybrid architecture model combining Mamba and Transformer designs, featuring a 256K token context window with outstanding performance in reasoning efficiency and long-document processing.

description.zh_CN: Jamba Mini 1.7 是 Jamba 系列的轻量版本，结合 Mamba 和 Transformer 架构，在保持高效推理的同时具备良好的指令遵循能力。
description.en_US: Jamba Mini 1.7 is a compact and efficient member of the Jamba open model family, incorporating key improvements in grounding and instruction-following while maintaining the benefits of the SSM-Transformer hybrid architecture and 256K context window. Despite its compact size, it delivers accurate, contextually grounded responses and improved steerability.

description.zh_CN: DeepCoder 14B Preview 是基于 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B 微调的 14B 代码生成模型，采用 GRPO+ 强化学习与迭代上下文扩展，专注复杂编程任务。
description.en_US: DeepCoder-14B-Preview is a 14B parameter code generation model fine-tuned from DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B using reinforcement learning with GRPO+ and iterative context lengthening. It is optimized for long-context program synthesis and achieves strong performance across coding benchmarks, including 60.6% on LiveCodeBench v5, competitive with models like o3-Mini

description.zh_CN: Aion-1.0 是 AionLabs 的多模型融合系统，专为高性能推理、代码生成和通用任务设计，在多个基准测试上综合表现出色。
description.en_US: Aion-1.0 is AionLabs' multi-model fusion system designed for high-performance reasoning, code generation, and general tasks, with strong aggregate performance across multiple benchmarks.

description.zh_CN: Aion-1.0-Mini 是基于 DeepSeek-R1 蒸馏的 32B 推理模型，在保留强大推理能力的同时大幅降低计算成本，适合高频推理场景。
description.en_US: Aion-1.0-Mini is a 32B reasoning model distilled from DeepSeek-R1, retaining strong reasoning capabilities while significantly reducing computational costs, suitable for high-frequency reasoning scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Aion-2.0 是基于 DeepSeek V3.2 针对沉浸式角色扮演和故事叙述深度优化的模型，在创意表达和角色一致性上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Aion-2.0 is a model based on DeepSeek V3.2, deeply optimized for immersive roleplaying and storytelling, excelling in creative expression and character consistency.

description.zh_CN: Aion-RP 1.0 是基于 Llama 3.1 8B 微调的角色扮演专属模型，在角色评估基准中名列前茅，适合沉浸式对话和角色互动场景。
description.en_US: Aion-RP 1.0 is a roleplay-specialized model fine-tuned on Llama 3.1 8B, ranking at the top of character evaluation benchmarks, designed for immersive dialogue and character interaction scenarios.

description.zh_CN: 通义 DeepResearch 30B A3B 是阿里巴巴通义实验室开发的代理式语言模型，专为复杂长流程深度研究任务设计，支持多步骤信息检索与综合分析。
description.en_US: Tongyi DeepResearch 30B A3B is an agentic language model developed by Alibaba's Tongyi Lab, designed for complex long-horizon deep research tasks, supporting multi-step information retrieval and comprehensive analysis.

description.zh_CN: 阿里开源视频生成模型，14B 专业版在 VBench 评测超越 Sora、Luma，1.3B 极速版可在消费级显卡运行，支持文生视频、图生视频、复杂运动与物理模拟。
description.en_US: Alibaba's open-source video generation model. The 14B professional variant surpasses Sora and Luma on VBench; the 1.3B fast variant runs on consumer GPUs. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, complex motion, and physics simulation.

description.zh_CN: 阿里旗舰视频生成模型，支持 1080p 电影级分辨率、15 秒长视频、原生音视频同步、智能多镜头叙事，面向高质量视频创作场景。
description.en_US: Alibaba's flagship video generation model supporting 1080p cinematic resolution, 15-second clips, native audio-video sync, and intelligent multi-shot storytelling for high-quality video creation.

description.zh_CN: OpenHands LM 32B V0.1 是基于 Qwen2.5-Coder-32B 微调的开源 32B 编程模型，采用 SWE-Gym 强化学习技术，面向自主软件开发与代码补全场景。
description.en_US: OpenHands LM v0.1 is a 32B open-source coding model fine-tuned from Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct using reinforcement learning techniques outlined in SWE-Gym. It is optimized for autonomous software development agents and achieves strong performance on SWE-Bench Verified, with a 37.2% resolve rate. The model supports a 128K token context window, making it well-suited for long-horizon code reasoning and large codebase tasks. OpenHands LM is designed for local deployment and runs on consumer-grade GPUs such as a single 3090. It enables fully offline agent workflows without dependency on proprietary APIs. This release is intended as a research preview, and future updates aim to improve generalizability, reduce repetition, and offer smaller variants.

description.zh_CN: Tülu 3 405B 是 Tülu 3 家族最大成员，基于 Llama 3.1 405B 采用全开放后训练配方，结合 RLHF 与 VLM 偏好优化，在复杂推理和指令遵循上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Tülu 3 405B is the largest model in the Tülu 3 family, applying fully open post-training recipes at a 405B parameter scale. Built on the Llama 3.1 405B base, it leverages Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to enhance instruction following, MATH, GSM8K, and IFEval performance. As part of Tülu 3’s fully open-source approach, it offers state-of-the-art capabilities while surpassing prior open-weight models like Llama 3.1 405B Instruct and Nous Hermes 3 405B on multiple benchmarks. To read more, click here.

description.zh_CN: Molmo2 8B 是 Allen Institute for AI 开发的开源视觉语言模型，在图像理解和视觉问答任务上表现出色，完全开放权重，适合学术研究与本地部署。
description.en_US: Molmo2 8B is an open vision-language model developed by the Allen Institute for AI, excelling in image understanding and visual question answering, with fully open weights suitable for academic research and local deployment.

description.zh_CN: OLMo-2 32B 是 Allen AI 的 32B 参数开放架构语言模型，采用全透明训练流程，经过指令调优后在推理和通用任务上表现良好，支持学术研究复现。
description.en_US: OLMo-2 32B is Allen AI's 32B parameter fully open-architecture language model with completely transparent training, instruction-finetuned for solid reasoning and general tasks, supporting academic research reproducibility.

description.zh_CN: OLMo 3 32B Think 是 Allen AI 专为深度推理设计的 32B 开放语言模型，通过扩展思维链在数学和逻辑推理任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: OLMo 3 32B Think is Allen AI's 32B open language model designed for deep reasoning, excelling in mathematical and logical reasoning tasks through extended chain-of-thought.

description.zh_CN: OLMo 3 7B 是 Allen AI 的小型开放指令调优语言模型，在低资源场景下提供可靠的文本理解和生成能力，完全开放权重。
description.en_US: OLMo 3 7B is Allen AI's small open instruction-tuned language model providing reliable text understanding and generation in low-resource scenarios with fully open weights.

description.zh_CN: OLMo 3 7B Think 是 Allen AI 轻量推理专属版，通过思维链在紧凑模型尺寸下提供良好的推理能力，适合资源受限的推理场景。
description.en_US: OLMo 3 7B Think is Allen AI's lightweight reasoning-focused variant, providing solid reasoning capabilities through chain-of-thought in a compact model size, suitable for resource-constrained reasoning scenarios.

description.zh_CN: OLMo 3.1 32B 是 Allen AI 下一代 32B 开放指令调优大模型，在多项基准上超越前代，完全开放权重和训练数据，支持学术研究复现。
description.en_US: OLMo 3.1 32B is Allen AI's next-generation 32B open instruction-tuned large model, outperforming its predecessors on multiple benchmarks, with fully open weights and training data for academic reproducibility.

description.zh_CN: OLMo 3.1 32B Think 是 Allen AI 最新旗舰推理模型，专为深度逐步推理设计，在数学和科学推理任务上表现卓越，完全开放权重。
description.en_US: OLMo 3.1 32B Think is Allen AI's latest flagship reasoning model designed for deep step-by-step reasoning, excelling in mathematical and scientific reasoning tasks with fully open weights.

description.zh_CN: OLMo 7B Instruct 是 Allen Institute for AI 发布的指令微调模型，在 TruthfulQA、ToxiGen 等基准上表现突出，权重与数据完全开放，适合研究与复现。
description.en_US: OLMo 7B Instruct by the Allen Institute for AI is a model finetuned for question answering. It demonstrates **notable performance** across multiple benchmarks including TruthfulQA and ToxiGen. **Open Source**: The model, its code, checkpoints, logs are released under the Apache 2.0 license. - Core repo (training, inference, fine-tuning etc.) - Evaluation code - Further fine-tuning code - Paper - Technical blog post - W&B Logs

description.zh_CN: Amazon Nova 2 Lite 是快速低成本的日常推理模型，支持多模态输入，在文档摘要、表格分析和实体提取任务上表现良好，适合高频工作负载。
description.en_US: Amazon Nova 2 Lite is a fast, cost-effective reasoning model for everyday workloads, supporting multimodal input with solid performance in document summarization, table analysis, and entity extraction.

description.zh_CN: Amazon Nova Lite 1.0 是极低成本的多模态模型，专注于高速文本、图像和视频处理，适合对成本极度敏感的大规模多模态应用场景。
description.en_US: Amazon Nova Lite 1.0 is a very low-cost multimodal model focused on high-speed text, image, and video processing, suitable for cost-sensitive large-scale multimodal application scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Amazon Nova Micro 1.0 是纯文本超低延迟模型，在 Amazon Nova 系列中速度最快、成本最低，适合对响应时间要求极高的简单文本任务。
description.en_US: Amazon Nova Micro 1.0 is a text-only ultra-low-latency model, the fastest and most cost-efficient in the Amazon Nova series, suitable for simple text tasks with stringent response time requirements.

description.zh_CN: Amazon Nova Premier 1.0 是 Amazon 能力最强的多模态模型，在复杂推理、文档理解和多步骤代理任务上表现卓越，同时支持模型蒸馏功能。
description.en_US: Amazon Nova Premier 1.0 is Amazon's most capable multimodal model, excelling in complex reasoning, document understanding, and multi-step agentic tasks, while supporting model distillation capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Amazon Nova Pro 1.0 是能力出众的多模态模型，在准确性、速度和成本之间取得最佳平衡，支持文本、图像和视频输入，适合广泛的企业应用场景。
description.en_US: Amazon Nova Pro 1.0 is a highly capable multimodal model striking the best balance among accuracy, speed, and cost, supporting text, image, and video inputs for diverse enterprise application scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Magnum v2 72B 是 Goliath 团队打造的 72B 模型，基于 Qwen2 72B 训练，旨在达到 Claude 3 Opus/Sonnet 的散文质量，适合创意写作与长文本生成。
description.en_US: From the maker of Goliath, Magnum 72B is the seventh in a family of models designed to achieve the prose quality of the Claude 3 models, notably Opus & Sonnet. The model is based on Qwen2 72B and trained with 55 million tokens of highly curated roleplay (RP) data.

description.zh_CN: Magnum v4 72B 是专为复现 Claude 风格高质量文学写作而设计的 72B 创意写作模型，在叙事深度、文风一致性和角色塑造上表现出色。
description.en_US: Magnum v4 72B is a 72B creative writing model designed to replicate Claude-style high-quality literary prose, excelling in narrative depth, stylistic consistency, and character development.

description.zh_CN: Claude v1 是 Anthropic 第一代大模型，面向低延迟、高吞吐量的文本生成场景，支持数百页文档的上下文处理。
description.en_US: Anthropic's model for low-latency, high throughput text generation. Supports hundreds of pages of text.

description.zh_CN: Claude v1.2 是 Claude 第一代的改进版本，优化了低延迟高吞吐量文本生成能力，支持长文档处理。
description.en_US: Anthropic's model for low-latency, high throughput text generation. Supports hundreds of pages of text.

description.zh_CN: Claude v2 是 Anthropic 第二代旗舰模型，在代码生成、数学运算和复杂推理方面显著提升，支持 10 万 token 超长上下文。
description.en_US: Claude 2 delivers advancements in key capabilities for enterprises—including an industry-leading 200K token context window, significant reductions in rates of model hallucination, system prompts and a new beta feature: tool use.

description.zh_CN: Claude v2.0 是 Anthropic 第二代旗舰模型，专为需要深度推理、创意写作和复杂任务处理的场景而设计。
description.en_US: Anthropic's flagship model. Superior performance on tasks that require complex reasoning. Supports hundreds of pages of text.

description.zh_CN: Claude v2.1 是 Claude 2 的改进版本，减少了幻觉，支持 20 万 token 超长上下文，适合长文档分析和处理场景。
description.en_US: Claude 2 delivers advancements in key capabilities for enterprises—including an industry-leading 200K token context window, significant reductions in rates of model hallucination, system prompts and a new beta feature: tool use.

description.zh_CN: Claude 3 Haiku 是 Claude 3 系列中最轻量的模型，以极低延迟和成本提供快速的文本理解与生成能力，适合简单对话场景。
description.en_US: Claude 3 Haiku is the lightest model in the Claude 3 series, providing rapid text understanding and generation at minimal latency and cost for simple conversational scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Claude 3 Opus 是 Anthropic Claude 3 家族中性能最强的模型，在复杂推理、分析和创意任务上表现卓越，是处理最具挑战性任务的首选。
description.en_US: Claude 3 Opus is Anthropic's most powerful model for highly complex tasks. It boasts top-level performance, intelligence, fluency, and understanding. See the launch announcement and benchmark results here

description.zh_CN: Claude 3 Sonnet 在智能和速度之间取得理想平衡，适合企业工作负载，提供高质量的任务处理和快速响应。
description.en_US: Claude 3 Sonnet is an ideal balance of intelligence and speed for enterprise workloads. Maximum utility at a lower price, dependable, balanced for scaled deployments. See the launch announcement and benchmark results here

description.zh_CN: Claude 3.5 Haiku 是 Claude 3.5 系列中最快最经济的模型，响应速度极快，适合高并发对话和简单分类任务。
description.en_US: Claude 3.5 Haiku is the fastest and most economical model in the Claude 3.5 series, with very fast response times for high-concurrency dialogue and simple classification tasks.

description.zh_CN: Claude 3.5 Haiku (2024-10-22) 是 Claude 3.5 的轻量快速版本，在编程、数学、推理等核心技能上全面增强，适合高并发和实时交互场景。
description.en_US: Claude 3.5 Haiku features enhancements across all skill sets including coding, tool use, and reasoning. As the fastest model in the Anthropic lineup, it offers rapid response times suitable for applications that require high interactivity and low latency, such as user-facing chatbots and on-the-fly code completions. It also excels in specialized tasks like data extraction and real-time content moderation, making it a versatile tool for a broad range of industries. It does not support image inputs. See the launch announcement and benchmark results here

description.zh_CN: Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在速度与智能之间取得出色平衡，在代码生成、数据分析和复杂推理任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Claude 3.5 Sonnet strikes an excellent balance between speed and intelligence, performing strongly in code generation, data analysis, and complex reasoning tasks.

description.zh_CN: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (2024-06-20) 是 Anthropic 早期发布的 Claude 3.5 版本，以超越 Opus 的智能和更快速度为企业提供高质量服务。
description.en_US: Claude 3.5 Sonnet delivers better-than-Opus capabilities, faster-than-Sonnet speeds, at the same Sonnet prices. Sonnet is particularly good at: - Coding: Autonomously writes, edits, and runs code with reasoning and troubleshooting - Data science: Augments human data science expertise; navigates unstructured data while using multiple tools for insights - Visual processing: excelling at interpreting charts, graphs, and images, accurately transcribing text to derive insights beyond just the text alone - Agentic tasks: exceptional tool use, making it great at agentic tasks (i.e. complex, multi-step problem solving tasks that require engaging with other systems) For the latest version (2024-10-23), check out Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

description.zh_CN: Claude 3.7 Sonnet 是 Anthropic 首个混合推理模型，支持最长 12.8 万 token 的扩展思考，在前端开发和代理工作流中表现卓越。
description.en_US: Claude 3.7 Sonnet is Anthropic's first hybrid reasoning model supporting up to 128K token extended thinking, excelling at frontend development and agentic workflows.

description.zh_CN: Claude 3.7 Sonnet 的扩展思考模式版本，回复前进行深度内部推理，对复杂问题展开逐步分析，在数学运算、编程调试和多步推理任务中表现更为突出。
description.en_US: The extended thinking variant of Claude 3.7 Sonnet that reasons deeply before responding, enabling thorough step-by-step analysis of complex problems with stronger performance on mathematics, coding, and multi-step reasoning tasks.

description.zh_CN: Claude Haiku 4.5 是 Claude 4 系列中速度最快、成本最低的模型，仍支持扩展思考模式，适合对延迟敏感的高并发场景。
description.en_US: Claude Haiku 4.5 is the fastest and most affordable model in the Claude 4 series, still supporting extended thinking, ideal for latency-sensitive high-concurrency scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Claude Instant v1 是 Anthropic 面向低延迟、高吞吐量文本生成场景的快速模型，擅长结构化文本处理和各类自然语言任务。
description.en_US: Anthropic's model for low-latency, high throughput text generation. Supports hundreds of pages of text.

description.zh_CN: Claude Instant v1.0 是 Claude Instant 系列的初始版本，专为快速响应的文本生成场景设计，支持高吞吐量工作负载。
description.en_US: Anthropic's model for low-latency, high throughput text generation. Supports hundreds of pages of text.

description.zh_CN: Claude Instant v1.1 是 Claude Instant 的改进版本，在保持快速响应的同时提升了文本生成质量。
description.en_US: Anthropic's model for low-latency, high throughput text generation. Supports hundreds of pages of text.

description.zh_CN: Claude Opus 4 是 Anthropic Claude 4 系列的旗舰模型，具备强大的多模态理解和推理能力，适合高质量内容创作与分析。
description.en_US: Claude Opus 4 is Anthropic's Claude 4 series flagship model with strong multimodal understanding and reasoning capabilities, suitable for high-quality content creation and analysis.

description.zh_CN: Claude Opus 4.1 是 Claude 4.1 系列的旗舰模型，在复杂分析与推理任务上表现出色，支持文本、图像和文件多模态输入。
description.en_US: Claude Opus 4.1 is the flagship model of the Claude 4.1 series, excelling at complex analysis and reasoning tasks with text, image, and file multimodal input support.

description.zh_CN: Claude Opus 4.5 具备强大的推理与多模态理解能力，适合处理高质量长文档分析和复杂推理任务，支持扩展思考模式。
description.en_US: Claude Opus 4.5 offers powerful reasoning and multimodal understanding, suited for high-quality long-document analysis and complex reasoning tasks with extended thinking support.

description.zh_CN: Claude Opus 4.6 是 Anthropic 能力最强的模型，专为最高难度的研究、推理和创作任务设计，支持 100 万 token 超长上下文。
description.en_US: Claude Opus 4.6 is Anthropic's most capable model, designed for the most demanding research, reasoning, and creative tasks with up to 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Claude Sonnet 4 在性能与成本之间取得良好平衡，支持 100 万 token 超长上下文，适合需要高频调用的生产场景。
description.en_US: Claude Sonnet 4 achieves a good balance between performance and cost, supporting 1M token context for production scenarios requiring high-frequency API calls.

description.zh_CN: Claude Sonnet 4.5 均衡了速度与智能，是生产环境中高频通用任务的理想选择，支持 100 万 token 上下文与扩展思考模式。
description.en_US: Claude Sonnet 4.5 balances speed and intelligence, making it ideal for high-frequency general-purpose tasks in production with 1M token context and extended thinking support.

description.zh_CN: Claude Sonnet 4.6 是 Anthropic 最新旗舰模型，在编程、代理工作流和专业工作中表现卓越，支持扩展思考模式，最大上下文 100 万 token。
description.en_US: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is Anthropic's latest flagship model with frontier performance in coding, agentic workflows, and professional work, supporting extended thinking with up to 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Arcee AFM 4.5B 是 Arcee AI 的 45 亿参数指令微调模型，预训练约 8 万亿 token，在通用对话、代码和推理任务上具备均衡能力。
description.en_US: AFM-4.5B is a 4.5 billion parameter instruction-tuned language model developed by Arcee AI. The model was pretrained on approximately 8 trillion tokens, including 6.5 trillion tokens of general data and 1.5 trillion tokens with an emphasis on mathematical reasoning and code generation.

description.zh_CN: Arcee Blitz 是 24B 参数密集模型，从 DeepSeek 蒸馏并基于 Mistral 架构，面向日常对话场景，在保持 DeepSeek 能力的同时显著降低计算成本。
description.en_US: Arcee Blitz is a 24 B‑parameter dense model distilled from DeepSeek and built on Mistral architecture for "everyday" chat. The distillation‑plus‑refinement pipeline trims compute while keeping DeepSeek‑style reasoning, so Blitz punches above its weight on MMLU, GSM‑8K and BBH compared with other mid‑size open models. With a default 128 k context window and competitive throughput, it serves as a cost‑efficient workhorse for summarization, brainstorming and light code help. Internally, Arcee uses Blitz as the default writer in Conductor pipelines when the heavier Virtuoso line is not required. Users therefore get near‑70 B quality at ~⅓ the latency and price.

description.zh_CN: Arcee Caller Large 是 Arcee 专为函数调用设计的 SLM，擅长编排外部工具和 API，训练聚焦结构化 JSON 输出与参数解析，适合智能体与工具编排场景。
description.en_US: Caller Large is Arcee's specialist "function‑calling" SLM built to orchestrate external tools and APIs. Instead of maximizing next‑token accuracy, training focuses on structured JSON outputs, parameter extraction and multi‑step tool chains, making Caller a natural choice for retrieval‑augmented generation, robotic process automation or data‑pull chatbots. It incorporates a routing head that decides when (and how) to invoke a tool versus answering directly, reducing hallucinated calls. The model is already the backbone of Arcee Conductor's auto‑tool mode, where it parses user intent, emits clean function signatures and hands control back once the tool response is ready. Developers thus gain an OpenAI‑style function‑calling UX without handing requests to a frontier‑scale model.

description.zh_CN: Coder Large 是 Arcee AI 基于 Qwen 2.5 Instruct 进一步优化的 32B 代码生成模型，在代码补全、调试和多语言编程任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Coder Large is Arcee AI's 32B code generation model further optimized from Qwen 2.5 Instruct, excelling in code completion, debugging, and multi-language programming tasks.

description.zh_CN: Maestro Reasoning 是 Arcee AI 的旗舰 32B 分析推理模型，在复杂逻辑分析、数学推理和多步骤问题求解任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Maestro Reasoning is Arcee AI's flagship 32B analytical reasoning model, excelling in complex logical analysis, mathematical reasoning, and multi-step problem-solving tasks.

description.zh_CN: Spotlight 是 Arcee AI 基于 Qwen 2.5-VL 衍生的 7B 视觉语言模型，在图像理解和视觉问答任务上提供高效的多模态处理能力。
description.en_US: Spotlight is Arcee AI's 7B vision-language model derived from Qwen 2.5-VL, providing efficient multimodal processing capabilities in image understanding and visual question answering tasks.

description.zh_CN: Trinity Large Preview 是 Arcee AI 的前沿开放权重语言模型预览版，免费访问，在推理和通用任务上表现优秀，适合提前体验最新特性的开发者。
description.en_US: Trinity Large Preview is Arcee AI's frontier open-weight language model in preview, available for free, with strong reasoning and general task performance, suitable for developers seeking early access to the latest features.

description.zh_CN: Trinity Mini 是 Arcee AI 的 26B 参数稀疏 MoE 语言模型，以极少的激活参数提供高效的推理和对话能力，适合成本敏感的生产场景。
description.en_US: Trinity Mini is Arcee AI's 26B parameter sparse MoE language model delivering efficient reasoning and conversational capabilities with very few active parameters, suitable for cost-sensitive production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Trinity Mini 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Trinity Mini, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Virtuoso Large 是 Arcee AI 的顶级 72B 通用语言模型，经过专项优化以在指令遵循、推理和创意写作任务上提供顶级表现。
description.en_US: Virtuoso Large is Arcee AI's top-tier 72B general-purpose language model, specifically optimized to deliver leading performance in instruction following, reasoning, and creative writing tasks.

description.zh_CN: Arcee Virtuoso Medium V2 是 32B 模型，从 DeepSeek-V3 蒸馏并合并至 Qwen 2.5 骨干，在事实性与推理能力上较初版 Virtuoso Medium 有显著提升。
description.en_US: Virtuoso‑Medium‑v2 is a 32 B model distilled from DeepSeek‑v3 logits and merged back onto a Qwen 2.5 backbone, yielding a sharper, more factual successor to the original Virtuoso Medium. The team harvested ~1.1 B logit tokens and applied "fusion‑merging" plus DPO alignment, which pushed scores past Arcee‑Nova 2024 and many 40 B‑plus peers on MMLU‑Pro, MATH and HumanEval. With a 128 k context and aggressive quantization options (from BF16 down to 4‑bit GGUF), it balances capability with deployability on single‑GPU nodes. Typical use cases include enterprise chat assistants, technical writing aids and medium‑complexity code drafting where Virtuoso‑Large would be overkill.

description.zh_CN: QwQ 32B RpR v1 是基于 Qwen/QwQ-32B 微调的 32B 模型，使用 RPMax 系列创意写作与角色扮演数据集，在保持推理能力的同时强化创意写作表现。
description.en_US: QwQ-32B-ArliAI-RpR-v1 is a 32B parameter model fine-tuned from Qwen/QwQ-32B using a curated creative writing and roleplay dataset originally developed for the RPMax series. It is designed to maintain coherence and reasoning across long multi-turn conversations by introducing explicit reasoning steps per dialogue turn, generated and refined using the base model itself. The model was trained using RS-QLORA+ on 8K sequence lengths and supports up to 128K context windows (with practical performance around 32K). It is optimized for creative roleplay and dialogue generation, with an emphasis on minimizing cross-context repetition while preserving stylistic diversity.

description.zh_CN: bge-base-en-v1.5 是 BAAI 的英文文本嵌入模型，将句子和段落映射为 768 维向量，适合语义检索、相似度计算和 RAG 应用。
description.en_US: The bge-base-en-v1.5 embedding model converts English sentences and paragraphs into 768-dimensional dense vectors, delivering efficient, high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for retrieval, semantic search, and document-matching workflows. This version (v1.5) features improved similarity-score distribution and stronger retrieval performance out of the box.

description.zh_CN: bge-large-en-v1.5 是 BAAI 的英文大模型嵌入，将文本映射为 1024 维向量，提供高保真语义表示，适合高精度检索与语义搜索。
description.en_US: The bge-large-en-v1.5 embedding model maps English sentences, paragraphs, and documents into a 1024-dimensional dense vector space, delivering high-fidelity semantic embeddings optimized for semantic search, document retrieval, and downstream NLP tasks in English.

description.zh_CN: bge-m3 是 BAAI 的多语言嵌入模型，支持 100+ 语言，将文本编码为 1024 维向量，在跨语言检索和语义匹配上表现优异。
description.en_US: The bge-m3 embedding model encodes sentences, paragraphs, and long documents into a 1024-dimensional dense vector space, delivering high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for multilingual retrieval, semantic search, and large-context applications.

description.zh_CN: ERNIE 4.5 21B A3B 是百度文心的轻量 MoE 文本模型，以极低的激活参数量提供优质的中英文推理与对话能力，适合高性价比的生产场景。
description.en_US: ERNIE 4.5 21B A3B is Baidu's lightweight MoE text model, delivering high-quality Chinese and English reasoning and conversational capabilities with minimal active parameters, suitable for cost-efficient production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: ERNIE 4.5 21B A3B Thinking 是文心 4.5 轻量推理增强版，通过扩展思维链提升复杂推理和数学分析能力，在同等参数规模下表现突出。
description.en_US: ERNIE 4.5 21B A3B Thinking is the reasoning-enhanced version of ERNIE 4.5 lightweight, boosting complex reasoning and mathematical analysis capabilities through extended chain-of-thought, outstanding at its parameter scale.

description.zh_CN: ERNIE 4.5 300B A47B 是百度文心最新旗舰 MoE 语言模型，在中英文推理、代码生成和多轮对话任务上全面领先，支持超长上下文。
description.en_US: ERNIE 4.5 300B A47B is Baidu's latest flagship MoE language model, leading comprehensively in Chinese and English reasoning, code generation, and multi-turn conversational tasks with extended context support.

description.zh_CN: ERNIE 4.5 VL 28B A3B 是百度文心的多模态 MoE 视觉语言模型，支持图像输入，在视觉理解和中英文多模态问答任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: ERNIE 4.5 VL 28B A3B is Baidu's multimodal MoE vision-language model supporting image input, performing strongly in visual understanding and Chinese/English multimodal question answering tasks.

description.zh_CN: ERNIE 4.5 VL 424B A47B 是百度文心最大的多模态 MoE 旗舰，具备强大的图像和文本多模态理解能力，在视觉推理任务上达到顶尖水平。
description.en_US: ERNIE 4.5 VL 424B A47B is Baidu's largest multimodal MoE flagship, with powerful image and text multimodal understanding capabilities, achieving top-tier performance in visual reasoning tasks.

description.zh_CN: StarCoder2 15B Instruct 是 BigCode 首款自对齐开源代码模型，专注 Python 等编程任务，采用零人工标注的自我微调方法，在代码生成与补全上表现突出。
description.en_US: StarCoder2 15B Instruct excels in coding-related tasks, primarily in Python. It is the first self-aligned open-source LLM developed by BigCode. This model was fine-tuned without any human annotations or distilled data from proprietary LLMs. The base model uses Grouped Query Attention and was trained using the Fill-in-the-Middle objective objective on 4+ trillion tokens.

description.zh_CN: FLUX.2 Flex 是 Black Forest Labs 专注于复杂文字排版与精细细节渲染的图像生成模型，擅长高精度文字集成和精细视觉元素创作。
description.en_US: FLUX.2 [flex] excels at rendering complex text, typography, and fine details, and supports multi-reference editing in the same unified architecture. We charge $0.06 for each megapixel on both input and output side.

description.zh_CN: FLUX.2 Klein 4B 是 FLUX.2 家族中速度最快、成本最低的图像生成模型，以 40 亿参数实现快速经济的图像生成，适合高频批量创作场景。
description.en_US: FLUX.2 [klein] 4B is the fastest and most cost-effective model in the FLUX.2 family, optimized for high-throughput use cases while maintaining excellent image quality.

description.zh_CN: FLUX.2 Max 是 Black Forest Labs 的旗舰图像生成模型，在视觉质量和生成精度上达到业界顶级水平，支持高分辨率复杂场景创作。
description.en_US: FLUX.2 [max] is the new top-tier image model from Black Forest Labs, pushing image quality, prompt understanding, and editing consistency to the highest level yet. Input: We charge $0.03 for each megapixel on the input (i.e. reference images for editing) Output: The first generated megapixel is charged $0.07. Each subsequent megapixel is charged $0.03.

description.zh_CN: FLUX.2 Pro 是 Black Forest Labs 的高端图像生成与编辑模型，专注前沿视觉质量，适合专业级图像创作、品牌视觉和精细化图像编辑场景。
description.en_US: A high-end image generation and editing model focused on frontier-level visual quality and reliability. It delivers strong prompt adherence, stable lighting, sharp textures, and consistent character/style reproduction across multi-reference inputs. Designed for production workloads, it balances speed and quality while supporting text-to-image and image editing up to 4 MP resolution. Input: We charge $0.015 for each megapixel on the input (i.e. reference images for editing) Output: The first megapixel is charged $0.03 and then each subsequent MP will be charged $0.015.

description.zh_CN: Seed OSS 36B Instruct 是字节跳动 Seed 团队发布的 36B 指令微调推理模型，采用 Apache-2.0 开源，在通用指令遵循与推理任务上表现优秀。
description.en_US: Seed-OSS-36B-Instruct is a 36B-parameter instruction-tuned reasoning language model from ByteDance’s Seed team, released under Apache-2.0. The model is optimized for general instruction following with strong performance in reasoning, mathematics, coding, tool use/agentic workflows, and multilingual tasks, and is intended for international (i18n) use cases. It is not currently possible to control the reasoning effort.

description.zh_CN: 字节多模态音视频生成模型，支持文本、图片、音频、视频四种输入，生成约 15 秒高质量多镜头音视频，具备双声道立体声与音视频同步，已集成豆包、即梦 AI。
description.en_US: ByteDance's multimodal audio-video generation model supporting text, image, audio, and video inputs to produce ~15s high-quality multi-shot clips with stereo audio and A/V sync. Integrated into Doubao and Jimeng AI.

description.zh_CN: UI-TARS 1.5 是字节跳动专为 GUI 环境优化的多模态视觉代理模型，能够理解屏幕内容并执行界面操控任务，适合自动化测试和 RPA 场景。
description.en_US: UI-TARS 1.5 is ByteDance's multimodal visual agent model optimized for GUI environments, capable of understanding screen content and executing interface manipulation tasks, suitable for automated testing and RPA scenarios.

description.zh_CN: UI TARS 72B 是字节跳动研究院开源的 72B 多模态模型，专为浏览器与桌面自动化设计，通过视觉交互与控制实现任务自动化，具备专用视觉架构。
description.en_US: UI-TARS 72B is an open-source multimodal AI model designed specifically for automating browser and desktop tasks through visual interaction and control. The model is built with a specialized vision architecture enabling accurate interpretation and manipulation of on-screen visual data. It supports automation tasks within web browsers as well as desktop applications, including Microsoft Office and VS Code. Core capabilities include intelligent screen detection, predictive action modeling, and efficient handling of repetitive interactions. UI-TARS employs supervised fine-tuning (SFT) tailored explicitly for computer control scenarios. It can be deployed locally or accessed via Hugging Face for demonstration purposes. Intended use cases encompass workflow automation, task scripting, and interactive desktop control applications.

description.zh_CN: Dolphin 2.9 Llama 3 70B 是基于 Llama 3 70B 微调的指令遵循与对话模型，在指令、对话、代码和函数调用方面均有改进，适合本地部署与创意写作。
description.en_US: Dolphin 2.9 is designed for instruction following, conversational, and coding. This model is a fine-tune of Llama 3 70B. It demonstrates improvements in instruction, conversation, coding, and function calling abilities, when compared to the original. Uncensored and is stripped of alignment and bias, it requires an external alignment layer for ethical use. Users are cautioned to use this highly compliant model responsibly, as detailed in a blog post about uncensored models at erichartford.com/uncensored-models. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Dolphin Mistral 24B Venice Edition 是基于 Mistral 24B 的无过滤微调模型，移除了内容限制，免费访问，适合需要更自由创意表达的研究场景。
description.en_US: Dolphin Mistral 24B Venice Edition is an uncensored fine-tuned model based on Mistral 24B with content restrictions removed, available for free, suitable for research scenarios requiring freer creative expression.

description.zh_CN: Dolphin 2.9.2 Mixtral 8x22B 是基于 Mixtral 8x22B Instruct 微调的指令模型，支持 64K 上下文，在指令遵循、对话和代码任务上表现均衡。
description.en_US: Dolphin 2.9 is designed for instruction following, conversational, and coding. This model is a finetune of Mixtral 8x22B Instruct. It features a 64k context length and was fine-tuned with a 16k sequence length using ChatML templates. This model is a successor to Dolphin Mixtral 8x7B. The model is uncensored and is stripped of alignment and bias. It requires an external alignment layer for ethical use. Users are cautioned to use this highly compliant model responsibly, as detailed in a blog post about uncensored models at erichartford.com/uncensored-models.

description.zh_CN: Dolphin 2.6 Mixtral 8x7B 是 Mixtral 8x7b 的 16K 上下文微调版本，在代码任务上表现突出，因大量代码数据训练而擅长编程辅助，服从性强。
description.en_US: This is a 16k context fine-tune of Mixtral-8x7b. It excels in coding tasks due to extensive training with coding data and is known for its obedience, although it lacks DPO tuning. The model is uncensored and is stripped of alignment and bias. It requires an external alignment layer for ethical use. Users are cautioned to use this highly compliant model responsibly, as detailed in a blog post about uncensored models at erichartford.com/uncensored-models.

description.zh_CN: Dolphin 3.0 Mistral 24B 是 Dolphin 系列新一代指令模型，面向终极通用本地部署，支持代码、数学、智能体、函数调用和通用对话，能力全面。
description.en_US: Dolphin 3.0 is the next generation of the Dolphin series of instruct-tuned models. Designed to be the ultimate general purpose local model, enabling coding, math, agentic, function calling, and general use cases. Dolphin aims to be a general purpose instruct model, similar to the models behind ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini. Part of the Dolphin 3.0 Collection Curated and trained by Eric Hartford, Ben Gitter, BlouseJury and DphnAI

description.zh_CN: Dolphin 3.0 R1 Mistral 24B 是 Dolphin 3.0 的 R1 推理增强版本，在代码、数学、智能体和函数调用基础上增加深度推理能力，适合复杂任务。
description.en_US: Dolphin 3.0 R1 is the next generation of the Dolphin series of instruct-tuned models. Designed to be the ultimate general purpose local model, enabling coding, math, agentic, function calling, and general use cases. The R1 version has been trained for 3 epochs to reason using 800k reasoning traces from the Dolphin-R1 dataset. Dolphin aims to be a general purpose reasoning instruct model, similar to the models behind ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini. Part of the Dolphin 3.0 Collection Curated and trained by Eric Hartford, Ben Gitter, BlouseJury and DphnAI

description.zh_CN: Cohere Command 是 Cohere 的指令遵循对话模型，在语言任务上提供高质量、高可靠性和更长上下文支持，适合企业级对话与工作流场景。
description.en_US: Command is an instruction-following conversational model that performs language tasks with high quality, more reliably and with a longer context than our base generative models. Use of this model is subject to Cohere's Usage Policy and SaaS Agreement.

description.zh_CN: Command A 是 Cohere 的 111B 参数开放权重企业级对话模型，拥有 256K token 上下文窗口，专为 RAG、工具调用和多代理工作流优化，在企业应用场景中表现卓越。
description.en_US: Command A is Cohere's 111B parameter open-weight enterprise model with a 256K token context window, optimized for RAG, tool calling, and multi-agent workflows, excelling in enterprise application scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Cohere Command R 是 35B 参数对话模型，在复杂工作流、RAG 和多语言任务上表现优于前代，支持 10 种关键语言的检索增强生成。
description.en_US: Command-R is a 35B parameter model that performs conversational language tasks at a higher quality, more reliably, and with a longer context than previous models. It can be used for complex workflows like code generation, retrieval augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and agents. Read the launch post here. Use of this model is subject to Cohere's Usage Policy and SaaS Agreement.

description.zh_CN: Cohere Command R (03-2024) 是 Command R 的 2024 年 3 月版本快照，具备 35B 参数，在对话质量、可靠性和长上下文处理上表现优秀。
description.en_US: Command-R is a 35B parameter model that performs conversational language tasks at a higher quality, more reliably, and with a longer context than previous models. It can be used for complex workflows like code generation, retrieval augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and agents. Read the launch post here. Use of this model is subject to Cohere's Usage Policy and SaaS Agreement.

description.zh_CN: Command R 2024-08 更新版是 Cohere 针对 RAG 和长上下文任务优化的企业对话模型，在检索增强生成和多步骤推理上表现出色。
description.en_US: Command R 08-2024 is Cohere's updated enterprise conversational model optimized for RAG and long-context tasks, excelling in retrieval-augmented generation and multi-step reasoning.

description.zh_CN: Cohere Command R+ 是 Cohere 的 104B 参数大模型，适合角色扮演、通用消费场景和 RAG，支持 10 种关键语言，在长上下文与多轮对话上表现突出。
description.en_US: Command R+ is a new, 104B-parameter LLM from Cohere. It's useful for roleplay, general consumer usecases, and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). It offers multilingual support for ten key languages to facilitate global business operations. See benchmarks and the launch post here. Use of this model is subject to Cohere's Usage Policy and SaaS Agreement.

description.zh_CN: Cohere Command R+ (04-2024) 是 Command R+ 的 2024 年 4 月版本快照，104B 参数，在角色扮演、RAG 和多语言场景中表现优异。
description.en_US: Command R+ is a new, 104B-parameter LLM from Cohere. It's useful for roleplay, general consumer usecases, and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). It offers multilingual support for ten key languages to facilitate global business operations. See benchmarks and the launch post here. Use of this model is subject to Cohere's Usage Policy and SaaS Agreement.

description.zh_CN: Command R+ 2024-08 是 Cohere 旗舰 RAG 模型的更新版，在复杂推理、多语言支持和工具调用任务上提供更强性能，适合高要求企业应用。
description.en_US: Command R+ 08-2024 is an updated version of Cohere's flagship RAG model, delivering stronger performance in complex reasoning, multilingual support, and tool calling tasks for demanding enterprise applications.

description.zh_CN: Command R7B 是 Cohere 的小型快速企业对话模型，以极低成本提供 RAG 和工具调用能力，适合高频简单企业查询场景。
description.en_US: Command R7B is Cohere's small, fast enterprise conversational model providing RAG and tool calling capabilities at very low cost, suitable for high-frequency simple enterprise query scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Starcannon 12B 是基于 Mistral Nemo 的创意角色扮演与故事写作模型，融合 Celeste 与 Mini-Magnum 等模型优势，擅长沉浸式叙事与创意写作。
description.en_US: Starcannon 12B v2 is a creative roleplay and story writing model, based on Mistral Nemo, using nothingiisreal/mn-celeste-12b as a base, with intervitens/mini-magnum-12b-v1.1 merged in using the TIES method. Although more similar to Magnum overall, the model remains very creative, with a pleasant writing style. It is recommended for people wanting more variety than Magnum, and yet more verbose prose than Celeste.

description.zh_CN: 专为 Solidity 智能合约生成而微调的 7B CodeLLaMA 指令模型，在区块链合约代码生成和审查任务上表现出色，适合 Web3 开发场景。
description.en_US: A 7B CodeLLaMA instruction model fine-tuned specifically for Solidity smart contract generation, excelling in blockchain contract code generation and review tasks, suitable for Web3 development scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Goliath 120B 是通过合并两个微调 Llama-2 70B 模型而创建的 120B 开源大模型，在创意写作和通用对话任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: Goliath 120B is a 120B open-source large model created by merging two fine-tuned Llama-2 70B models, excelling in creative writing and general conversational tasks.

description.zh_CN: Magnum 72B 是 Goliath 团队首款 Magnum 系列模型，基于 Qwen2 72B 训练，旨在达到 Claude 3 的散文质量，适合创意写作与长文本生成。
description.en_US: From the maker of Goliath, Magnum 72B is the first in a new family of models designed to achieve the prose quality of the Claude 3 models, notably Opus & Sonnet. The model is based on Qwen2 72B and trained with 55 million tokens of highly curated roleplay (RP) data.

description.zh_CN: EVA Llama 3.33 70B 是角色扮演与故事写作专用模型，基于 Llama 3.3 70B Instruct 全参数微调，使用合成与自然数据混合训练，擅长沉浸式叙事。
description.en_US: EVA Llama 3.33 70b is a roleplay and storywriting specialist model. It is a full-parameter finetune of Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct on mixture of synthetic and natural data. It uses Celeste 70B 0.1 data mixture, greatly expanding it to improve versatility, creativity and "flavor" of the resulting model This model was built with Llama by Meta.

description.zh_CN: EVA Qwen2.5 14B 是角色扮演与创意写作专用模型，基于 Qwen2.5-14B 微调，使用 150 万 token 角色扮演数据训练，擅长沉浸式对话与故事生成。
description.en_US: A model specializing in RP and creative writing, this model is based on Qwen2.5-14B, fine-tuned with a mixture of synthetic and natural data. It is trained on 1.5M tokens of role-play data, and fine-tuned on 1.5M tokens of synthetic data.

description.zh_CN: EVA Qwen2.5 32B 是角色扮演与故事写作专用模型，基于 Qwen2.5-32B 全参数微调，使用 Celeste 70B 数据混合，在叙事连贯性与角色一致性上表现突出。
description.en_US: EVA Qwen2.5 32B is a roleplaying/storywriting specialist model. It's a full-parameter finetune of Qwen2.5-32B on mixture of synthetic and natural data. It uses Celeste 70B 0.1 data mixture, greatly expanding it to improve versatility, creativity and "flavor" of the resulting model.

description.zh_CN: EVA Qwen2.5 72B 是角色扮演与故事写作专用模型，基于 Qwen2.5-72B 全参数微调，使用 Celeste 70B 数据混合，在大型叙事与多角色场景中表现优异。
description.en_US: EVA Qwen2.5 72B is a roleplay and storywriting specialist model. It's a full-parameter finetune of Qwen2.5-72B on mixture of synthetic and natural data. It uses Celeste 70B 0.1 data mixture, greatly expanding it to improve versatility, creativity and "flavor" of the resulting model.

description.zh_CN: Qrwkv 72B 是 Qwen 2.5 72B 的线性注意力 RWKV 变体，通过线性注意力显著降低大规模推理的计算成本，在保持性能的同时实现高效推理。
description.en_US: Qrwkv-72B is a linear-attention RWKV variant of the Qwen 2.5 72B model, optimized to significantly reduce computational cost at scale. Leveraging linear attention, it achieves substantial inference speedups (>1000x) while retaining competitive accuracy on common benchmarks like ARC, HellaSwag, Lambada, and MMLU. It inherits knowledge and language support from Qwen 2.5, supporting approximately 30 languages, making it suitable for efficient inference in large-context applications.

description.zh_CN: MythoMax 13B 是性能最强、最受欢迎的 Llama-2 13B 创意微调模型之一，在角色扮演、故事叙述和通用对话任务上表现出色，具有高度人性化的表达风格。
description.en_US: MythoMax 13B is one of the highest-performing and most popular Llama-2 13B creative fine-tunes, excelling in roleplay, storytelling, and general conversational tasks with a highly humanized expression style.

description.zh_CN: MythoMist 7B 是 MythoMax 创作者打造的合并模型，融合多模型优势以减少 ChatGPT 角色扮演数据中的不良词汇，擅长创意写作与角色扮演。
description.en_US: From the creator of MythoMax, merges a suite of models to reduce word anticipation, ministrations, and other undesirable words in ChatGPT roleplaying data. It combines Neural Chat 7B, Airoboros 7b, Toppy M 7B, Zepher 7b beta, Nous Capybara 34B, OpenHeremes 2.5, and many others.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Nemo Inferor 12B 是顶级角色扮演模型的合并版本，采用 Model Stock 合并方法，擅长沉浸式叙事与故事写作，基于 Magnum v4 12B 构建。
description.en_US: Inferor 12B is a merge of top roleplay models, expert on immersive narratives and storytelling. This model was merged using the Model Stock merge method using magnum-v4-12b as a base.

description.zh_CN: Mag Mell R1 12B 是基于 Mistral Nemo 的 mergekit 合并模型，融合多模型优势，在角色扮演与故事写作上表现突出，擅长沉浸式叙事。
description.en_US: Mag Mell is a merge of pre-trained language models created using mergekit, based on Mistral Nemo. It is a great roleplay and storytelling model which combines the best parts of many other models to be a general purpose solution for many usecases. Intended to be a general purpose "Best of Nemo" model for any fictional, creative use case. Mag Mell is composed of 3 intermediate parts: - Hero (RP, trope coverage) - Monk (Intelligence, groundedness) - Deity (Prose, flair)

description.zh_CN: E5 Base v2 是微软的英文文本嵌入模型，将句子和段落编码为 768 维向量，适合语义检索、相似度计算和 RAG 应用，高效且质量稳定。
description.en_US: The e5-base-v2 embedding model encodes English sentences and paragraphs into a 768-dimensional dense vector space, producing efficient and high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for tasks such as semantic search, similarity scoring, retrieval and clustering.

description.zh_CN: E5 Large v2 是微软的英文大模型嵌入，将文本映射为 1024 维向量，在检索、语义相似度和 RAG 任务上提供高精度语义表示。
description.en_US: The e5-large-v2 embedding model maps English sentences, paragraphs, and documents into a 1024-dimensional dense vector space, delivering high-accuracy semantic embeddings optimized for retrieval, semantic search, reranking, and similarity-scoring tasks.

description.zh_CN: Multilingual E5 Large 是微软的多语言嵌入模型，支持 90+ 语言，将文本编码为 1024 维向量，在跨语言检索和语义匹配上表现优异。
description.en_US: The multilingual-e5-large embedding model encodes sentences, paragraphs, and documents across over 90 languages into a 1024-dimensional dense vector space, delivering robust semantic embeddings optimized for multilingual retrieval, cross-language similarity, and large-scale data search.

description.zh_CN: Psyfighter 13B 是基于 Llama-2-13B 的社区合并模型，由 KoboldAI 社区提供算力支持，融合 Tiefighter、MedLLaMA 等模型，擅长创意写作与角色扮演。
description.en_US: A merge model based on Llama-2-13B and made possible thanks to the compute provided by the KoboldAI community. It's a merge between: - KoboldAI/LLaMA2-13B-Tiefighter - chaoyi-wu/MedLLaMA_13B - Doctor-Shotgun/llama-2-13b-chat-limarp-v2-merged.

description.zh_CN: Airoboros 70B 是基于 Llama 2 70B 的微调模型，使用 Airoboros 合成数据集训练，在指令遵循与创意写作上表现优秀，是社区经典模型之一。
description.en_US: A Llama 2 70B fine-tune using synthetic data (the Airoboros dataset). Currently based on jondurbin/airoboros-l2-70b, but might get updated in the future.

description.zh_CN: Bagel 34B v0.2 是基于 Yi 34B 200K 的实验性微调版本，采用 bagel 方法，在 DPO 之前的版本，在创意写作与角色扮演上可能更具表现力。
description.en_US: An experimental fine-tune of Yi 34b 200k using bagel. This is the version of the fine-tune before direct preference optimization (DPO) has been applied. DPO performs better on benchmarks, but this version is likely better for creative writing, roleplay, etc.

description.zh_CN: lzlv 70B 是多个 LLaMA2 70B 微调的 Mythomax 风格合并模型，融合多模型创意与角色扮演能力，专为创意写作与角色扮演场景设计。
description.en_US: A Mythomax/MLewd_13B-style merge of selected 70B models. A multi-model merge of several LLaMA2 70B finetunes for roleplaying and creative work. The goal was to create a model that combines creativity with intelligence for an enhanced experience.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 Soliloquy 8B v2 是快速高能的角色扮演模型，基于 2.5 亿 token 角色扮演数据训练，具备丰富的角色知识与沉浸式对话能力。
description.en_US: Soliloquy-L3 v2 is a fast, highly capable roleplaying model designed for immersive, dynamic experiences. Trained on over 250 million tokens of roleplaying data, Soliloquy-L3 has a vast knowledge base, rich literary expression, and support for up to 24k context length. It outperforms existing ~13B models, delivering enhanced roleplaying capabilities. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 Soliloquy 7B v3 32K 是沉浸式角色扮演模型，基于 20 亿 token 角色扮演数据训练，知识库丰富，擅长动态多轮角色对话。
description.en_US: Soliloquy v3 is a highly capable roleplaying model designed for immersive, dynamic experiences. Trained on over 2 billion tokens of roleplaying data, Soliloquy v3 boasts a vast knowledge base and rich literary expression, supporting up to 32k context length. It outperforms existing models of comparable size, delivering enhanced roleplaying capabilities. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Reflection 70B 是基于 Llama 3.1 70B 的反思调优模型，采用 Reflection-Tuning 技术教会模型检测推理错误并自我纠正，使用合成数据训练。
description.en_US: Reflection Llama-3.1 70B is trained with a new technique called Reflection-Tuning that teaches a LLM to detect mistakes in its reasoning and correct course. The model was trained on synthetic data.

description.zh_CN: Synthia 70B 是基于 Llama 2 70B 的 Orca 风格微调模型，在指令遵循和长对话上表现优秀，适合通用对话与复杂指令任务。
description.en_US: SynthIA (Synthetic Intelligent Agent) is a LLama-2 70B model trained on Orca style datasets. It has been fine-tuned for instruction following as well as having long-form conversations.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Nemo 12B Celeste 是基于 Mistral NeMo 12B Instruct 的故事写作与角色扮演专用模型，使用 Reddit 写作提示等数据微调，擅长创意叙事。
description.en_US: A specialized story writing and roleplaying model based on Mistral's NeMo 12B Instruct. Fine-tuned on curated datasets including Reddit Writing Prompts and Opus Instruct 25K. This model excels at creative writing, offering improved NSFW capabilities, with smarter and more active narration. It demonstrates remarkable versatility in both SFW and NSFW scenarios, with strong Out of Character (OOC) steering capabilities, allowing fine-tuned control over narrative direction and character behavior. Check out the model's HuggingFace page for details on what parameters and prompts work best!

description.zh_CN: SorcererLM 8x22B 是专为角色扮演和故事叙述设计的高级 RP 模型，采用 Mixtral 8x22B 为基础进行低秩 16 位微调，在沉浸式叙事和角色深度上表现出色。
description.en_US: SorcererLM 8x22B is an advanced RP model designed for roleplay and storytelling, built as a low-rank 16-bit fine-tune of Mixtral 8x22B, excelling in immersive narrative and character depth.

description.zh_CN: all-MiniLM-L12-v2 是轻量级文本嵌入模型，将句子和短段落映射为 384 维向量，适合语义相似度、检索和聚类等下游任务，高效且质量稳定。
description.en_US: The all-MiniLM-L12-v2 embedding model maps sentences and short paragraphs into a 384-dimensional dense vector space, producing efficient and high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for tasks such as semantic search, clustering, and similarity-scoring.

description.zh_CN: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 是超轻量文本嵌入模型，将文本映射为 384 维向量，适合语义表示和下游 NLP 任务，在效率与质量间取得良好平衡。
description.en_US: The all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding model maps sentences and short paragraphs into a 384-dimensional dense vector space, enabling high-quality semantic representations that are ideal for downstream tasks such as information retrieval, clustering, similarity scoring, and text ranking.

description.zh_CN: all-mpnet-base-v2 是高质量文本嵌入模型，将句子和短段落编码为 768 维向量，适合信息检索、语义相似度和 RAG 应用。
description.en_US: The all-mpnet-base-v2 embedding model encodes sentences and short paragraphs into a 768-dimensional dense vector space, providing high-fidelity semantic embeddings well suited for tasks like information retrieval, clustering, similarity scoring, and text ranking.

name: multi qa mpnet base dot v1

description.zh_CN: multi-qa-mpnet-base-dot-v1 是面向问答场景的嵌入模型，将文本转换为 768 维向量，采用点积相似度，适合问答检索和 RAG 应用。
description.en_US: The multi-qa-mpnet-base-dot-v1 embedding model transforms sentences and short paragraphs into a 768-dimensional dense vector space, generating high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for question-and-answer retrieval, semantic search, and similarity-scoring across diverse content.

description.zh_CN: paraphrase-MiniLM-L6-v2 是面向复述检测的嵌入模型，将文本转换为 384 维向量，适合复述识别、语义相似度和文本去重。
description.en_US: The paraphrase-MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding model converts sentences and short paragraphs into a 384-dimensional dense vector space, producing high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for paraphrase detection, semantic similarity scoring, clustering, and lightweight retrieval tasks.

description.zh_CN: Midnight Rose 70B 是 Rogue Rose 与 Aurora Nights 的继任者，专为角色扮演与故事写作设计，在创意叙事与角色一致性上较前代有全面改进。
description.en_US: A merge with a complex family tree, this model was crafted for roleplaying and storytelling. Midnight Rose is a successor to Rogue Rose and Aurora Nights and improves upon them both. It wants to produce lengthy output by default and is the best creative writing merge produced so far by sophosympatheia. Descending from earlier versions of Midnight Rose and Wizard Tulu Dolphin 70B, it inherits the best qualities of each.

description.zh_CN: L3.3 Electra R1 70B 是 Unnamed 系列最新版本，基于 DeepSeek R1 Distill 融合多模型，在智能对话与连贯叙事上表现突出，适合创意写作。
description.en_US: L3.3-Electra-R1-70 is the newest release of the Unnamed series. Built on a DeepSeek R1 Distill base, Electra-R1 integrates various models together to provide an intelligent and coherent model capable of providing deep character insights. Through proper prompting, the model demonstrates advanced reasoning capabilities and unprompted exploration of character inner thoughts and motivations. Read more about the model and prompting here

description.zh_CN: GTE Base 是阿里巴巴的英文文本嵌入模型，将句子和段落编码为 768 维向量，适合文本相似度、检索和聚类任务，高效且质量稳定。
description.en_US: The gte-base embedding model encodes English sentences and paragraphs into a 768-dimensional dense vector space, delivering efficient and effective semantic embeddings optimized for textual similarity, semantic search, and clustering applications.

description.zh_CN: GTE Large 是阿里巴巴的英文大模型嵌入，将文本映射为 1024 维向量，在语义相似度、检索和 RAG 任务上提供高质量表示。
description.en_US: The gte-large embedding model converts English sentences, paragraphs and moderate-length documents into a 1024-dimensional dense vector space, delivering high-quality semantic embeddings optimized for information retrieval, semantic textual similarity, reranking and clustering tasks. Trained via multi-stage contrastive learning on a large domain-diverse relevance corpus, it offers excellent performance across general-purpose embedding use-cases.

description.zh_CN: ReMM SLERP 13B 是基于 Llama-2 13B 采用球形线性插值（SLERP）合并多个高质量模型而成的创意写作模型，在角色扮演和通用对话上表现出色。
description.en_US: ReMM SLERP 13B is a creative writing model created by merging multiple high-quality models using Spherical Linear Interpolation (SLERP) on Llama-2 13B, excelling in roleplay and general conversational tasks.

description.zh_CN: Toppy M 7B 是采用 mergekit task_arithmetic 方法合并的 7B 模型，融合 Capybara、Zephyr、Mistral 等模型优势，擅长指令遵循与创意写作。
description.en_US: A wild 7B parameter model that merges several models using the new task_arithmetic merge method from mergekit. List of merged models: - NousResearch/Nous-Capybara-7B-V1.9 - HuggingFaceH4/zephyr-7b-beta - lemonilia/AshhLimaRP-Mistral-7B - Vulkane/120-Days-of-Sodom-LoRA-Mistral-7b - Undi95/Mistral-pippa-sharegpt-7b-qlora

description.zh_CN: Xwin 70B 是 Xwin-LM 基于 Llama 2 构建的对齐模型，在 AlpacaEval 上曾排名第一，是首个超越 GPT-4 的开源模型，擅长指令遵循与对话。
description.en_US: Xwin-LM aims to develop and open-source alignment tech for LLMs. Our first release, built-upon on the Llama2 base models, ranked TOP-1 on AlpacaEval. Notably, it's the first to surpass GPT-4 on this benchmark. The project will be continuously updated.

description.zh_CN: DBRX 132B Instruct 是 Databricks 开发的开源大模型，132B 参数，在语言理解、编程和推理基准上超越 Llama 2 70B 和 Mixtral-8x7b，采用 MoE 架构。
description.en_US: DBRX is a new open source large language model developed by Databricks. At 132B, it outperforms existing open source LLMs like Llama 2 70B and Mixtral-8x7b on standard industry benchmarks for language understanding, programming, math, and logic. It uses a fine-grained mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture. 36B parameters are active on any input. It was pre-trained on 12T tokens of text and code data. Compared to other open MoE models like Mixtral-8x7B and Grok-1, DBRX is fine-grained, meaning it uses a larger number of smaller experts. See the launch announcement and benchmark results here.

description.zh_CN: Cogito v2 DeepSeek 671B 是 DeepCogito 的 671B MoE 多语言指令模型，支持标准与推理两种生成模式，在复杂推理和数学任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Cogito v2 is a multilingual, instruction-tuned Mixture of Experts (MoE) large language model with 671 billion parameters. It supports both standard and reasoning-based generation modes. The model introduces hybrid reasoning via Iterated Distillation and Amplification (IDA)—an iterative self-improvement strategy designed to scale alignment with general intelligence. Cogito v2 has been optimized for STEM, programming, instruction following, and tool use. It supports 128k context length and offers strong performance in both multilingual and code-heavy environments. Users can control the reasoning behaviour with the `reasoning` `enabled` boolean. Learn more in our docs

description.zh_CN: Cogito v2 Llama 109B 是基于 Llama-4-Scout 的混合推理 MoE 模型，支持直接回答与扩展思考模式，采用迭代偏好优化进行对齐。
description.en_US: An instruction-tuned, hybrid-reasoning Mixture-of-Experts model built on Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E. Cogito v2 can answer directly or engage an extended “thinking” phase, with alignment guided by Iterated Distillation & Amplification (IDA). It targets coding, STEM, instruction following, and general helpfulness, with stronger multilingual, tool-calling, and reasoning performance than size-equivalent baselines. The model supports long-context use (up to 10M tokens) and standard Transformers workflows. Users can control the reasoning behaviour with the `reasoning` `enabled` boolean. Learn more in our docs

description.zh_CN: Cogito v2 405B 是密集混合推理模型，结合直接回答与高级自反思能力，代表密集架构迈向前沿智能的重要一步。
description.en_US: Cogito v2 405B is a dense hybrid reasoning model that combines direct answering capabilities with advanced self-reflection. It represents a significant step toward frontier intelligence with dense architecture delivering performance competitive with leading closed models. This advanced reasoning system combines policy improvement with massive scale for exceptional capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Cogito v2 70B 是密集混合推理模型，结合直接回答与自反思能力，采用迭代策略改进，在数学、代码和推理任务上表现强劲。
description.en_US: Cogito v2 70B is a dense hybrid reasoning model that combines direct answering capabilities with advanced self-reflection. Built with iterative policy improvement, it delivers strong performance across reasoning tasks while maintaining efficiency through shorter reasoning chains and improved intuition.

description.zh_CN: Cogito v2.1 671B 是 Deep Cogito 的超大 MoE 推理模型，在全球开源模型中综合表现领先，兼具强大的代码、数学和推理能力，支持灵活的思考深度控制。
description.en_US: Cogito v2.1 671B is Deep Cogito's ultra-large MoE reasoning model with leading aggregate performance among global open-source models, combining powerful code, math, and reasoning capabilities with flexible thinking depth control.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3 是 DeepSeek 的通用对话旗舰模型，在中英文推理、代码生成和数学任务上表现突出，性价比极高，支持约 16 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: DeepSeek V3 is DeepSeek's general-purpose conversational flagship model with outstanding performance in Chinese and English reasoning, code generation, and math, offering exceptional cost efficiency with ~160K token context.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V2.5 是 DeepSeek-V2-Chat 与 DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Instruct 的融合升级版本，在通用对话和代码生成能力上实现综合提升。
description.en_US: DeepSeek-V2.5 is an upgraded version that combines DeepSeek-V2-Chat and DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Instruct. The new model integrates the general and coding abilities of the two previous versions. For model details, please visit DeepSeek-V2 page for more information.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3 的 2025 年 3 月 24 日版本，在推理和上下文理解方面有所改进，支持约 16 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: The March 24, 2025 version of DeepSeek V3 with improvements in reasoning and context comprehension, supporting ~160K token context.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.1 是 V3 系列的中间迭代版本，在指令遵循和对话能力上进行了优化，最大上下文约 3.3 万 token。
description.en_US: DeepSeek V3.1 is an intermediate iteration in the V3 series with optimized instruction following and conversational capability, featuring ~33K token context.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek Prover V2 是 DeepSeek 671B 参数的数学证明专用模型，专注于形式化定理证明和高难度数学推理任务。
description.en_US: DeepSeek Prover V2 is a 671B parameter model, speculated to be geared towards logic and mathematics. Likely an upgrade from DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 Not much is known about the model yet, as DeepSeek released it on Hugging Face without an announcement or description.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 是专为深度推理设计的开源模型，通过强化学习训练，在数学、代码和逻辑推理任务上达到顶级水平，性能媲美 OpenAI o1。
description.en_US: DeepSeek R1 is an open-source model designed for deep reasoning, trained with reinforcement learning to achieve top-tier performance in math, coding, and logic reasoning, comparable to OpenAI o1.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 的 2025 年 5 月 28 日更新版本，在推理能力上进一步提升，支持约 16 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: The May 28, 2025 updated version of DeepSeek R1 with further improvements in reasoning capability, supporting ~160K token context.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 0528 Qwen3 8B 是基于 Qwen3 8B 基底的 DeepSeek R1 轻量级更新版本，通过更多计算资源强化了推理能力。
description.en_US: DeepSeek-R1-0528 is a lightly upgraded release of DeepSeek R1 that taps more compute and smarter post-training tricks, pushing its reasoning and inference to the brink of flagship models like O3 and Gemini 2.5 Pro. It now tops math, programming, and logic leaderboards, showcasing a step-change in depth-of-thought. The distilled variant, DeepSeek-R1-0528-Qwen3-8B, transfers this chain-of-thought into an 8 B-parameter form, beating standard Qwen3 8B by +10 pp and tying the 235 B “thinking” giant on AIME 2024.

description.zh_CN: 基于 Llama-70B 蒸馏的 DeepSeek R1 推理模型，结合了 Llama 架构的灵活性和 R1 的推理能力，适合本地部署的推理场景。
description.en_US: A DeepSeek R1 reasoning model distilled into Llama-70B, combining the flexibility of the Llama architecture with R1's reasoning capabilities for locally-deployable reasoning scenarios.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 Distill Llama 8B 是基于 Llama 3 8B 蒸馏自 DeepSeek R1 的高效推理模型，在保留推理能力的同时大幅缩减参数规模。
description.en_US: DeepSeek R1 Distill Llama 8B is a distilled large language model based on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, using outputs from DeepSeek R1. The model combines advanced distillation techniques to achieve high performance across multiple benchmarks, including: - AIME 2024 pass@1: 50.4 - MATH-500 pass@1: 89.1 - CodeForces Rating: 1205 The model leverages fine-tuning from DeepSeek R1's outputs, enabling competitive performance comparable to larger frontier models. Hugging Face: - Llama-3.1-8B - DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B |

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 1.5B 是 DeepSeek R1 蒸馏系列中最轻量的版本，基于 Qwen 1.5B 构建，适合资源极受限的推理场景。
description.en_US: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 1.5B is a distilled large language model based on Qwen 2.5 Math 1.5B, using outputs from DeepSeek R1. It's a very small and efficient model which outperforms GPT 4o 0513 on Math Benchmarks. Other benchmark results include: - AIME 2024 pass@1: 28.9 - AIME 2024 cons@64: 52.7 - MATH-500 pass@1: 83.9 The model leverages fine-tuning from DeepSeek R1's outputs, enabling competitive performance comparable to larger frontier models.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 14B 是基于 Qwen 2.5 14B 蒸馏自 DeepSeek R1 的推理模型，在性能和效率之间取得较好平衡。
description.en_US: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 14B is a distilled large language model based on Qwen 2.5 14B, using outputs from DeepSeek R1. It outperforms OpenAI's o1-mini across various benchmarks, achieving new state-of-the-art results for dense models. Other benchmark results include: - AIME 2024 pass@1: 69.7 - MATH-500 pass@1: 93.9 - CodeForces Rating: 1481 The model leverages fine-tuning from DeepSeek R1's outputs, enabling competitive performance comparable to larger frontier models.

description.zh_CN: 基于 Qwen2.5-32B 蒸馏的 DeepSeek R1 推理模型，在保留 R1 推理能力的同时大幅降低计算成本，适合资源受限的推理场景。
description.en_US: A DeepSeek R1 reasoning model distilled into Qwen2.5-32B, preserving R1's reasoning capabilities while significantly reducing computational costs for resource-constrained reasoning scenarios.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 7B 是 DeepSeek R1 蒸馏至 Qwen 2.5 7B 的高效推理模型，以轻量参数实现接近大模型的推理能力。
description.en_US: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B is a 7 billion parameter dense language model distilled from DeepSeek-R1, leveraging reinforcement learning-enhanced reasoning data generated by DeepSeek's larger models. The distillation process transfers advanced reasoning, math, and code capabilities into a smaller, more efficient model architecture based on Qwen2.5-Math-7B. This model demonstrates strong performance across mathematical benchmarks (92.8% pass@1 on MATH-500), coding tasks (Codeforces rating 1189), and general reasoning (49.1% pass@1 on GPQA Diamond), achieving competitive accuracy relative to larger models while maintaining smaller inference costs.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1 Zero 是 DeepSeek 通过大规模强化学习（无监督微调）训练的基础推理模型，展示了纯 RL 训练赋予模型的自主推理能力。
description.en_US: DeepSeek-R1-Zero is a model trained via large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) without supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as a preliminary step. It's 671B parameters in size, with 37B active in an inference pass. It demonstrates remarkable performance on reasoning. With RL, DeepSeek-R1-Zero naturally emerged with numerous powerful and interesting reasoning behaviors. DeepSeek-R1-Zero encounters challenges such as endless repetition, poor readability, and language mixing. See DeepSeek R1 for the SFT model.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3 Base 是 DeepSeek V3 的基础预训练版本（非指令微调），主要用于技术测试和研究，使用时需自行提供完整 prompt。
description.en_US: Note that this is a base model mostly meant for testing, you need to provide detailed prompts for the model to return useful responses. DeepSeek-V3 Base is a 671B parameter open Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 37B active parameters per forward pass and a context length of 128K tokens. Trained on 14.8T tokens using FP8 mixed precision, it achieves high training efficiency and stability, with strong performance across language, reasoning, math, and coding tasks. DeepSeek-V3 Base is the pre-trained model behind DeepSeek V3

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.1 Base 是 DeepSeek V3.1 的基础预训练版本，仅用于原始文本预测，未经指令微调，适合研究和探索性测试。
description.en_US: This is a base model, trained only for raw next-token prediction. Unlike instruct/chat models, it has not been fine-tuned to follow user instructions. Prompts need to be written more like training text or examples rather than simple requests (e.g., “Translate the following sentence…” instead of just “Translate this”). DeepSeek-V3.1 Base is a 671B parameter open Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 37B active parameters per forward pass and a context length of 128K tokens. Trained on 14.8T tokens using FP8 mixed precision, it achieves high training efficiency and stability, with strong performance across language, reasoning, math, and coding tasks.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.1 Terminus 是增强了代理能力的 V3.1 版本，在工具使用和代码生成任务上有显著提升，适合复杂多步骤代理工作流。
description.en_US: DeepSeek V3.1 Terminus is an agent-capability-enhanced version of V3.1 with notable improvements in tool use and code generation, suitable for complex multi-step agentic workflows.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.1 Terminus 的固定提供商版本，锁定到特定推理节点以确保稳定的服务质量与延迟一致性，适合对性能稳定性有严格要求的生产场景。
description.en_US: A provider-locked variant of DeepSeek V3.1 Terminus, pinned to a specific inference provider for consistent performance and predictable latency, suitable for production workloads with strict stability requirements.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.2 是 DeepSeek 最新旗舰模型，采用 671B MoE 架构，在中英文推理、代码和数学任务上性能领先，最大上下文约 16 万 token。
description.en_US: DeepSeek V3.2 is DeepSeek's latest flagship model with a 671B MoE architecture, leading in Chinese and English reasoning, coding, and math tasks with ~160K token context.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.2 的实验版本，引入 DeepSeek 稀疏注意力机制，提升长上下文处理效率，适合探索最新特性的开发者。
description.en_US: The experimental version of DeepSeek V3.2 introducing DeepSeek Sparse Attention for improved long-context processing efficiency, designed for developers exploring the latest features.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale 是最大输出上限版本，支持最高约 16 万 token 输出，适合需要超长响应的特殊场景。
description.en_US: DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale is a maximum output variant supporting up to ~160K token output, designed for special scenarios requiring ultra-long responses.

description.zh_CN: ByteDance Seed 1.6 是性能均衡的通用多模态模型，支持文本、图像和视频输入，适合广泛的生产场景，支持 26 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: ByteDance Seed 1.6 is a well-balanced general-purpose multimodal model supporting text, image, and video inputs for broad production scenarios with 262K token context.

description.zh_CN: ByteDance Seed 1.6 Flash 是 Seed 1.6 的快速版本，在保持多模态能力的同时大幅降低响应延迟，适合对实时性要求高的场景。
description.en_US: ByteDance Seed 1.6 Flash is the fast version of Seed 1.6, significantly reducing response latency while maintaining multimodal capabilities, suitable for scenarios with high real-time requirements.

description.zh_CN: ByteDance Seed 2.0 Mini 面向低延迟高并发场景，支持文本、图像和视频多模态输入，视觉理解能力达世界级，支持 26 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: ByteDance Seed 2.0 Mini targets low-latency high-concurrency scenarios, supporting text, image, and video multimodal inputs with world-class visual understanding and 262K token context.

description.zh_CN: Seedream 4.5 是字节跳动最新自研图像生成模型，在编辑一致性、肖像精细化和小字渲染方面全面提升，支持多图组合与高质量视觉创作。
description.en_US: Seedream 4.5 is the latest in-house image generation model developed by ByteDance. Compared with Seedream 4.0, it delivers comprehensive improvements, especially in editing consistency, including better preservation of subject details, lighting, and color tone. It also enhances portrait refinement and small-text rendering. The model’s multi-image composition capabilities have been significantly strengthened, and both reasoning performance and visual aesthetics continue to advance, enabling more accurate and artistically expressive image generation.

description.zh_CN: Llemma 7B 是 EleutherAI 专为数学推理预训练的语言模型，基于 Code Llama 初始化后在大规模数学语料上继续训练，在数学证明和计算任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: Llemma 7B is EleutherAI's language model pre-trained specifically for mathematical reasoning, initialized from Code Llama and further trained on large-scale math corpora, excelling in mathematical proofs and computation tasks.

description.zh_CN: Rnj-1 是 EssentialAI 开发的 8B 参数开放权重指令调优模型，在推理和通用对话任务上表现良好，适合轻量生产部署。
description.en_US: Rnj-1 is EssentialAI's 8B parameter open-weight instruction-tuned model with solid performance in reasoning and general conversational tasks, suitable for lightweight production deployment.

description.zh_CN: FireLLaVA 13B 是 Fireworks 的快速视觉语言模型，能同时理解文本与图像，在对话测试中表现突出，设计目标为模仿多模态 GPT-4，为首款商业化 VLM。
description.en_US: A blazing fast vision-language model, FireLLaVA quickly understands both text and images. It achieves impressive chat skills in tests, and was designed to mimic multimodal GPT-4. The first commercially permissive open source LLaVA model, trained entirely on open source LLM generated instruction following data.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.0 Flash 正式版，支持文本、图像、音频和视频多模态输入，在高并发场景下提供出色的成本效益，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Gemini 2.0 Flash GA version supporting text, image, audio, and video multimodal inputs, offering excellent cost efficiency for high-concurrency scenarios with 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.0 Flash Experimental 是 Google Gemini 2.0 Flash 的实验版本，相比前代显著缩短了首字节时间，在多模态推理速度上大幅提升。
description.en_US: Gemini Flash 2.0 offers a significantly faster time to first token (TTFT) compared to Gemini Flash 1.5, while maintaining quality on par with larger models like Gemini Pro 1.5. It introduces notable enhancements in multimodal understanding, coding capabilities, complex instruction following, and function calling. These advancements come together to deliver more seamless and robust agentic experiences.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.0 Flash 的轻量版本，进一步降低延迟和成本，支持多模态输入，适合对成本极为敏感的大规模部署场景。
description.en_US: The lite version of Gemini 2.0 Flash with further reduced latency and cost, supporting multimodal input for cost-sensitive large-scale deployment scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Flash 是高性价比的正式版模型，兼顾低延迟与推理能力，支持 100 万 token 上下文，适合需要平衡速度与质量的生产场景。
description.en_US: Gemini 2.5 Flash is a cost-efficient GA model balancing low latency and reasoning capability, with 1M token context for production scenarios requiring a speed-quality trade-off.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image 是 Google 基于 Gemini 2.5 Flash 架构推出的图像生成模型，以快速高效的方式生成高质量图像，支持文本引导的图像创作与精细编辑。
description.en_US: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Google's image generation model built on the Gemini 2.5 Flash architecture, offering fast and efficient high-quality image generation with text-guided creation and fine-grained editing capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image Preview 是 Google 基于 Gemini 2.5 Flash 架构的图像生成预览模型，以快速高效的方式提供高质量图像生成能力。
description.en_US: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image Preview, a.k.a. "Nano Banana," is a state of the art image generation model with contextual understanding. It is capable of image generation, edits, and multi-turn conversations.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Flash 系列中最轻量最快的版本，适合对速度和成本要求极高的高频简单请求场景，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: The lightest and fastest model in the Gemini 2.5 Flash series, designed for high-frequency simple request scenarios with strict speed and cost requirements, supporting 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite 的 2025 年 9 月预览版本，是正式版发布前的测试版，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: The September 2025 preview version of Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, a pre-GA release for testing with 1M token context support.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview (09-2025) 是 Google 2025 年 9 月发布的 Gemini 2.5 Flash 检查点版本，在速度和推理能力上达到当时最先进水平。
description.en_US: Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview September 2025 Checkpoint is Google's state-of-the-art workhorse model, specifically designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks. It includes built-in "thinking" capabilities, enabling it to provide responses with greater accuracy and nuanced context handling. Additionally, Gemini 2.5 Flash is configurable through the "max tokens for reasoning" parameter, as described in the documentation (https://openrouter.ai/docs/use-cases/reasoning-tokens-tokens-for-reasoning).

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Pro 是 Google 正式版旗舰，具备深度推理与自适应思考能力，在复杂编程和科学分析任务上表现卓越，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Gemini 2.5 Pro is Google's GA flagship with deep reasoning and adaptive thinking capabilities, excelling in complex coding and scientific analysis tasks with 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Pro Experimental 是 Google Gemini 2.5 Pro 的早期实验版本，已被付费 Preview 版本取代，代表了当时 Google 多模态模型的阶段性成果。
description.en_US: This model has been deprecated by Google in favor of the (paid Preview model)[google/gemini-2.5-pro-preview] Gemini 2.5 Pro is Google’s state-of-the-art AI model designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks. It employs “thinking” capabilities, enabling it to reason through responses with enhanced accuracy and nuanced context handling. Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves top-tier performance on multiple benchmarks, including first-place positioning on the LMArena leaderboard, reflecting superior human-preference alignment and complex problem-solving abilities.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Pro 的预览版本（2025 年 6 月），功能与正式版基本一致，适合希望提前体验最新特性的开发者。
description.en_US: The preview version of Gemini 2.5 Pro (June 2025), functionally equivalent to the GA release, suitable for developers wanting early access to the latest features.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 2.5 Pro 的 2025 年 5 月 6 日预览版本，适合希望使用固定版本的开发者。
description.en_US: The May 6, 2025 preview version of Gemini 2.5 Pro, suitable for developers requiring a pinned fixed version.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 3 Flash 预览版以媲美大模型的性能大幅降低成本，在低延迟场景下提供强大的多模态处理能力，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Gemini 3 Flash Preview delivers frontier-class performance at significantly lower cost, providing powerful multimodal processing for low-latency scenarios with 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview 是 Google 最先进的图像生成与编辑预览模型，基于 Gemini 3 Pro 构建，在图像创作质量、编辑精度和多模态理解方面达到业界领先水平。
description.en_US: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview is Google's most advanced image generation and editing model built on Gemini 3 Pro, delivering leading image creation quality, fine-grained editing precision, and strong multimodal understanding.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 3 Pro 预览版是 Google 高精度多模态旗舰模型，在科学推理、代码和内容创作上表现突出，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Gemini 3 Pro Preview is Google's high-precision multimodal flagship model, excelling in scientific reasoning, code, and content creation with 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview 是 Google 基于 Gemini 3.1 Flash 架构推出的最新图像生成与编辑预览模型，提供高质量图像创作能力，支持精细化图像编辑和多模态输入。
description.en_US: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview is Google's latest image generation and editing model built on the Gemini 3.1 Flash architecture, offering high-quality image creation with fine-grained editing and multimodal input support.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite 预览版是 Google 高效轻量模型，在 Gemini 3.1 系列中成本最低，适合对速度和成本要求极高的高频简单请求场景，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview is Google's high-efficiency lightweight model, the most cost-effective in the Gemini 3.1 series, designed for high-frequency simple request scenarios with strict speed and cost requirements, supporting 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 3.1 Pro 预览版是 Google 最新前沿推理模型，在代码、多模态理解和代理工作流中表现卓越，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview is Google's latest frontier reasoning model, excelling in coding, multimodal understanding, and agentic workflows with 1M token context.
