description.zh_CN: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview 的自定义工具变体，专为需要复杂工具调用和代理集成的场景优化，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: The custom tools variant of Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, optimized for scenarios requiring complex tool calling and agent integration with 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: Gemini Embedding 001 是 Google 的文本嵌入模型，跨多领域提供统一的高质量语义表示，适用于语义搜索、RAG 和内容推荐场景。
description.en_US: gemini-embedding-001 provides a unified cutting edge experience across domains, including science, legal, finance, and coding. This embedding model has consistently held a top spot on the Massive Text Embedding Benchmark (MTEB) Multilingual leaderboard since the experimental launch in March.

description.zh_CN: Gemini Experimental 1114 是 Google 2024 年 11 月发布的 Gemini 实验版本，主要针对整体输出质量进行了改进。
description.en_US: Gemini 11-14 (2024) experimental model features "quality" improvements.

description.zh_CN: Gemini Experimental 1121 是 Google 2024 年 11 月 21 日发布的 Gemini 实验版本，持续探索新的模型能力和性能改进。
description.en_US: Experimental release (November 21st, 2024) of Gemini.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 1.5 Flash 是 Google 多模态基础模型，在文本、代码、图像等多种任务上表现优秀，提供快速高效的 100 万 token 长上下文处理能力。
description.en_US: Gemini 1.5 Flash is a foundation model that performs well at a variety of multimodal tasks such as visual understanding, classification, summarization, and creating content from image, audio and video. It's adept at processing visual and text inputs such as photographs, documents, infographics, and screenshots. Gemini 1.5 Flash is designed for high-volume, high-frequency tasks where cost and latency matter. On most common tasks, Flash achieves comparable quality to other Gemini Pro models at a significantly reduced cost. Flash is well-suited for applications like chat assistants and on-demand content generation where speed and scale matter. Usage of Gemini is subject to Google's Gemini Terms of Use.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 1.5 Flash 8B 是 Gemini 1.5 Flash 的 8B 参数轻量版本，针对速度和效率进行优化，提供增强的性能和更低的延迟。
description.en_US: Gemini Flash 1.5 8B is optimized for speed and efficiency, offering enhanced performance in small prompt tasks like chat, transcription, and translation. With reduced latency, it is highly effective for real-time and large-scale operations. This model focuses on cost-effective solutions while maintaining high-quality results. Click here to learn more about this model. Usage of Gemini is subject to Google's Gemini Terms of Use.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 1.5 Flash Experimental 是 Gemini 1.5 Flash 的实验版本，探索最新实验功能和模型改进。
description.en_US: Gemini 1.5 Flash Experimental is an experimental version of the Gemini 1.5 Flash model. Usage of Gemini is subject to Google's Gemini Terms of Use. Note: This model is experimental and not suited for production use-cases. It may be removed or redirected to another model in the future.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 1.5 Pro 是 Google 的多模态旗舰模型，支持 100 万 token 超长上下文，能处理图像、视频和文本，在复杂推理和分析任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Google's latest multimodal model, supports image and video[0] in text or chat prompts. Optimized for language tasks including: - Code generation - Text generation - Text editing - Problem solving - Recommendations - Information extraction - Data extraction or generation - AI agents Usage of Gemini is subject to Google's Gemini Terms of Use. * [0]: Video input is not available through OpenRouter at this time.

description.zh_CN: Gemini 1.5 Pro Experimental 是 Gemini 1.5 Pro 的实验性前沿版本，持续引入最新的模型改进和能力扩展。
description.en_US: Gemini 1.5 Pro Experimental is a bleeding-edge version of the Gemini 1.5 Pro model. Because it's currently experimental, it will be **heavily rate-limited** by Google. Usage of Gemini is subject to Google's Gemini Terms of Use.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 2 27B 是 Google 上一代开源大模型，在文本理解和生成任务上表现稳定，适合需要本地部署的应用。
description.en_US: Gemma 2 27B is Google's previous generation open-source large model with stable text understanding and generation performance, suitable for applications requiring local deployment.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 2 9B 是 Google 上一代开源中型模型，在文本推理任务上表现良好，适合资源受限的本地部署场景。
description.en_US: Gemma 2 9B is Google's previous generation open-source medium-sized model with solid text reasoning performance, suitable for resource-constrained local deployment scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 1 2B 是 Google 发布的开源 2B 参数语言模型，基于与 Gemini 相同的研究技术构建，具备基础的文本理解和生成能力。
description.en_US: Gemma 1 2B by Google is an open model built from the same research and technology used to create the Gemini models. Gemma models are well-suited for a variety of text generation tasks, including question answering, summarization, and reasoning. Usage of Gemma is subject to Google's Gemma Terms of Use.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 12B 是 Google 开源的中型指令调优模型，在推理速度和质量之间取得良好平衡，支持文本和图像输入。
description.en_US: Gemma 3 12B is Google's open-source mid-size instruction-tuned model, balancing inference speed and quality with text and image input support.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 12B 指令调优版的免费访问版本，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Gemma 3 12B instruction-tuned, suitable for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 1B 是 Gemma 3 系列中最小成员，支持 128K token 上下文窗口，适合在边缘设备和资源受限环境中高效运行。
description.en_US: Gemma 3 1B is the smallest of the new Gemma 3 family. It handles context windows up to 32k tokens, understands over 140 languages, and offers improved math, reasoning, and chat capabilities, including structured outputs and function calling. Note: Gemma 3 1B is not multimodal. For the smallest multimodal Gemma 3 model, please see Gemma 3 4B

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 27B 是 Google 开源的指令调优大模型，在文本理解和图像分析方面表现出色，适合需要本地部署的生产场景。
description.en_US: Gemma 3 27B is Google's open-source instruction-tuned large model, excelling in text understanding and image analysis, suitable for production scenarios requiring local deployment.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 27B 指令调优版的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Gemma 3 27B instruction-tuned, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 4B 是 Google 开源的轻量指令调优模型，体积小巧但具备基本的文本和图像理解能力，适合边缘设备或资源受限场景。
description.en_US: Gemma 3 4B is Google's lightweight open-source instruction-tuned model with basic text and image understanding capabilities, suitable for edge devices or resource-constrained scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3 4B 指令调优版的免费访问版本，适合探索与轻量化应用场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Gemma 3 4B instruction-tuned, suitable for exploration and lightweight application scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3n 2B 是 Google 开源系列中最小的模型，免费访问，适合对参数量要求极低的轻量化场景。
description.en_US: Gemma 3n 2B is the smallest model in Google's open-source series, available for free, suitable for ultra-lightweight scenarios with minimal parameter requirements.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3n 4B 是 Google 开源的新架构轻量模型，采用混合参数设计，在低计算资源下提供出色的文本处理能力。
description.en_US: Gemma 3n 4B is Google's open-source lightweight model with a hybrid parameter architecture, offering strong text processing under low computational resources.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 3n 4B 的免费访问版本，适合探索与测试场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Gemma 3n 4B, suitable for exploration and testing.

description.zh_CN: Gemma 7B 是 Google 发布的开源 7B 参数语言模型，基于 Gemini 研究成果构建，在语言理解和生成任务上具有较强的通用性。
description.en_US: Gemma by Google is an advanced, open-source language model family, leveraging the latest in decoder-only, text-to-text technology. It offers English language capabilities across text generation tasks like question answering, summarization, and reasoning. The Gemma 7B variant is comparable in performance to leading open source models. Usage of Gemma is subject to Google's Gemma Terms of Use.

description.zh_CN: PaLM 2 Chat 是 Google PaLM 2 的对话优化版本，在多语言处理、推理和代码生成方面表现良好。
description.en_US: PaLM 2 is a language model by Google with improved multilingual, reasoning and coding capabilities.

description.zh_CN: PaLM 2 Chat 32k 是 PaLM 2 Chat 的 3.2 万 token 扩展上下文版本，适合需要长文档对话处理的场景。
description.en_US: PaLM 2 is a language model by Google with improved multilingual, reasoning and coding capabilities.

description.zh_CN: PaLM 2 Code Chat 是 Google PaLM 2 专为编程辅助场景微调的对话模型，擅长代码相关问题解答和代码生成。
description.en_US: PaLM 2 fine-tuned for chatbot conversations that help with code-related questions.

description.zh_CN: PaLM 2 Code Chat 32k 是 PaLM 2 Code Chat 的 3.2 万 token 扩展版本，适合处理大型代码库和复杂编程项目。
description.en_US: PaLM 2 fine-tuned for chatbot conversations that help with code-related questions.

description.zh_CN: Google 视频生成模型，生成速度快、音画同步好、控制精细，支持最长 60 秒、1080p，具备专业镜头语言（如希区柯克式变焦），与 Gemini API 和 Flow 深度集成。
description.en_US: Google's video generation model with fast generation, strong audio-video sync, and fine control. Supports up to 60s clips at 1080p with professional cinematography (e.g. Hitchcock zoom). Integrated with Gemini API and Flow.

description.zh_CN: Zephyr 7B 是 HuggingFace 的助手型语言模型系列，基于 Mistral 7B 微调，采用 DPO 对齐，在指令遵循与对话质量上表现优秀。
description.en_US: Zephyr is a series of language models that are trained to act as helpful assistants. Zephyr-7B-β is the second model in the series, and is a fine-tuned version of mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 that was trained on a mix of publicly available, synthetic datasets using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO).

description.zh_CN: Zephyr 141B A35B 是 141B 总参数、35B 激活的 MoE 模型，基于公开与合成数据集微调，在指令遵循与多轮对话上表现突出。
description.en_US: Zephyr 141B-A35B is A Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 141B total parameters and 35B active parameters. Fine-tuned on a mix of publicly available, synthetic datasets. It is an instruct finetune of Mixtral 8x22B.

description.zh_CN: Granite 4.0 Micro 是 IBM Granite 4 系列的 3B 参数混合推理模型，专为企业场景设计，在极低资源下提供可靠的文本处理和推理能力。
description.en_US: Granite 4.0 Micro is IBM's 3B parameter hybrid reasoning model from the Granite 4 family, designed for enterprise scenarios, providing reliable text processing and reasoning under extremely low resource constraints.

description.zh_CN: Mercury 是全球首款扩散大语言模型，采用突破性的扩散生成范式，在高吞吐量文本生成任务上达到每秒超过 1000 token 的速度，适合对生成速度要求极高的场景。
description.en_US: Mercury is the world's first diffusion large language model, using a breakthrough diffusion generation paradigm, achieving speeds exceeding 1000 tokens per second in high-throughput text generation tasks, suitable for scenarios requiring extremely fast generation.

description.zh_CN: Mercury Coder 是首款代码生成专属扩散大语言模型，将扩散生成范式应用于代码场景，在高速代码补全和生成任务上表现出色，速度远超传统自回归模型。
description.en_US: Mercury Coder is the first diffusion large language model dedicated to code generation, applying the diffusion generation paradigm to coding scenarios, excelling in high-speed code completion and generation tasks far faster than traditional autoregressive models.

description.zh_CN: Inflection 3 Pi 是 Pi 智能助手的底层模型，专注于具有同理心的对话交互，强调情感智能和个性化对话体验，适合需要温暖人文关怀的对话场景。
description.en_US: Inflection 3 Pi is the underlying model powering the Pi AI assistant, focused on empathetic conversational interaction, emphasizing emotional intelligence and personalized dialogue experiences for scenarios requiring warmth and human care.

description.zh_CN: Inflection 3 Productivity 是 Inflection 的指令遵循优化版本，在任务执行、信息提取和结构化输出上表现更强，适合需要精准执行指令的生产力场景。
description.en_US: Inflection 3 Productivity is Inflection's instruction-following optimized version, performing stronger in task execution, information extraction, and structured output, suitable for productivity scenarios requiring precise instruction execution.

description.zh_CN: Neural Chat 7B v3.1 是英特尔基于 Mistral 7B 在 Open-Orca SlimOrca 数据集上微调的模型，采用 DPO 对齐，在指令遵循与对话质量上表现优秀。
description.en_US: A fine-tuned model based on mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 on the open source dataset Open-Orca/SlimOrca, aligned with DPO algorithm. For more details, refer to the blog: The Practice of Supervised Fine-tuning and Direct Preference Optimization on Habana Gaudi2.

description.zh_CN: Psyfighter v2 13B 是 KoboldAI 社区 Jeb Carter 与 TwistedShadows 打造的合并模型 v2，在医学与创意写作能力上较 v1 有增强，擅长角色扮演。
description.en_US: The v2 of Psyfighter - a merged model created by the KoboldAI community members Jeb Carter and TwistedShadows, made possible thanks to the KoboldAI merge request service. The intent was to add medical data to supplement the model's fictional ability with more details on anatomy and mental states. This model should not be used for medical advice or therapy because of its high likelihood of pulling in fictional data. It's a merge between: - KoboldAI/LLaMA2-13B-Tiefighter - Doctor-Shotgun/cat-v1.0-13b - Doctor-Shotgun/llama-2-13b-chat-limarp-v2-merged.

description.zh_CN: 快手可灵 2.6 视频生成模型，具备音画同出功能，中文语音效果全球领先，适合中文短视频与营销内容创作。
description.en_US: Kuaishou Kling 2.6 video generation model with native audio-video output. Leading Chinese voice synthesis for short-form and marketing content.

description.zh_CN: 快手可灵 3.0 视频生成模型，人物动作与动画表现突出，支持多镜头序列（3–15 秒）、跨镜头主体一致性、语音参考，与 Sora 2、Veo 3.1 并列为 2026 年三大主流。
description.en_US: Kuaishou Kling 3.0 excels at human motion and animation. Supports multi-shot sequences (3–15s), subject consistency across shots, and voice reference. One of the top three video models in 2026 alongside Sora 2 and Veo 3.1.

description.zh_CN: KAT-Coder-Pro V1 是快手 KwaiKAT 最先进的代理编码模型，在复杂软件工程任务、多文件代码编辑和代码调试场景中表现卓越，支持长流程自主编码。
description.en_US: KAT-Coder-Pro V1 is Kuaishou's KwaiKAT most advanced agentic coding model, excelling in complex software engineering tasks, multi-file code editing, and code debugging scenarios, supporting long-horizon autonomous coding.

description.zh_CN: LLaVA 13B 是结合视觉编码器与 Vicuna 的大型多模态模型，在通用视觉与语言理解上表现突出，具备出色的对话能力，曾创下 VLM 新标杆。
description.en_US: LLaVA is a large multimodal model that combines a vision encoder and Vicuna for general-purpose visual and language understanding, achieving impressive chat capabilities and setting a new state-of-the-art accuracy on Science QA.

description.zh_CN: LLaVA v1.6 34B 是基于 Yi 34B 微调的开源多模态模型，使用多模态指令数据训练，在视觉问答与图像理解上表现优秀。
description.en_US: LLaVA Yi 34B is an open-source model trained by fine-tuning LLM on multimodal instruction-following data. It is an auto-regressive language model, based on the transformer architecture. Base LLM: NousResearch/Nous-Hermes-2-Yi-34B It was trained in December 2023.

description.zh_CN: Wayfarer Large 70B 是基于 Llama 3.3 70B Instruct 微调的角色扮演与文字冒险模型，针对叙事驱动场景优化，引入真实状态追踪与挑战性情境。
description.en_US: Wayfarer Large 70B is a roleplay and text-adventure model fine-tuned from Meta’s Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct. Specifically optimized for narrative-driven, challenging scenarios, it introduces realistic stakes, conflicts, and consequences often avoided by standard RLHF-aligned models. Trained using a curated blend of adventure, roleplay, and instructive fiction datasets, Wayfarer emphasizes tense storytelling, authentic player failure scenarios, and robust narrative immersion, making it uniquely suited for interactive fiction and gaming experiences.

description.zh_CN: LFM2-24B-A2B 是 Liquid AI 第二代混合架构系列中最大的模型，融合了多种序列建模技术，在长上下文理解和推理任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: LFM2-24B-A2B is the largest model in Liquid AI's second-generation hybrid architecture series, combining multiple sequence modeling techniques for outstanding performance in long-context understanding and reasoning tasks.

description.zh_CN: LFM2 2.6B 是 Liquid AI 新一代轻量混合架构模型，专为设备端高效推理设计，在极低资源下提供良好的文本理解和生成能力。
description.en_US: LFM2 2.6B is Liquid AI's next-generation lightweight hybrid architecture model designed for efficient on-device inference, providing solid text understanding and generation capabilities under extremely low resources.

description.zh_CN: LFM2.5 1.2B 是 Liquid AI 的超紧凑高性能指令调优模型，免费访问，在极小参数量下实现出色的任务执行能力，适合边缘设备探索场景。
description.en_US: LFM2.5 1.2B is Liquid AI's ultra-compact high-performance instruction-tuned model, available for free, achieving excellent task execution at an extremely small parameter count, suitable for edge device exploration scenarios.

description.zh_CN: LFM2.5 1.2B Thinking 是 Liquid AI 面向代理推理优化的轻量推理模型，免费访问，以极小尺寸提供基本的推理链能力，适合轻量化推理探索。
description.en_US: LFM2.5 1.2B Thinking is Liquid AI's lightweight reasoning model optimized for agentic reasoning, available for free, providing basic chain-of-thought capabilities at an extremely small size for lightweight reasoning exploration.

description.zh_CN: Liquid LFM 3B 是 Liquid 的 3B 语言模型，在同等规模中表现卓越，在多项基准上可与 Phi-3.5-mini 媲美，采用 Liquid Foundation Model 架构。
description.en_US: Liquid's LFM 3B delivers incredible performance for its size. It positions itself as first place among 3B parameter transformers, hybrids, and RNN models It is also on par with Phi-3.5-mini on multiple benchmarks, while being 18.4% smaller. LFM-3B is the ideal choice for mobile and other edge text-based applications. See the launch announcement for benchmarks and more info.

description.zh_CN: Liquid LFM 40B MoE 是 Liquid 的 40.3B 混合专家模型，采用动态系统计算单元构建，在通用 AI 任务上表现全面，支持长上下文与高效推理。
description.en_US: Liquid's 40.3B Mixture of Experts (MoE) model. Liquid Foundation Models (LFMs) are large neural networks built with computational units rooted in dynamic systems. LFMs are general-purpose AI models that can be used to model any kind of sequential data, including video, audio, text, time series, and signals. See the launch announcement for benchmarks and more info.

description.zh_CN: Liquid LFM 7B 是 Liquid 的旗舰 7B 语言模型，在对话能力上表现卓越，支持阿拉伯语、日语等多语言，采用 LFM 架构实现高效推理。
description.en_US: LFM-7B, a new best-in-class language model. LFM-7B is designed for exceptional chat capabilities, including languages like Arabic and Japanese. Powered by the Liquid Foundation Model (LFM) architecture, it exhibits unique features like low memory footprint and fast inference speed. LFM-7B is the world’s best-in-class multilingual language model in English, Arabic, and Japanese. See the launch announcement for benchmarks and more info.

description.zh_CN: LFM2-8B-A1B 是 Liquid AI 高效设备端 MoE 混合架构模型，以少量激活参数在设备端提供出色的推理性能，适合资源受限的本地部署场景。
description.en_US: LFM2-8B-A1B is Liquid AI's efficient on-device MoE hybrid architecture model, delivering excellent inference performance on-device with few active parameters, suitable for resource-constrained local deployment scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Luma AI 视频生成模型，物理模拟出色、运动自然，支持自然语言视频编辑，适合创意短片与动态内容制作。
description.en_US: Luma AI video generation model with strong physics simulation and natural motion. Supports natural language video editing for creative shorts and dynamic content.

description.zh_CN: Weaver 是 Mancer AI 尝试还原 Claude 风格详尽表达的创意写作模型，在叙事丰富性和角色对话上有独特优势，适合需要细腻文学表达的创作场景。
description.en_US: Weaver is Mancer AI's creative writing model attempting to replicate Claude-style verbosity, with unique advantages in narrative richness and character dialogue, suitable for creative scenarios requiring nuanced literary expression.

description.zh_CN: LongCat Flash Chat 是美团的 560B MoE 超长上下文快速对话模型，支持百万级 token 上下文窗口，在长文档理解和多轮长对话任务上具备显著优势。
description.en_US: LongCat Flash Chat is Meituan's 560B MoE ultra-long-context fast conversational model, supporting million-level token context windows with significant advantages in long-document understanding and multi-turn extended dialogue tasks.

description.zh_CN: CodeLlama 34B Instruct 是 Meta 基于 Llama 2 构建的 34B 代码专用指令模型，擅长代码填充、长上下文处理和多步推理，支持多种编程语言。
description.en_US: Code Llama is built upon Llama 2 and excels at filling in code, handling extensive input contexts, and following programming instructions without prior training for various programming tasks.

description.zh_CN: CodeLlama 70B Instruct 是 Meta CodeLlama 家族参数量最大的代码模型，在代码生成、补全和调试方面具有最强性能表现。
description.en_US: Code Llama is a family of large language models for code. This one is based on Llama 2 70B and provides zero-shot instruction-following ability for programming tasks.

description.zh_CN: Llama 2 13B Chat 是 Meta 的 130 亿参数对话语言模型，经过指令微调，适合通用对话、问答和文本生成场景。
description.en_US: A 13 billion parameter language model from Meta, fine tuned for chat completions

description.zh_CN: Llama 2 70B Chat 是 Meta Llama 2 系列旗舰对话模型，以 700 亿参数提供强大的文本理解和生成能力，曾是开源模型的重要标杆。
description.en_US: The flagship, 70 billion parameter language model from Meta, fine tuned for chat completions. Llama 2 is an auto-regressive language model that uses an optimized transformer architecture. The tuned versions use supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF) to align to human preferences for helpfulness and safety.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 70B (Base) 是 Meta Llama 3 系列的 70B 参数基础预训练模型，具备强大的语言理解能力，适合研究和下游微调使用。
description.en_US: Meta's latest class of model (Llama 3) launched with a variety of sizes & flavors. This is the base 70B pre-trained version. It has demonstrated strong performance compared to leading closed-source models in human evaluations. To read more about the model release, click here. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 70B 是 Meta 第三代大型开源语言模型的旗舰指令版，在推理、代码和对话任务上表现出色，支持 8K token 上下文，适合各类通用任务。
description.en_US: Llama 3 70B is Meta's flagship instruction-tuned version of the third-generation large open-source language model, excelling in reasoning, coding, and conversational tasks with 8K token context, suitable for general-purpose use.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 8B (Base) 是 Meta Llama 3 系列的 8B 参数基础预训练模型，轻量高效，适合作为研究和下游微调的基础。
description.en_US: Meta's latest class of model (Llama 3) launched with a variety of sizes & flavors. This is the base 8B pre-trained version. It has demonstrated strong performance compared to leading closed-source models in human evaluations. To read more about the model release, click here. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 8B 是 Meta 第三代开源语言模型的轻量指令版，在低资源场景下提供可靠的推理和对话能力，支持 8K token 上下文，适合本地部署。
description.en_US: Llama 3 8B is Meta's lightweight instruction-tuned version of the third-generation open-source language model, providing reliable reasoning and conversational capabilities in low-resource scenarios with 8K token context.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 405B 是 Meta 开源系列中参数量最大的基础版本，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口，适合需要强大基础能力的研究和下游微调场景。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 405B is the largest base version in Meta's open-source series with a 128K token context window, suitable for research and downstream fine-tuning scenarios requiring powerful foundational capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 405B Instruct 是 Meta 最大开源指令调优模型，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口，在推理、代码和多语言任务上表现卓越，适合高质量生产场景。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 405B Instruct is Meta's largest open-source instruction-tuned model with a 128K token context window, excelling in reasoning, coding, and multilingual tasks for high-quality production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 70B 是 Meta 开源系列的中型指令调优模型，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口，在推理和对话任务上取得性能与成本的良好平衡。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 70B is Meta's mid-size instruction-tuned model with a 128K token context window, achieving a good balance between performance and cost in reasoning and conversational tasks.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 8B 是 Meta 开源系列的轻量指令调优模型，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口，适合资源受限场景下的高效文本处理任务。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 8B is Meta's lightweight instruction-tuned model with a 128K token context window, suitable for efficient text processing tasks in resource-constrained scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.2 11B Vision 是 Meta 的多模态视觉语言指令模型，支持图像输入，在图像描述、视觉问答和文档理解任务上表现出色，适合轻量视觉 AI 应用。
description.en_US: Llama 3.2 11B Vision is Meta's multimodal vision-language instruction model supporting image input, excelling in image captioning, visual question answering, and document understanding tasks for lightweight visual AI applications.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.2 1B 是 Meta 迄今最小的开源指令语言模型，专注于设备端高效推理，适合边缘计算和对资源要求极低的轻量 NLP 任务。
description.en_US: Llama 3.2 1B is Meta's smallest open-source instruction language model to date, focused on efficient on-device inference, suitable for edge computing and lightweight NLP tasks with minimal resource requirements.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.2 3B 是 Meta 的小型多语言开源指令模型，支持多种语言的文本推理和摘要任务，适合资源受限的本地部署和边缘场景。
description.en_US: Llama 3.2 3B is Meta's small multilingual open-source instruction model supporting text reasoning and summarization across multiple languages, suitable for resource-constrained local deployment and edge scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.2 3B 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Llama 3.2 3B, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.2 90B Vision Instruct 是 Meta 的 900 亿参数多模态指令模型，具备强大的视觉理解能力，在图像分析和视觉问答方面表现顶尖。
description.en_US: The Llama 90B Vision model is a top-tier, 90-billion-parameter multimodal model designed for the most challenging visual reasoning and language tasks. It offers unparalleled accuracy in image captioning, visual question answering, and advanced image-text comprehension. Pre-trained on vast multimodal datasets and fine-tuned with human feedback, the Llama 90B Vision is engineered to handle the most demanding image-based AI tasks. This model is perfect for industries requiring cutting-edge multimodal AI capabilities, particularly those dealing with complex, real-time visual and textual analysis. Click here for the original model card. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.3 70B 是 Meta 最新一代多语言大模型，在代码生成、推理和多语言理解任务上超越 Llama 3.1 405B，性价比极高，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Llama 3.3 70B is Meta's latest-generation multilingual large model, outperforming Llama 3.1 405B on code generation, reasoning, and multilingual understanding tasks at a fraction of the cost, with 128K token context.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.3 70B 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Llama 3.3 70B, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.3 8B Instruct 是 Llama 3.3 70B 的轻量快速变体，在需要快速响应的场景中以紧凑参数提供良好的指令遵循能力。
description.en_US: A lightweight and ultra-fast variant of Llama 3.3 70B, for use when quick response times are needed most.

description.zh_CN: Llama 4 Maverick 是 Meta 的 17B 参数高容量多模态语言模型（128 专家 MoE），在多模态推理和理解任务上表现卓越，支持文本和图像输入，是 Meta 旗舰多模态产品。
description.en_US: Llama 4 Maverick is Meta's 17B parameter high-capacity multimodal language model (128-expert MoE), excelling in multimodal reasoning and understanding tasks, supporting text and image inputs as Meta's flagship multimodal offering.

description.zh_CN: Llama 4 Scout 是 Meta 的 17B 参数 16 专家 MoE 多模态语言模型，支持高达 1000 万 token 的超长上下文，是目前上下文窗口最大的开源模型之一。
description.en_US: Llama 4 Scout is Meta's 17B parameter 16-expert MoE multimodal language model supporting up to 10M token context, one of the largest context windows among open-source models currently available.

description.zh_CN: LlamaGuard 2 8B 是 Meta 的 8B 内容安全分类模型，专为检测对话中的不安全内容设计，支持输入输出双向过滤，适合构建负责任 AI 应用的安全护栏。
description.en_US: LlamaGuard 2 8B is Meta's 8B content safety classification model designed for detecting unsafe content in conversations, supporting bidirectional input/output filtering, suitable for building safety guardrails in responsible AI applications.

description.zh_CN: LlamaGuard 3 8B 是 Meta 第三代 8B 内容安全模型，在安全分类准确性上超越前代，支持更广泛的有害内容类别检测，适合企业级 AI 安全防护。
description.en_US: LlamaGuard 3 8B is Meta's third-generation 8B content safety model, surpassing its predecessor in safety classification accuracy with support for a broader range of harmful content category detection for enterprise-grade AI safety.

description.zh_CN: LlamaGuard 4 12B 是 Meta 最新一代 12B 内容安全模型，在多模态内容安全分类上表现卓越，支持文本和图像内容的双向安全过滤，是构建安全 AI 系统的重要工具。
description.en_US: LlamaGuard 4 12B is Meta's latest 12B content safety model, excelling in multimodal content safety classification with bidirectional text and image safety filtering, an essential tool for building safe AI systems.

description.zh_CN: MAI DS R1 是微软 AI 团队基于 DeepSeek-R1 后训练的变体，在保持原有推理能力的同时改善了对部分敏感话题的响应性并增强安全属性。
description.en_US: MAI-DS-R1 is a post-trained variant of DeepSeek-R1 developed by the Microsoft AI team to improve the model’s responsiveness on previously blocked topics while enhancing its safety profile. Built on top of DeepSeek-R1’s reasoning foundation, it integrates 110k examples from the Tulu-3 SFT dataset and 350k internally curated multilingual safety-alignment samples. The model retains strong reasoning, coding, and problem-solving capabilities, while unblocking a wide range of prompts previously restricted in R1. MAI-DS-R1 demonstrates improved performance on harm mitigation benchmarks and maintains competitive results across general reasoning tasks. It surpasses R1-1776 in satisfaction metrics for blocked queries and reduces leakage in harmful content categories. The model is based on a transformer MoE architecture and is suitable for general-purpose use cases, excluding high-stakes domains such as legal, medical, or autonomous systems.

description.zh_CN: Phi 3 Medium 128K Instruct 是微软的 140 亿参数模型，支持 12.8 万 token 超长上下文，在语言理解、推理和指令遵循上表现优秀，经 SFT 与偏好优化。
description.en_US: Phi-3 128K Medium is a powerful 14-billion parameter model designed for advanced language understanding, reasoning, and instruction following. Optimized through supervised fine-tuning and preference adjustments, it excels in tasks involving common sense, mathematics, logical reasoning, and code processing. At time of release, Phi-3 Medium demonstrated state-of-the-art performance among lightweight models. In the MMLU-Pro eval, the model even comes close to a Llama3 70B level of performance. For 4k context length, try Phi-3 Medium 4K.

description.zh_CN: Phi 3 Medium 4K Instruct 是微软的 140 亿参数模型，支持 4K 上下文，在高级语言理解、推理和指令遵循上表现突出。
description.en_US: Phi-3 4K Medium is a powerful 14-billion parameter model designed for advanced language understanding, reasoning, and instruction following. Optimized through supervised fine-tuning and preference adjustments, it excels in tasks involving common sense, mathematics, logical reasoning, and code processing. At time of release, Phi-3 Medium demonstrated state-of-the-art performance among lightweight models. In the MMLU-Pro eval, the model even comes close to a Llama3 70B level of performance. For 128k context length, try Phi-3 Medium 128K.

description.zh_CN: Phi 3 Mini 128K Instruct 是微软的 38 亿参数轻量模型，支持 12.8 万 token 超长上下文，经 SFT 与偏好优化，在语言理解与推理上表现优秀。
description.en_US: Phi-3 Mini is a powerful 3.8B parameter model designed for advanced language understanding, reasoning, and instruction following. Optimized through supervised fine-tuning and preference adjustments, it excels in tasks involving common sense, mathematics, logical reasoning, and code processing. At time of release, Phi-3 Medium demonstrated state-of-the-art performance among lightweight models. This model is static, trained on an offline dataset with an October 2023 cutoff date.

description.zh_CN: Phi 3.5 Mini 128K Instruct 是微软的轻量级先进开源模型，基于 Phi 3 数据集训练，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文，在推理与代码任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Phi-3.5 models are lightweight, state-of-the-art open models. These models were trained with Phi-3 datasets that include both synthetic data and the filtered, publicly available websites data, with a focus on high quality and reasoning-dense properties. Phi-3.5 Mini uses 3.8B parameters, and is a dense decoder-only transformer model using the same tokenizer as Phi-3 Mini. The models underwent a rigorous enhancement process, incorporating both supervised fine-tuning, proximal policy optimization, and direct preference optimization to ensure precise instruction adherence and robust safety measures. When assessed against benchmarks that test common sense, language understanding, math, code, long context and logical reasoning, Phi-3.5 models showcased robust and state-of-the-art performance among models with less than 13 billion parameters.

description.zh_CN: Phi-4 是微软的 14B 高效推理语言模型，专注于复杂推理任务，在数学和编码基准上表现出远超同参数规模的能力，适合高质量推理场景。
description.en_US: Phi-4 is Microsoft's 14B efficient reasoning language model focused on complex reasoning tasks, demonstrating capabilities far beyond its parameter scale on mathematics and coding benchmarks, suitable for high-quality reasoning scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Phi 4 Multimodal Instruct 是微软的 56 亿参数多模态基础模型，在文本与视觉输入上具备先进推理与指令遵循能力，适合多模态对话与视觉问答。
description.en_US: Phi-4 Multimodal Instruct is a versatile 5.6B parameter foundation model that combines advanced reasoning and instruction-following capabilities across both text and visual inputs, providing accurate text outputs. The unified architecture enables efficient, low-latency inference, suitable for edge and mobile deployments. Phi-4 Multimodal Instruct supports text inputs in multiple languages including Arabic, Chinese, English, French, German, Japanese, Spanish, and more, with visual input optimized primarily for English. It delivers impressive performance on multimodal tasks involving mathematical, scientific, and document reasoning, providing developers and enterprises a powerful yet compact model for sophisticated interactive applications. For more information, see the Phi-4 Multimodal blog post.

description.zh_CN: Phi 4 Reasoning 是微软的 140 亿参数密集解码器模型，从 Phi-4 微调以增强复杂推理能力，结合 SFT 与偏好优化，在数学与代码推理上表现突出。
description.en_US: Phi-4-reasoning is a 14B parameter dense decoder-only transformer developed by Microsoft, fine-tuned from Phi-4 to enhance complex reasoning capabilities. It uses a combination of supervised fine-tuning on chain-of-thought traces and reinforcement learning, targeting math, science, and code reasoning tasks. With a 32k context window and high inference efficiency, it is optimized for structured responses in a two-part format: reasoning trace followed by a final solution. The model achieves strong results on specialized benchmarks such as AIME, OmniMath, and LiveCodeBench, outperforming many larger models in structured reasoning tasks. It is released under the MIT license and intended for use in latency-constrained, English-only environments requiring reliable step-by-step logic. Recommended usage includes ChatML prompts and structured reasoning format for best results.

description.zh_CN: Phi 4 Reasoning Plus 是微软的增强版 140 亿参数模型，从 Phi-4 微调并加入强化学习，在数学、科学和代码推理任务上进一步提升准确性。
description.en_US: Phi-4-reasoning-plus is an enhanced 14B parameter model from Microsoft, fine-tuned from Phi-4 with additional reinforcement learning to boost accuracy on math, science, and code reasoning tasks. It uses the same dense decoder-only transformer architecture as Phi-4, but generates longer, more comprehensive outputs structured into a step-by-step reasoning trace and final answer. While it offers improved benchmark scores over Phi-4-reasoning across tasks like AIME, OmniMath, and HumanEvalPlus, its responses are typically ~50% longer, resulting in higher latency. Designed for English-only applications, it is well-suited for structured reasoning workflows where output quality takes priority over response speed.

description.zh_CN: WizardLM 2 7B 是微软 AI Wizard 系列的轻量版本，在速度与性能上可与 10 倍规模的开源领先模型媲美，基于 Llama 3.1 8B 微调。
description.en_US: WizardLM-2 7B is the smaller variant of Microsoft AI's latest Wizard model. It is the fastest and achieves comparable performance with existing 10x larger opensource leading models It is a finetune of Mistral 7B Instruct, using the same technique as WizardLM-2 8x22B. To read more about the model release, click here.

description.zh_CN: WizardLM-2 8x22B 是微软的高性能 MoE 创意推理模型，在创意写作、多轮对话和复杂推理任务上表现出色，是 WizardLM 系列的旗舰版本。
description.en_US: WizardLM-2 8x22B is Microsoft's high-performance MoE creative reasoning model, excelling in creative writing, multi-turn dialogue, and complex reasoning tasks as the flagship of the WizardLM series.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax 海螺 2.3 视频生成模型，性价比高、成本可控，动漫风格支持好，适合成本敏感的中小企业与创作者。
description.en_US: MiniMax Hailuo 2.3 video generation model with high cost-effectiveness and strong anime-style support. Suitable for cost-sensitive SMBs and creators.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax-01 是 MiniMax 的旗舰多模态语言模型，支持 100 万 token 超长上下文，采用混合注意力架构，在长文档理解和多模态分析任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: MiniMax-01 is MiniMax's flagship multimodal language model supporting 1M token context with a hybrid attention architecture, excelling in long-document understanding and multimodal analysis tasks.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax-M1 是 MiniMax 的推理专属旗舰模型，支持 100 万 token 上下文，通过强化学习提升推理能力，在数学和代码推理任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: MiniMax-M1 is MiniMax's flagship reasoning model supporting 1M token context, with enhanced reasoning capabilities through reinforcement learning, excelling in mathematical and code reasoning tasks.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax-M2 是 MiniMax 新一代旗舰语言模型，在推理、代码和通用任务上全面超越 M1，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: MiniMax-M2 is MiniMax's next-generation flagship language model, comprehensively surpassing M1 in reasoning, coding, and general tasks, supporting 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax-M2 Her 是 MiniMax-M2 的增强变体，针对特定场景进行了额外优化，支持 100 万 token 超长上下文，适合需要高质量输出的专业应用。
description.en_US: MiniMax-M2 Her is an enhanced variant of MiniMax-M2 with additional optimization for specific scenarios, supporting 1M token context, suitable for professional applications requiring high-quality output.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax-M2.1 是 MiniMax-M2 的迭代更新版本，在推理和多轮对话能力上进一步提升，支持 100 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: MiniMax-M2.1 is an iterative update of MiniMax-M2 with further improvements in reasoning and multi-turn conversational capabilities, supporting 1M token context.

description.zh_CN: MiniMax-M2.5 是 MiniMax 最新旗舰模型，在推理、视觉和代码任务上达到最高性能，支持 100 万 token 上下文，综合能力全面领先前代。
description.en_US: MiniMax-M2.5 is MiniMax's latest flagship model, achieving the highest performance in reasoning, visual, and code tasks, supporting 1M token context with comprehensively superior capabilities over previous generations.

description.zh_CN: Codestral 2501 是 Mistral AI 专为编程任务打造的代码专用模型，擅长低延迟代码生成、填充和修复，支持 80 余种编程语言。
description.en_US: Mistral's cutting-edge language model for coding. Codestral specializes in low-latency, high-frequency tasks such as fill-in-the-middle (FIM), code correction and test generation. Learn more on their blog post: https://mistral.ai/news/codestral-2501/

description.zh_CN: Codestral 2508 是 Mistral AI 最新代码生成专属模型，在代码补全、生成和调试任务上性能领先，支持多种编程语言，适合专业软件开发场景。
description.en_US: Codestral 2508 is Mistral AI's latest code generation model, leading in code completion, generation, and debugging tasks across multiple programming languages, suitable for professional software development scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Codestral Embed 2505 是 Mistral 专为代码设计的语义嵌入模型，适合代码相似度比对、代码搜索和 RAG 应用场景。
description.en_US: Mistral Codestral Embed is specially designed for code, perfect for embedding code databases, repositories, and powering coding assistants with state-of-the-art retrieval.

description.zh_CN: Codestral Mamba 是 Mistral 基于 Mamba 架构的 7.3B 参数代码推理模型，支持线性时间序列预测，适合代码和推理任务的高效处理。
description.en_US: A 7.3B parameter Mamba-based model designed for code and reasoning tasks. - Linear time inference, allowing for theoretically infinite sequence lengths - 256k token context window - Optimized for quick responses, especially beneficial for code productivity - Performs comparably to state-of-the-art transformer models in code and reasoning tasks - Available under the Apache 2.0 license for free use, modification, and distribution

description.zh_CN: Devstral 2512 是 Mistral AI 与 All Hands AI 合作开发的开发代理专属模型，在软件工程代理任务上表现卓越，专为长流程代码编写和问题修复设计。
description.en_US: Devstral 2512 is a development agent model co-developed by Mistral AI and All Hands AI, excelling in software engineering agent tasks, designed specifically for long-horizon code writing and issue fixing.

description.zh_CN: Devstral Medium 是 Mistral AI 的中型软件开发代理模型，在代码生成和工程任务上提供良好的性能与成本平衡，适合中等规模的代理代码场景。
description.en_US: Devstral Medium is Mistral AI's mid-size software development agent model, offering a good performance-cost balance in code generation and engineering tasks, suitable for medium-scale agentic coding scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Devstral Small 是 Mistral AI 的轻量软件开发代理模型，以较低成本提供代码生成和修复能力，适合高频代码辅助场景。
description.en_US: Devstral Small is Mistral AI's lightweight software development agent model, providing code generation and fixing capabilities at lower cost, suitable for high-frequency code assistance scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Devstral Small 2505 是基于 Mistral Small 微调的 24B 参数智能体 LLM，专为软件工程任务设计，在代码生成、调试和智能体工作流中表现出色。
description.en_US: Devstral-Small-2505 is a 24B parameter agentic LLM fine-tuned from Mistral-Small-3.1, jointly developed by Mistral AI and All Hands AI for advanced software engineering tasks. It is optimized for codebase exploration, multi-file editing, and integration into coding agents, achieving state-of-the-art results on SWE-Bench Verified (46.8%). Devstral supports a 128k context window and uses a custom Tekken tokenizer. It is text-only, with the vision encoder removed, and is suitable for local deployment on high-end consumer hardware (e.g., RTX 4090, 32GB RAM Macs). Devstral is best used in agentic workflows via the OpenHands scaffold and is compatible with inference frameworks like vLLM, Transformers, and Ollama. It is released under the Apache 2.0 license.

description.zh_CN: Magistral Medium 2506 是 Mistral 首款推理模型，专注通用用途推理，结合深度思考与多语言能力，适合需要严密逻辑分析的复杂任务。
description.en_US: Magistral is Mistral's first reasoning model. It is ideal for general purpose use requiring longer thought processing and better accuracy than with non-reasoning LLMs. From legal research and financial forecasting to software development and creative storytelling — this model solves multi-step challenges where transparency and precision are critical.

description.zh_CN: Magistral Small 2506 是基于 Mistral Small 的 24B 参数推理指令微调模型，支持深度思考模式，以轻量规模实现高质量推理。
description.en_US: Magistral Small is a 24B parameter instruction-tuned model based on Mistral-Small-3.1 (2503), enhanced through supervised fine-tuning on traces from Magistral Medium and further refined via reinforcement learning. It is optimized for reasoning and supports a wide multilingual range, including over 20 languages.

description.zh_CN: Ministral 3 14B 是 Ministral 3 系列中最大的模型，在低延迟场景下提供接近旗舰级的推理能力，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Ministral 3 14B is the largest model in the Ministral 3 series, offering near-flagship-level reasoning capabilities in low-latency scenarios with 128K token context.

description.zh_CN: Ministral 3B 是 Mistral 专为设备端和边缘计算优化的 3B 参数模型，在低资源环境中提供高效的本地推理能力。
description.en_US: Ministral 3B is a 3B parameter model optimized for on-device and edge computing. It excels in knowledge, commonsense reasoning, and function-calling, outperforming larger models like Mistral 7B on most benchmarks. Supporting up to 128k context length, it’s ideal for orchestrating agentic workflows and specialist tasks with efficient inference.

description.zh_CN: Ministral 3 3B 是 Ministral 3 系列中最小最快的版本，在极低成本下提供可靠的文本处理能力，适合边缘部署和高频简单任务场景。
description.en_US: Ministral 3 3B is the smallest and fastest model in the Ministral 3 series, providing reliable text processing capabilities at minimal cost, suitable for edge deployment and high-frequency simple task scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Ministral 8B 是 Mistral 的 8B 参数模型，采用交错滑动窗口注意力机制，在高效推理的同时具备较强的多语言理解能力。
description.en_US: Ministral 8B is an 8B parameter model featuring a unique interleaved sliding-window attention pattern for faster, memory-efficient inference. Designed for edge use cases, it supports up to 128k context length and excels in knowledge and reasoning tasks. It outperforms peers in the sub-10B category, making it perfect for low-latency, privacy-first applications.

description.zh_CN: Ministral 3 8B 是 Ministral 3 系列的均衡版本，在性能和成本之间取得良好平衡，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文，适合多种生产场景。
description.en_US: Ministral 3 8B is the balanced version of the Ministral 3 series, achieving a good balance between performance and cost with 128K token context, suitable for various production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Mistral 7B Instruct 是 Mistral AI 的 7.3B 参数基础指令模型，以高性价比实现良好的语言理解和代码生成能力，是工业界广泛采用的标准模型之一。
description.en_US: A high-performing, industry-standard 7.3B parameter model, with optimizations for speed and context length. *Mistral 7B Instruct has multiple version variants, and this is intended to be the latest version.*

description.zh_CN: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.1 是 Mistral AI 发布的首个指令调优模型，7.3B 参数下在多项基准上超越 Llama-2 13B，是开源社区影响深远的早期高性能模型。
description.en_US: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.1 is the first instruction-tuned model released by Mistral AI, surpassing Llama-2 13B on multiple benchmarks with only 7.3B parameters, an early high-performance model with lasting impact on the open-source community.

description.zh_CN: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.2 是 Mistral 7B Instruct 的改进版本，在指令遵循能力和对话质量方面进行了优化提升。
description.en_US: A high-performing, industry-standard 7.3B parameter model, with optimizations for speed and context length. An improved version of Mistral 7B Instruct, with the following changes: - 32k context window (vs 8k context in v0.1) - Rope-theta = 1e6 - No Sliding-Window Attention

description.zh_CN: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 是 Mistral 7B Instruct 系列的第三个主要版本，在对话能力和指令遵循方面进一步优化。
description.en_US: A high-performing, industry-standard 7.3B parameter model, with optimizations for speed and context length. An improved version of Mistral 7B Instruct v0.2, with the following changes: - Extended vocabulary to 32768 - Supports v3 Tokenizer - Supports function calling NOTE: Support for function calling depends on the provider.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Embed 2312 是 Mistral AI 的文本语义嵌入模型，专为语义搜索和文本相似度任务优化，提供高质量的文本向量表示。
description.en_US: Mistral Embed is a specialized embedding model for text data, optimized for semantic search and RAG applications. Developed by Mistral AI in late 2023, it produces 1024-dimensional vectors that effectively capture semantic relationships in text.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Large 是 Mistral AI 的旗舰模型（mistral-large-2407），在推理、代码和多语言任务上表现出色，支持工具调用，适合企业级复杂场景。
description.en_US: Mistral Large is Mistral AI's flagship model (mistral-large-2407), excelling in reasoning, coding, and multilingual tasks with tool calling support, suitable for enterprise-level complex scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Large 2 2407 是 Mistral AI 旗舰模型的 2024 年 7 月版本，在推理、多语言和代码任务上表现强劲，适合需要固定版本的生产部署。
description.en_US: Mistral Large 2 2407 is the July 2024 version of Mistral AI's flagship model, with strong performance in reasoning, multilingual, and coding tasks, suitable for production deployments requiring a pinned version.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Large 2 2411 是 Mistral Large 2 的 2024 年 11 月更新版本，在推理和代码任务上进一步提升，适合需要固定版本的企业部署。
description.en_US: Mistral Large 2 2411 is the November 2024 update of Mistral Large 2, with further improvements in reasoning and coding tasks, suitable for enterprise deployments requiring a pinned version.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Large 3 2512 是 Mistral AI 迄今最强旗舰模型，采用稀疏 MoE 架构，在编码、推理和多语言任务上全面领先，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Mistral Large 3 2512 is Mistral AI's most capable flagship model to date, using a sparse MoE architecture, leading comprehensively in coding, reasoning, and multilingual tasks with 128K token context.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Medium 是 Mistral AI 的闭源中型商业模型，在复杂任务处理上超越开源版本，提供更强大的语言理解和生成能力。
description.en_US: This is Mistral AI's closed-source, medium-sided model. It's powered by a closed-source prototype and excels at reasoning, code, JSON, chat, and more. In benchmarks, it compares with many of the flagship models of other companies.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Medium 3 是 Mistral AI 的企业级高性能语言模型，在性能与成本之间取得最佳平衡，在编码和推理任务上超越同类竞品，适合批量处理场景。
description.en_US: Mistral Medium 3 is Mistral AI's enterprise-grade high-performance language model, achieving the best performance-cost balance while surpassing comparable competitors in coding and reasoning tasks, suitable for batch processing scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Medium 3.1 是 Mistral Medium 3 的更新版，在多模态和推理能力上进一步提升，支持视觉输入，适合需要多模态能力的企业应用场景。
description.en_US: Mistral Medium 3.1 is an updated version of Mistral Medium 3 with further improvements in multimodal and reasoning capabilities, supporting visual input, suitable for enterprise application scenarios requiring multimodal capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Nemo 是 Mistral AI 与 NVIDIA 合作开发的 12B 模型，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口，在推理和多语言任务上远超同规模模型，性价比极高。
description.en_US: Mistral Nemo is a 12B model co-developed by Mistral AI and NVIDIA with a 128K token context window, far outperforming models of similar size in reasoning and multilingual tasks at excellent cost efficiency.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Saba 是 Mistral AI 针对中东和南亚地区语言（阿拉伯语等）专项优化的 24B 语言模型，在多语言理解和文化适应性上表现出色。
description.en_US: Mistral Saba is Mistral AI's 24B language model specifically optimized for Middle Eastern and South Asian languages (such as Arabic), excelling in multilingual understanding and cultural adaptability.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Small 是 Mistral AI 的 220 亿参数商用模型，在性能和效率之间取得均衡，适合各类通用语言处理场景。
description.en_US: With 22 billion parameters, Mistral Small v24.09 offers a convenient mid-point between (Mistral NeMo 12B)[/mistralai/mistral-nemo] and (Mistral Large 2)[/mistralai/mistral-large], providing a cost-effective solution that can be deployed across various platforms and environments. It has better reasoning, exhibits more capabilities, can produce and reason about code, and is multiligual, supporting English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Small 3 是 Mistral AI 针对低延迟场景优化的 24B 参数语言模型，在指令遵循和对话任务上性能出色，适合成本敏感的高频生产场景。
description.en_US: Mistral Small 3 is Mistral AI's 24B parameter language model optimized for low-latency scenarios, with excellent performance in instruction following and conversational tasks, suitable for cost-sensitive high-frequency production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Small 3.1 24B 是 Mistral Small 3 的升级版，新增视觉输入支持，在多模态理解和低延迟推理上进一步提升，同等成本下提供更强能力。
description.en_US: Mistral Small 3.1 24B is an upgraded version of Mistral Small 3, adding visual input support with further improvements in multimodal understanding and low-latency inference, delivering stronger capabilities at the same cost.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Small 3.1 24B 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Mistral Small 3.1 24B, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Small 3.2 24B 是 Mistral AI 最新小型模型，在指令遵循、视觉理解和代码任务上进一步优化，是同尺寸模型中性价比最高的选择之一。
description.en_US: Mistral Small 3.2 24B is Mistral AI's latest small model with further optimization in instruction following, visual understanding, and coding tasks, one of the best value-for-money choices among same-size models.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Small Creative 是 Mistral AI 专为创意写作设计的实验性小型模型，在故事创作、诗歌生成和创意对话上表现突出，适合创意内容生成场景。
description.en_US: Mistral Small Creative is Mistral AI's experimental small model designed specifically for creative writing, excelling in story creation, poetry generation, and creative dialogue, suitable for creative content generation scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Mistral Tiny 是 Mistral 的早期轻量模型，现已被更新的 Ministral 系列取代，适合低资源文本处理场景。
description.en_US: Note: This model is being deprecated. Recommended replacement is the newer Ministral 8B This model is currently powered by Mistral-7B-v0.2, and incorporates a "better" fine-tuning than Mistral 7B, inspired by community work. It's best used for large batch processing tasks where cost is a significant factor but reasoning capabilities are not crucial.

description.zh_CN: Mixtral 8x22B (base) 是 Mistral AI 的大规模混合专家基础模型，拥有 8 个 220 亿参数专家网络，具备强大的代码生成和推理能力。
description.en_US: Mixtral 8x22B is a large-scale language model from Mistral AI. It consists of 8 experts, each 22 billion parameters, with each token using 2 experts at a time. It was released via X.

description.zh_CN: Mixtral 8x22B Instruct 是 Mistral AI 的大型稀疏 MoE 指令模型，拥有 1410 亿总参数和 390 亿激活参数，在代码生成和推理任务上表现卓越，支持 6 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Mixtral 8x22B Instruct is Mistral AI's large sparse MoE instruction model with 141B total and 39B active parameters, excelling in code generation and reasoning tasks with 64K token context.

description.zh_CN: Mixtral 8x7B Instruct 是 Mistral AI 的稀疏 MoE 指令模型，以 560 亿总参数实现接近 700 亿密集模型的性能，在多语言和代码任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: Mixtral 8x7B Instruct is Mistral AI's sparse MoE instruction model, achieving performance close to 70B dense models with 56B total parameters, excelling in multilingual and coding tasks.

description.zh_CN: Pixtral 12B 是 Mistral AI 首款文图多模态模型，权重开放，能够处理混合图文输入，在视觉理解和多模态对话中表现出色。
description.en_US: The first multi-modal, text+image-to-text model from Mistral AI. Its weights were launched via torrent: https://x.com/mistralai/status/1833758285167722836.

description.zh_CN: Pixtral Large 是 Mistral AI 的 124B 参数开放权重多模态旗舰，基于 Mistral Large 2 构建并新增视觉能力，在图像理解和文档分析任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Pixtral Large is Mistral AI's 124B parameter open-weight multimodal flagship built on Mistral Large 2 with added visual capabilities, excelling in image understanding and document analysis tasks.

description.zh_CN: Voxtral Small 24B 是 Mistral AI 在 Mistral Small 3 基础上集成语音理解能力的多模态模型，支持音频和文本输入，适合需要语音文字混合处理的场景。
description.en_US: Voxtral Small 24B is Mistral AI's multimodal model integrating speech understanding capabilities into Mistral Small 3, supporting audio and text inputs, suitable for scenarios requiring combined speech and text processing.

description.zh_CN: Kimi Dev 72B 是月之暗面专为软件工程场景优化的 72B 开源大语言模型，在代码调试、补丁生成和软件开发全流程中表现出色。
description.en_US: Kimi-Dev-72B is an open-source large language model fine-tuned for software engineering and issue resolution tasks. Based on Qwen2.5-72B, it is optimized using large-scale reinforcement learning that applies code patches in real repositories and validates them via full test suite execution—rewarding only correct, robust completions. The model achieves 60.4% on SWE-bench Verified, setting a new benchmark among open-source models for software bug fixing and code reasoning.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2 是 Moonshot AI 的强大通用语言模型，在长文档处理和复杂分析任务上表现突出，支持约 13 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Kimi K2 is Moonshot AI's powerful general-purpose language model excelling in long-document processing and complex analysis tasks, supporting ~131K token context.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2 的 2025 年 9 月 5 日固定版本，适合需要稳定模型行为的生产场景，支持 13 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: The September 5, 2025 pinned version of Kimi K2, suitable for production scenarios requiring stable model behavior with 131K token context.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2（2025-09-05 版本）的固定提供商版本，锁定特定推理节点以确保服务稳定性，完整保留 Kimi K2 的超长上下文能力（26 万 token）和强大的智能体推理能力。
description.en_US: A provider-locked variant of Kimi K2 (2025-09-05), pinned to a specific inference provider to ensure consistent service quality. Retains the full capabilities of Kimi K2 including its 262K context window and strong agentic reasoning.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2 的深度思考模式版本，通过扩展推理链处理复杂数学和逻辑推理任务，适合需要高精度分析的高难度场景。
description.en_US: The deep thinking mode version of Kimi K2, handling complex mathematical and logical reasoning tasks through extended reasoning chains, suitable for high-difficulty scenarios requiring high-precision analysis.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2.5 是 Moonshot AI 最新旗舰模型，支持 26 万 token 上下文和多模态输入，在长文档理解和工具调用任务上表现卓越，具备深度思考能力。
description.en_US: Kimi K2.5 is Moonshot AI's latest flagship model supporting 262K token context and multimodal input, excelling in long-document comprehension and tool calling tasks with deep thinking capability.

description.zh_CN: Kimi VL A3B Thinking 是月之暗面发布的轻量级 MoE 视觉语言模型，支持深度思考模式，以极低激活参数实现视觉理解和多语言场景的高性能。
description.en_US: Kimi-VL is a lightweight Mixture-of-Experts vision-language model that activates only 2.8B parameters per step while delivering strong performance on multimodal reasoning and long-context tasks. The Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking variant, fine-tuned with chain-of-thought and reinforcement learning, excels in math and visual reasoning benchmarks like MathVision, MMMU, and MathVista, rivaling much larger models such as Qwen2.5-VL-7B and Gemma-3-12B. It supports 128K context and high-resolution input via its MoonViT encoder.

description.zh_CN: Moonlight 16B A3B Instruct 是月之暗面开源的 16B MoE 架构语言模型，仅激活 3B 参数，通过 MuonClip 优化器训练，在语言理解和代码任务上表现均衡。
description.en_US: Moonlight-16B-A3B-Instruct is a 16B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model developed by Moonshot AI. It is optimized for instruction-following tasks with 3B activated parameters per inference. The model advances the Pareto frontier in performance per FLOP across English, coding, math, and Chinese benchmarks. It outperforms comparable models like Llama3-3B and Deepseek-v2-Lite while maintaining efficient deployment capabilities through Hugging Face integration and compatibility with popular inference engines like vLLM12.

description.zh_CN: Morph Apply 是专为代码补丁设计的 LLM，可将 GPT-4o、Claude 等模型的建议编辑直接合并到源文件，支持 4000+ token/秒的高效应用。
description.en_US: Morph Apply is a specialized code-patching LLM that merges AI-suggested edits straight into your source files. It can apply updates from GPT-4o, Claude, and others into your files at 4000+ tokens per second. The model requires the prompt to be in the following format: ${originalCode}\n${updateSnippet} Learn more about this model in their documentation

description.zh_CN: Morph V3 Fast 是 Morph 专为代码编辑应用优化的快速模型，以约 10500 token/秒的高速和 96% 准确率进行代码补丁应用，适合需要极低延迟的代码编辑场景。
description.en_US: Morph V3 Fast is Morph's fast model optimized for code editing applications, applying code patches at ~10,500 tokens/sec with 96% accuracy, suitable for code editing scenarios requiring minimal latency.

description.zh_CN: Morph V3 Large 是 Morph 的高精度代码编辑模型，以约 4500 token/秒的速度处理复杂代码编辑任务，在准确性上超越 Fast 版本，适合对代码质量要求较高的场景。
description.en_US: Morph V3 Large is Morph's high-accuracy code editing model, processing complex code editing tasks at ~4,500 tokens/sec with higher accuracy than the Fast version, suitable for scenarios with higher code quality requirements.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 Nemotron 70B 是 NVIDIA 基于 Llama 3.1 70B 经 RLHF 优化的指令模型，专为生成精准、有用、安全的响应设计，在 MT-Bench 上表现出色，适合高质量企业场景。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 Nemotron 70B is NVIDIA's RLHF-optimized instruction model based on Llama 3.1 70B, designed for generating precise, helpful, and safe responses, with outstanding MT-Bench performance for high-quality enterprise scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 Nemotron Nano 8B v1 是基于 Meta Llama 3.1 8B Instruct 的紧凑模型，针对推理、对话、RAG 和工具调用优化，适合边缘与低延迟场景。
description.en_US: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Nano-8B-v1 is a compact large language model (LLM) derived from Meta's Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, specifically optimized for reasoning tasks, conversational interactions, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and tool-calling applications. It balances accuracy and efficiency, fitting comfortably onto a single consumer-grade RTX GPU for local deployment. The model supports extended context lengths of up to 128K tokens. Note: you must include `detailed thinking on` in the system prompt to enable reasoning. Please see Usage Recommendations for more.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 Nemotron Ultra 253B v1 是 NVIDIA 的大型语言模型，针对高级推理、人机对话、RAG 和工具调用优化，基于 Meta Llama 3.1 构建。
description.en_US: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1 is a large language model (LLM) optimized for advanced reasoning, human-interactive chat, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and tool-calling tasks. Derived from Meta’s Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct, it has been significantly customized using Neural Architecture Search (NAS), resulting in enhanced efficiency, reduced memory usage, and improved inference latency. The model supports a context length of up to 128K tokens and can operate efficiently on an 8x NVIDIA H100 node. Note: you must include `detailed thinking on` in the system prompt to enable reasoning. Please see Usage Recommendations for more.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.3 Nemotron Super 49B v1 是 NVIDIA 的 49B 模型，针对高级推理、对话、RAG 和工具调用优化，基于 Meta Llama 3.3 构建，支持深度思考模式。
description.en_US: Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 is a large language model (LLM) optimized for advanced reasoning, conversational interactions, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and tool-calling tasks. Derived from Meta's Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, it employs a Neural Architecture Search (NAS) approach, significantly enhancing efficiency and reducing memory requirements. This allows the model to support a context length of up to 128K tokens and fit efficiently on single high-performance GPUs, such as NVIDIA H200. Note: you must include `detailed thinking on` in the system prompt to enable reasoning. Please see Usage Recommendations for more.

description.zh_CN: Nemotron Super 49B V1.5 是 NVIDIA 的 49B 参数混合推理模型，在推理和通用任务之间实现动态平衡，通过可切换的思考模式满足不同复杂度需求，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Nemotron Super 49B V1.5 is NVIDIA's 49B parameter hybrid reasoning model, achieving dynamic balance between reasoning and general tasks with switchable thinking modes to meet different complexity requirements, supporting 128K token context.

description.zh_CN: Llama Nemotron Embed VL 1B V2 是 NVIDIA 的多模态嵌入模型，支持图像、文本及图文混合的文档嵌入，面向多模态问答检索场景，免费可用。
description.en_US: The Llama Nemotron Embed VL 1B V2 embedding model is optimized for multimodal question-answering retrieval. The model can embed 'documents' in the form of image, text, or image and text combined. Documents can be retrieved given a user query in text form. The model supports images containing text, tables, charts, and infographics.

description.zh_CN: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 30B A3B 是高效 MoE 语言模型，以极少的激活参数实现卓越的计算效率，适合对算力成本敏感的推理和生成任务。
description.en_US: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 30B A3B is an efficient MoE language model achieving exceptional computational efficiency with very few active parameters, suitable for reasoning and generation tasks sensitive to computational costs.

description.zh_CN: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 30B A3B 的免费访问版本，适合探索与测试场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 30B A3B, suitable for exploration and testing.

description.zh_CN: Nemotron 4 340B Instruct 是 NVIDIA 的英文对话模型，针对合成数据生成优化，是 Nemotron-4-340B-Base 的指令微调版本，适合单轮与多轮对话。
description.en_US: Nemotron-4-340B-Instruct is an English-language chat model optimized for synthetic data generation. This large language model (LLM) is a fine-tuned version of Nemotron-4-340B-Base, designed for single and multi-turn chat use-cases with a 4,096 token context length. The base model was pre-trained on 9 trillion tokens from diverse English texts, 50+ natural languages, and 40+ coding languages. The instruct model underwent additional alignment steps: 1. Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) 2. Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) 3. Reward-aware Preference Optimization (RPO) The alignment process used approximately 20K human-annotated samples, while 98% of the data for fine-tuning was synthetically generated. Detailed information about the synthetic data generation pipeline is available in the technical report.

description.zh_CN: Nemotron Nano 12B 2 VL 是 NVIDIA 的 12B 参数开放多模态推理模型，结合视觉理解与文本推理能力，在图像分析和视觉问答任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: Nemotron Nano 12B 2 VL is NVIDIA's 12B parameter open multimodal reasoning model, combining visual understanding and text reasoning capabilities, excelling in image analysis and visual question answering tasks.

description.zh_CN: Nemotron Nano 12B 2 VL 的免费访问版本，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Nemotron Nano 12B 2 VL, suitable for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 9B V2 是从零训练的 9B 紧凑高效语言模型，在同参数规模中性能领先，适合需要低延迟和高效推理的生产场景。
description.en_US: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 9B V2 is a 9B compact and efficient language model trained from scratch, leading in performance at its parameter scale, suitable for production scenarios requiring low latency and efficient inference.

description.zh_CN: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 9B V2 的免费访问版本，适合探索与测试场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 9B V2, suitable for exploration and testing.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 Lumimaid 70B 是 NeverSleep 团队基于 Llama 3 70B 在精选角色扮演数据上微调的模型，在严肃与自由创作间取得平衡，适合角色扮演。
description.en_US: The NeverSleep team is back, with a Llama 3 70B finetune trained on their curated roleplay data. Striking a balance between eRP and RP, Lumimaid was designed to be serious, yet uncensored when necessary. To enhance it's overall intelligence and chat capability, roughly 40% of the training data was not roleplay. This provides a breadth of knowledge to access, while still keeping roleplay as the primary strength. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 Lumimaid 8B 是 NeverSleep 团队基于 Llama 3 8B 在精选角色扮演数据上微调的轻量模型，在严肃与自由创作间取得平衡。
description.en_US: The NeverSleep team is back, with a Llama 3 8B finetune trained on their curated roleplay data. Striking a balance between eRP and RP, Lumimaid was designed to be serious, yet uncensored when necessary. To enhance it's overall intelligence and chat capability, roughly 40% of the training data was not roleplay. This provides a breadth of knowledge to access, while still keeping roleplay as the primary strength. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Lumimaid v0.2 70B 是基于 Llama 3.1 70B 的微调版本，相较 v0.1 在数据集上有大幅升级，剔除低质量输出，在角色扮演上表现更稳定。
description.en_US: Lumimaid v0.2 70B is a finetune of Llama 3.1 70B with a "HUGE step up dataset wise" compared to Lumimaid v0.1. Sloppy chats output were purged. Usage of this model is subject to Meta's Acceptable Use Policy.

description.zh_CN: Lumimaid v0.2 8B 是基于 Llama 3.1 8B 的角色扮演微调模型，专注于沉浸式角色互动和创意对话，在保持对话自然性的同时提供丰富的角色扮演体验。
description.en_US: Lumimaid v0.2 8B is a roleplay fine-tuned model based on Llama 3.1 8B, focused on immersive character interaction and creative dialogue, providing rich roleplay experiences while maintaining natural conversational flow.

description.zh_CN: Noromaid 20B 是 IkariDev 与 Undi 合作创建的模型合并作品，适合角色扮演、创意写作和通用对话场景，具有高度灵活的创意表达能力。
description.en_US: Noromaid 20B is a model merge created in collaboration between IkariDev and Undi, suitable for roleplay, creative writing, and general conversational scenarios with highly flexible creative expression capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Noromaid Mixtral 8x7B Instruct 是 NeverSleep 在定制数据集上训练的 Mixtral 8x7B 微调模型，专注角色扮演与去审查化，采用改良 Alpaca 提示格式。
description.en_US: This model was trained for 8h(v1) + 8h(v2) + 12h(v3) on customized modified datasets, focusing on RP, uncensoring, and a modified version of the Alpaca prompting (that was already used in LimaRP), which should be at the same conversational level as ChatLM or Llama2-Chat without adding any additional special tokens.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek V3.1 Nex-N1 是 Nex AGI 基于 DeepSeek V3.1 进行后训练增强的代理推理模型，在工具使用、复杂推理和代码生成任务上有显著提升。
description.en_US: DeepSeek V3.1 Nex-N1 is Nex AGI's post-training enhanced agentic reasoning model based on DeepSeek V3.1, with significant improvements in tool use, complex reasoning, and code generation tasks.

description.zh_CN: DeepHermes 3 Llama 3 8B Preview 是 Nous Research Hermes 系列最新版本，是全球首批统一推理与直接回答的模型之一，在复杂推理上表现突出。
description.en_US: DeepHermes 3 Preview is the latest version of our flagship Hermes series of LLMs by Nous Research, and one of the first models in the world to unify Reasoning (long chains of thought that improve answer accuracy) and normal LLM response modes into one model. We have also improved LLM annotation, judgement, and function calling. DeepHermes 3 Preview is one of the first LLM models to unify both "intuitive", traditional mode responses and long chain of thought reasoning responses into a single model, toggled by a system prompt.

description.zh_CN: DeepHermes 3 Mistral 24B Preview 是基于 Mistral-Small-24B 的指令模型，支持对话、函数调用和高级多轮推理，引入深度思考能力。
description.en_US: DeepHermes 3 (Mistral 24B Preview) is an instruction-tuned language model by Nous Research based on Mistral-Small-24B, designed for chat, function calling, and advanced multi-turn reasoning. It introduces a dual-mode system that toggles between intuitive chat responses and structured “deep reasoning” mode using special system prompts. Fine-tuned via distillation from R1, it supports structured output (JSON mode) and function call syntax for agent-based applications. DeepHermes 3 supports a **reasoning toggle via system prompt**, allowing users to switch between fast, intuitive responses and deliberate, multi-step reasoning. When activated with the following specific system instruction, the model enters a *"deep thinking"* mode—generating extended chains of thought wrapped in `<think></think>` tags before delivering a final answer. System Prompt: You are a deep thinking AI, you may use extremely long chains of thought to deeply consider the problem and deliberate with yourself via systematic reasoning processes to help come to a correct solution prior to answering. You should enclose your thoughts and internal monologue inside <think> </think> tags, and then provide your solution or response to the problem.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Pro 是 Nous Research 基于 Llama-3 8B 训练的指令调优模型，在工具调用、结构化输出和通用推理任务上经过专项优化，适合工具使用场景。
description.en_US: Hermes 2 Pro is Nous Research's instruction-tuned model trained on Llama-3 8B, specifically optimized for tool calling, structured output, and general reasoning tasks, suitable for tool use scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Theta 8B 是基于 Llama 3 的实验性合并模型，融合 Meta Llama 3 8B 与 Nous Hermes 2 Pro 优势，具备独特的写作风格，擅长创意写作。
description.en_US: An experimental merge model based on Llama 3, exhibiting a very distinctive style of writing. It combines the the best of Meta's Llama 3 8B and Nous Research's Hermes 2 Pro. Hermes-2 Θ (theta) was specifically designed with a few capabilities in mind: executing function calls, generating JSON output, and most remarkably, demonstrating metacognitive abilities (contemplating the nature of thought and recognizing the diversity of cognitive processes among individuals).

description.zh_CN: Hermes 3 405B 是 Nous Research 基于 Llama 3.1 405B 的旗舰通用指令模型，在推理、工具调用和创意任务上全面提升，适合高质量通用生产场景。
description.en_US: Hermes 3 405B is Nous Research's flagship general-purpose instruction model based on Llama 3.1 405B, with comprehensive improvements in reasoning, tool calling, and creative tasks for high-quality general production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 3 405B 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Hermes 3 405B, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 3 70B 是 Nous Research 基于 Llama 3.1 70B 的通用指令模型，在推理、工具调用和结构化输出上表现出色，适合需要高质量响应的通用场景。
description.en_US: Hermes 3 70B is Nous Research's general-purpose instruction model based on Llama 3.1 70B, excelling in reasoning, tool calling, and structured output for general scenarios requiring high-quality responses.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 4 405B 是 Nous Research 的大规模推理模型，基于 Meta-Llama-3.1-405B 构建并经过专项推理训练，在复杂多步骤推理和代码任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Hermes 4 405B is Nous Research's large-scale reasoning model built on Meta-Llama-3.1-405B with specialized reasoning training, excelling in complex multi-step reasoning and code tasks.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 4 70B 是 Nous Research 基于 Meta-Llama 3.1 70B 的混合推理模型，结合了强大的指令遵循能力和深度推理，适合需要兼顾效率和推理深度的生产场景。
description.en_US: Hermes 4 70B is Nous Research's hybrid reasoning model based on Meta-Llama 3.1 70B, combining powerful instruction following with deep reasoning, suitable for production scenarios balancing efficiency and reasoning depth.

description.zh_CN: Capybara 34B 是基于 Yi-34B 在 Capybara 数据集上训练 3 个 epoch 的模型，是 Nous 首款 34B 与 200K 上下文模型。
description.en_US: This model is trained on the Yi-34B model for 3 epochs on the Capybara dataset. It's the first 34B Nous model and first 200K context length Nous model.

description.zh_CN: Capybara 7B 是 Nous 的 Capybara 系列模型，基于自建数据微调，V1.9 采用去对齐技术以提升一致性与动态控制，擅长指令遵循。
description.en_US: The Capybara series is a collection of datasets and models made by fine-tuning on data created by Nous, mostly in-house. V1.9 uses unalignment techniques for more consistent and dynamic control. It also leverages a significantly better foundation model, Mistral 7B.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Mistral 7B DPO 是 Nous 旗舰 7B 模型，对 OpenHermes-2.5-Mistral-7B 进行 DPO 优化，在 AGIEval、BigBench 等基准上全面超越前代。
description.en_US: This is the flagship 7B Hermes model, a Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) of Teknium/OpenHermes-2.5-Mistral-7B. It shows improvement across the board on all benchmarks tested - AGIEval, BigBench Reasoning, GPT4All, and TruthfulQA. The model prior to DPO was trained on 1,000,000 instructions/chats of GPT-4 quality or better, primarily synthetic data as well as other high quality datasets.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Mixtral 8x7B DPO 是 Nous 基于 Mixtral 8x7B MoE 训练的旗舰模型，使用超 100 万条 GPT-4 生成数据，在指令遵循与对话上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Nous Hermes 2 Mixtral 8x7B DPO is the new flagship Nous Research model trained over the Mixtral 8x7B MoE LLM. The model was trained on over 1,000,000 entries of primarily GPT-4 generated data, as well as other high quality data from open datasets across the AI landscape, achieving state of the art performance on a variety of tasks.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Mixtral 8x7B SFT 是 Hermes 2 Mixtral 的纯 SFT 版本，使用超 100 万条 GPT-4 生成数据训练，在指令遵循上表现优秀。
description.en_US: Nous Hermes 2 Mixtral 8x7B SFT is the supervised finetune only version of the Nous Research model trained over the Mixtral 8x7B MoE LLM. The model was trained on over 1,000,000 entries of primarily GPT-4 generated data, as well as other high quality data from open datasets across the AI landscape, achieving state of the art performance on a variety of tasks.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Vision 7B 是基于 OpenHermes-2.5 的视觉语言模型，增加视觉支持并在富含函数调用的数据集上训练，支持多模态对话。
description.en_US: This vision-language model builds on innovations from the popular OpenHermes-2.5 model, by Teknium. It adds vision support, and is trained on a custom dataset enriched with function calling This project is led by qnguyen3 and teknium.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 13B 是 Nous Research 基于超 30 万条指令微调的语言模型，由 Teknium 与 Emozilla 主导微调，在指令遵循上表现优秀。
description.en_US: A state-of-the-art language model fine-tuned on over 300k instructions by Nous Research, with Teknium and Emozilla leading the fine tuning process.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 70B 是 Nous Research 基于超 30 万条指令微调的语言模型，由 Teknium 与 Emozilla 主导微调，在复杂任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: A state-of-the-art language model fine-tuned on over 300k instructions by Nous Research, with Teknium and Emozilla leading the fine tuning process.

description.zh_CN: Hermes 2 Yi 34B 是 Nous 基于 Yi 34B 训练的模型，使用超 100 万条 GPT-4 生成数据，在多项基准上超越 Nous-Hermes 2 其他版本。
description.en_US: Nous Hermes 2 Yi 34B was trained on 1,000,000 entries of primarily GPT-4 generated data, as well as other high quality data from open datasets across the AI landscape. Nous-Hermes 2 on Yi 34B outperforms all Nous-Hermes & Open-Hermes models of the past, achieving new heights in all benchmarks for a Nous Research LLM as well as surpassing many popular finetunes.

description.zh_CN: ChatGPT-4o 是 OpenAI 持续更新的 GPT-4o 版本，始终指向 ChatGPT 产品当前使用的最新模型快照，提供多模态理解和生成能力。
description.en_US: OpenAI ChatGPT 4o is continually updated by OpenAI to point to the current version of GPT-4o used by ChatGPT. It therefore differs slightly from the API version of GPT-4o in that it has additional RLHF. It is intended for research and evaluation. OpenAI notes that this model is not suited for production use-cases as it may be removed or redirected to another model in the future.

description.zh_CN: Codex Mini 是基于 o4-mini 专为 Copilot 场景微调的编程助手模型，在代码推理和软件开发辅助场景中进行了专项优化。
description.en_US: codex-mini-latest is a fine-tuned version of o4-mini specifically for use in Codex CLI. For direct use in the API, we recommend starting with gpt-4.1.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 是 OpenAI 的经典快速对话模型，成本极低，适合简单的对话与文本补全任务。
description.en_US: GPT-3.5 Turbo is OpenAI's classic fast conversational model with very low cost, suitable for simple dialogue and text completion tasks.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 0125 是 GPT-3.5 系列最新版本，改进了指令跟随能力、JSON 模式和输出可复现性，是高性价比的快速对话模型。
description.en_US: The latest GPT-3.5 Turbo model with improved instruction following, JSON mode, reproducible outputs, parallel function calling, and more. Training data: up to Sep 2021. This version has a higher accuracy at responding in requested formats and a fix for a bug which caused a text encoding issue for non-English language function calls.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 0301 是 GPT-3.5 系列早期版本快照，能够理解和生成自然语言及代码，具备快速响应的对话能力。
description.en_US: GPT-3.5 Turbo is OpenAI's fastest model. It can understand and generate natural language or code, and is optimized for chat and traditional completion tasks. Training data up to Sep 2021.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 的 2023 年 6 月 13 日固定快照版本，适合需要稳定模型行为的旧版集成。
description.en_US: A fixed snapshot of GPT-3.5 Turbo dated June 13, 2023, suitable for legacy integrations requiring stable model behavior.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 1106 是 GPT-3.5 系列 2023 年 11 月版本，改进了指令跟随、JSON 模式和可复现输出能力。
description.en_US: An older GPT-3.5 Turbo model with improved instruction following, JSON mode, reproducible outputs, parallel function calling, and more. Training data: up to Sep 2021.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 的 16K 上下文扩展版本，支持更长的对话历史和文档输入，适合需要处理较长文本的低成本场景。
description.en_US: An extended 16K context version of GPT-3.5 Turbo, supporting longer conversation histories and document inputs for low-cost scenarios involving longer texts.

description.zh_CN: GPT-3.5 Turbo 的指令调优版本，采用补全 API 而非对话格式，适合传统的文本补全任务。
description.en_US: An instruction-tuned version of GPT-3.5 Turbo using the Completion API rather than chat format, designed for traditional text completion tasks.

description.zh_CN: 经典 GPT-4 模型，是 OpenAI 最具影响力的里程碑模型之一，在推理、写作和知识问答方面表现出色。
description.en_US: The classic GPT-4 model, one of OpenAI's most influential milestone models, excelling in reasoning, writing, and knowledge-based question answering.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 的 2023 年 3 月 14 日原始快照版本，是 GPT-4 系列最早的固定版本。
description.en_US: The original March 14, 2023 snapshot of GPT-4, representing the earliest fixed version of the GPT-4 series.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 Turbo 的 2024 年 11 月 6 日早期预览版本，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口。
description.en_US: An early preview version of GPT-4 Turbo dated November 6, 2024, featuring a 128K token context window.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 32k 是 GPT-4 的扩展上下文版本，支持 3.2 万 token 超长上下文，适合需要处理长文档的专业场景。
description.en_US: GPT-4-32k is an extended version of GPT-4, with the same capabilities but quadrupled context length, allowing for processing up to 40 pages of text in a single pass. This is particularly beneficial for handling longer content like interacting with PDFs without an external vector database. Training data: up to Sep 2021.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 32k 0314 是 GPT-4-32k 的早期版本快照，提供 3.2 万 token 上下文处理能力。
description.en_US: GPT-4-32k is an extended version of GPT-4, with the same capabilities but quadrupled context length, allowing for processing up to 40 pages of text in a single pass. This is particularly beneficial for handling longer content like interacting with PDFs without an external vector database. Training data: up to Sep 2021.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 Turbo 是 GPT-4 的高速优化版本，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口，在保持 GPT-4 智能的同时大幅降低成本。
description.en_US: GPT-4 Turbo is an optimized high-speed version of GPT-4 with a 128K token context window, maintaining GPT-4 intelligence while significantly reducing costs.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 Turbo 的预览版本，为最终版发布前的测试版本，拥有 12.8 万 token 上下文窗口。
description.en_US: A preview version of GPT-4 Turbo released before the final version, featuring a 128K token context window.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4 Vision Preview 是 GPT-4 Turbo 的视觉增强版本，能够理解图像内容，在图像分析、OCR 和视觉问答场景中表现出色。
description.en_US: Ability to understand images, in addition to all other GPT-4 Turbo capabilties. Training data: up to Apr 2023. **Note:** heavily rate limited by OpenAI while in preview.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4.1 是拥有超过 100 万 token 上下文窗口的非推理旗舰模型，在长文档理解、代码审查和指令遵循任务上表现卓越。
