description.en_US: GPT-4.1 is a non-reasoning flagship model with over 1M token context window, excelling at long-document comprehension, code review, and complex instruction following.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4.1 的小型快速版本，同样拥有超过 100 万 token 上下文窗口，在性能与成本之间取得良好平衡，适合日常文本处理任务。
description.en_US: A smaller, faster version of GPT-4.1 also featuring a 1M+ token context window, balancing performance and cost for everyday text processing tasks.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4.1 系列中速度最快、成本最低的版本，拥有超过 100 万 token 上下文窗口，适合高频简单请求场景。
description.en_US: The fastest and most cost-efficient model in the GPT-4.1 family, retaining the 1M+ token context window for high-frequency simple request scenarios.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4.5 Preview 是 OpenAI 最新语言模型研究预览版，在复杂推理和创意任务处理方面进行了全面优化，代表非思考型模型的前沿水平。
description.en_US: GPT-4.5 (Preview) is a research preview of OpenAI’s latest language model, designed to advance capabilities in reasoning, creativity, and multi-turn conversation. It builds on previous iterations with improvements in world knowledge, contextual coherence, and the ability to follow user intent more effectively. The model demonstrates enhanced performance in tasks that require open-ended thinking, problem-solving, and communication. Early testing suggests it is better at generating nuanced responses, maintaining long-context coherence, and reducing hallucinations compared to earlier versions. This research preview is intended to help evaluate GPT-4.5’s strengths and limitations in real-world use cases as OpenAI continues to refine and develop future models. Read more at the blog post here.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o 是 OpenAI 快速智能的多模态旗舰模型，支持文本、图像和文件输入，在速度与智能之间取得最佳平衡，适合广泛的生产场景。
description.en_US: GPT-4o is OpenAI's fast and intelligent multimodal flagship model supporting text, image, and file inputs, striking the best balance between speed and intelligence for broad production use.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o 的首个公开快照版本（2024 年 5 月 13 日），支持文本和图像输入，最大输出为 4096 token。
description.en_US: The original public snapshot of GPT-4o dated May 13, 2024, supporting text and image inputs with a maximum output of 4096 tokens.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o 的 2024 年 8 月 6 日快照版本，支持结构化输出功能，适合需要固定模型行为的场景。
description.en_US: A fixed snapshot of GPT-4o dated August 6, 2024, with structured output support, suitable for scenarios requiring stable model behavior.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o 的 2024 年 11 月 20 日快照版本，适合需要固定模型行为的生产场景。
description.en_US: A fixed snapshot of GPT-4o dated November 20, 2024, suitable for production scenarios requiring stable, reproducible model behavior.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o Audio Preview 是 GPT-4o 的音频增强版本，支持将音频作为提示输入，能感知语音中的情感、音调等细微特征，提供更贴近人类沟通体验的多模态交互能力。
description.en_US: GPT-4o Audio Preview is an audio-enhanced variant of GPT-4o supporting audio inputs as prompts, capable of detecting nuanced speech characteristics such as emotion and tone for more natural multimodal interactions.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o 的轻量经济版，支持文本和图像输入，在简单任务上响应速度极快，适合成本敏感的多模态应用。
description.en_US: A lightweight, affordable version of GPT-4o supporting text and image inputs, offering fast responses for simple tasks in cost-sensitive multimodal applications.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o-mini 的 2024 年 7 月 18 日快照版本，适合需要固定模型行为的生产场景。
description.en_US: A fixed snapshot of GPT-4o-mini dated July 18, 2024, suitable for production scenarios requiring stable model behavior.

description.zh_CN: 具备联网搜索能力的 GPT-4o-mini 变体，可实时检索网络信息并整合到回答中，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A web search-enabled variant of GPT-4o-mini that can retrieve and integrate real-time web information into responses without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: 具备联网搜索能力的 GPT-4o 变体，可实时检索网络信息并整合到回答中，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A web search-enabled variant of GPT-4o that can retrieve and integrate real-time web information into responses without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-4o 的扩展输出变体，最大输出 token 数提升至 64000，适合需要生成超长内容的场景。
description.en_US: An extended output variant of GPT-4o with maximum output increased to 64000 tokens, suitable for scenarios requiring the generation of very long content.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI 上一代旗舰推理模型，在数学、科学和编程任务上达到顶尖水平，支持 40 万 token 上下文与多模态输入，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: OpenAI's previous flagship reasoning model delivering top-tier performance in math, science, and programming, with 400K token context and multimodal input without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 Chat 是 OpenAI 针对企业级高级对话场景优化的版本，支持多模态和上下文感知交互，适合复杂自然语言理解、智能客服及企业助手等应用场景。
description.en_US: GPT-5 Chat is OpenAI's model optimized for advanced enterprise conversational applications, supporting multimodal and context-aware interactions for complex natural language understanding, customer service, and intelligent assistant use cases.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 针对代理式编程的专属优化版本，专为 Codex 工作流中的软件工程任务设计，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A coding-optimized variant of GPT-5 built for agentic software engineering tasks within the Codex ecosystem without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 Image 将 GPT-5 的强大语言能力与先进图像生成能力深度融合，支持高质量图像创作与编辑，在图文理解和视觉内容生成方面显著超越前代模型。
description.en_US: GPT-5 Image deeply integrates GPT-5's advanced language capabilities with state-of-the-art image generation, enabling high-quality image creation and editing with major improvements in visual content generation over previous generations.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 Image Mini 结合 GPT-5 Mini 的语言能力与 GPT Image 1 Mini 的图像生成能力，以高效低成本的方式提供图文融合的创作能力，适合轻量图像生成场景。
description.en_US: GPT-5 Image Mini combines GPT-5 Mini's language capabilities with GPT Image 1 Mini's image generation, delivering integrated text-and-image creation at an efficient, cost-effective scale for lightweight image generation use cases.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 的轻量高速版本，成本更低，适合定义明确的任务，保留了 GPT-5 系列的自适应推理能力，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A faster, more cost-efficient version of GPT-5 for well-defined tasks, retaining the adaptive reasoning capabilities of the GPT-5 series without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 系列中速度最快、成本最低的版本，专为高并发轻量场景设计，保持良好的基础推理能力，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The fastest and most cost-efficient model in the GPT-5 family, designed for high-throughput lightweight scenarios while maintaining solid baseline reasoning without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5 的 Pro 版本，投入更多计算资源以输出更精准的响应，适合高要求的研究与分析场景，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The Pro variant of GPT-5 with additional compute for smarter, more precise responses, designed for demanding research and analytical tasks without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.1 是性能强劲的推理模型，在代码生成与代理任务上表现优秀，支持可配置推理深度，拥有 40 万 token 上下文窗口，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: GPT-5.1 is a high-performance reasoning model excelling at code generation and agentic tasks, with configurable reasoning effort and a 400K token context window without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.1 Chat（又称 Instant）是 GPT-5.1 家族中专注低延迟对话的轻量版本，响应速度快，适合实时对话和高并发交互场景。
description.en_US: GPT-5.1 Chat (also known as Instant) is the fast, lightweight member of the GPT-5.1 family, optimized for low-latency conversational use cases and high-concurrency real-time dialogue applications.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.1 的代码专属版本，专为 Codex 环境中的代理式软件开发设计，在代码编辑与调试上表现突出，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A coding-specialized version of GPT-5.1 built for agentic software development in Codex environments, excelling at code editing and debugging without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.1-Codex 的 Max 版本，针对长时运行的代码任务进行了优化，适合需要持续多步骤执行的复杂工程项目，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The Max variant of GPT-5.1-Codex, optimized for long-running coding tasks requiring sustained multi-step execution in complex engineering projects without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.1-Codex 的轻量经济版，在代码推理能力和成本之间取得良好平衡，适合高频代码辅助场景，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A smaller, more cost-effective version of GPT-5.1-Codex that balances coding capability with cost efficiency for high-throughput code assistance without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.2 是 OpenAI 当前最先进的前沿模型，在数学、代码和代理任务上全面领先，支持自适应推理分配，拥有 40 万 token 上下文窗口，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: GPT-5.2 is OpenAI's current frontier model with adaptive reasoning, leading across math, coding, and agentic tasks, featuring a 400K token context window without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.2 Chat（又称 Instant）是 GPT-5.2 家族中专注低延迟对话的轻量版本，在保持高质量输出的同时优化响应速度，适合实时对话和高并发交互场景。
description.en_US: GPT-5.2 Chat (also known as Instant) is the fast, lightweight member of the GPT-5.2 family, optimized for low-latency conversational interactions while maintaining high output quality for real-time and high-concurrency applications.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.2-Codex 是 GPT-5.2 的代码专属优化版本，专注于复杂软件工程与自主代码任务，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: GPT-5.2-Codex is a coding-specialized variant of GPT-5.2, optimized for complex software engineering and autonomous coding workflows without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.2 的 Pro 版本，分配更多计算资源以获得更精准的推理结果，在 FrontierMath 上比 GPT-5 提升 53%，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The Pro tier of GPT-5.2 with maximum compute allocation, achieving 53% better performance than GPT-5 on FrontierMath, designed for the highest-stakes reasoning tasks without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT-5.3 Chat 是 OpenAI 为对话场景优化的 ChatGPT 核心模型，在 GPT-5.3 基础上进一步强化了日常对话的流畅性与实用性，适合自然语言交流及日常问答场景。
description.en_US: GPT-5.3 Chat is OpenAI's ChatGPT-optimized model built on GPT-5.3, designed for smoother and more natural everyday conversations, well-suited for general question answering and interactive dialogue.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI 迄今最强代码生成模型，在 SWE-Bench Pro 上得分 56.4%，专为软件工程的长流程自主代码任务设计，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: OpenAI's most capable agentic coding model to date, scoring 56.4% on SWE-Bench Pro, designed for long-horizon autonomous software engineering tasks without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: GPT Audio 是 OpenAI 首款正式发布的音频模型，支持音频输入与输出，能识别语音中的情感与语气细节，并生成自然流畅的语音回复，适用于语音交互应用。
description.en_US: GPT Audio is OpenAI's first generally available audio model supporting audio input and output, capable of detecting speech nuances like emotion and tone while generating natural-sounding voice responses for voice-interactive applications.

description.zh_CN: GPT Audio Mini 是 GPT Audio 的轻量成本优化版本，保留核心音频理解与生成能力，在价格和延迟上更具优势，适合对成本敏感的语音交互场景。
description.en_US: A cost-efficient variant of GPT Audio retaining its core audio understanding and generation capabilities at lower cost and latency, suitable for cost-sensitive voice interaction applications.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI 开源的 120B 参数模型，采用 Apache 2.0 许可证，可在单台 H100 GPU 上运行，适合需要本地部署的生产场景。
description.en_US: OpenAI's open-weight 120B parameter model under Apache 2.0 license, capable of running on a single H100 GPU, suitable for production deployments requiring local hosting.

description.zh_CN: GPT-OSS-120B 的固定提供商版本，锁定到特定推理节点以确保稳定的服务质量与延迟一致性，完整继承 GPT-OSS-120B 的开放权重 MoE 架构能力，适合对稳定性有要求的生产部署。
description.en_US: A provider-locked variant of GPT-OSS-120B, pinned to a specific inference provider for consistent performance and predictable latency, inheriting the full capabilities of GPT-OSS-120B's open-weight Mixture-of-Experts architecture for stable production deployments.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI gpt-oss-120b 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与测试场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of OpenAI gpt-oss-120b, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and testing.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI 开源的 20B 参数模型，采用 Apache 2.0 许可证，在低延迟场景下表现出色，适合对响应速度要求较高的应用。
description.en_US: OpenAI's open-weight 20B parameter model under Apache 2.0 license, optimized for low-latency scenarios requiring fast response times.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI gpt-oss-20b 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与测试场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of OpenAI gpt-oss-20b, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and testing.

description.zh_CN: GPT-OSS-Safeguard-20B 是 OpenAI 开源的 21B 参数安全推理模型，基于 GPT-OSS-20B 构建，专门用于内容安全检测与有害输出识别，适合内容审核和安全评估工作流。
description.en_US: GPT-OSS-Safeguard-20B is OpenAI's open-weight 21B-parameter safety reasoning model built on GPT-OSS-20B, specialized for content safety detection and harmful output identification, suitable for content moderation and safety evaluation workflows.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI 首代强化推理模型，通过大规模强化学习训练，在数学、科学和编程 STEM 任务上达到博士级别准确率，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: OpenAI's original reinforcement-learning reasoning model achieving PhD-level accuracy on STEM tasks in physics, chemistry, and biology, without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o1 mini 是 OpenAI o1 系列的轻量版本，专注数学、科学和编程推理，在保留核心推理能力的同时显著降低了延迟和成本。
description.en_US: The latest and strongest model family from OpenAI, o1 is designed to spend more time thinking before responding. The o1 models are optimized for math, science, programming, and other STEM-related tasks. They consistently exhibit PhD-level accuracy on benchmarks in physics, chemistry, and biology. Learn more in the launch announcement. Note: This model is currently experimental and not suitable for production use-cases, and may be heavily rate-limited.

description.zh_CN: o1 mini (2024-09-12) 是 o1 mini 的特定版本快照，专注于数学、科学和编程推理任务的高效解决。
description.en_US: The latest and strongest model family from OpenAI, o1 is designed to spend more time thinking before responding. The o1 models are optimized for math, science, programming, and other STEM-related tasks. They consistently exhibit PhD-level accuracy on benchmarks in physics, chemistry, and biology. Learn more in the launch announcement. Note: This model is currently experimental and not suitable for production use-cases, and may be heavily rate-limited.

description.zh_CN: o1 Preview 是 OpenAI o1 推理模型的预览版本，专为解决需要深度思考的复杂科学、数学和编程问题而设计。
description.en_US: The latest and strongest model family from OpenAI, o1 is designed to spend more time thinking before responding. The o1 models are optimized for math, science, programming, and other STEM-related tasks. They consistently exhibit PhD-level accuracy on benchmarks in physics, chemistry, and biology. Learn more in the launch announcement. Note: This model is currently experimental and not suitable for production use-cases, and may be heavily rate-limited.

description.zh_CN: o1 Preview 2024-09-12 是 o1 Preview 的特定版本快照，具备深度推理能力，适合复杂科学和数学问题的解决。
description.en_US: The latest and strongest model family from OpenAI, o1 is designed to spend more time thinking before responding. The o1 models are optimized for math, science, programming, and other STEM-related tasks. They consistently exhibit PhD-level accuracy on benchmarks in physics, chemistry, and biology. Learn more in the launch announcement. Note: This model is currently experimental and not suitable for production use-cases, and may be heavily rate-limited.

description.zh_CN: o1 的增强版，分配更多计算资源以产生更好的推理结果，在科学研究与高难度数学问题上尤为出色，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: An enhanced version of o1 with additional compute for better reasoning results, particularly excelling in scientific research and high-difficulty math problems without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o3 是 OpenAI 强大的推理模型，在数学、科学、代码和视觉推理任务上全面超越 o1，支持多步骤复杂问题分析，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: o3 is a powerful OpenAI reasoning model setting new standards across math, science, coding, and visual reasoning tasks, ideal for complex multi-step problem analysis without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI 最强深度研究模型，基于 o3 推理能力，支持多步骤来源分析与跨文档信息综合，专为复杂研究任务设计，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: OpenAI's most powerful deep research model built on o3 reasoning, supporting multi-step source analysis and cross-document synthesis for complex research tasks without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o3 的经济小型版本，在推理能力和成本之间取得良好平衡，适合大规模部署推理型任务，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A small and cost-efficient alternative to o3, balancing reasoning capability with cost for large-scale deployment of reasoning-intensive tasks without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o3-mini 的高推理努力档位，在经济的基础上提供更深的推理深度，适合需要更高准确率的复杂任务，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The high reasoning effort tier of o3-mini, providing deeper reasoning at an economical cost, suitable for complex tasks requiring higher accuracy without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o3 的 Pro 版本，分配更多计算资源以产生质量更高的推理输出，适合对准确性要求极高的场景，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The Pro variant of o3 with more compute for higher-quality reasoning output, designed for scenarios requiring maximum accuracy without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o4-mini 是快速经济的推理模型，在 AIME 2025 上以 Python 达到 99.5% 准确率，适合高吞吐量场景下的推理与代码任务，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: o4-mini is a fast, cost-efficient reasoning model achieving 99.5% on AIME 2025 with Python, well-suited for high-throughput reasoning and coding tasks without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: 基于 o4-mini 的深度研究专属版本，以更低成本提供强大的多步骤研究能力，适合高频研究场景，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: A deep research variant built on o4-mini, delivering powerful multi-step research capabilities at lower cost for high-frequency research workflows without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: o4-mini 的高推理努力档位，在保持低成本的同时提供接近 o3 的推理深度，适合需要更高精度推理任务，不支持温度调节。
description.en_US: The high reasoning effort tier of o4-mini, offering reasoning depth approaching o3 while maintaining cost efficiency for tasks requiring higher precision without temperature control.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI Sora 2 视频生成模型，物理真实感最强、镜头语言成熟、叙事理解能力强，支持最长 25 秒（Pro 约 2 分钟）、1080p，具备 Cameo 真人植入与故事板分镜功能。
description.en_US: OpenAI Sora 2 leads in photorealism, cinematography, and narrative understanding. Supports up to 25s (2min on Pro) at 1080p. Features Cameo and storyboard tools.

description.zh_CN: OpenAI Sora 2 Pro 为生产级输出优化，最高 1080p 分辨率，定价约 0.50 美元/秒，面向专业影视与商业广告场景。
description.en_US: OpenAI Sora 2 Pro is optimized for production-quality output at up to 1080p, priced around $0.50/second for professional film and commercial use.

description.zh_CN: Text Embedding 3 Large 是 OpenAI 最先进的文本嵌入模型，在英文和多语言任务上均有卓越表现，适合语义搜索和 RAG 应用。
description.en_US: text-embedding-3-large is OpenAI's most capable embedding model for both english and non-english tasks. Embeddings are a numerical representation of text that can be used to measure the relatedness between two pieces of text. Embeddings are useful for search, clustering, recommendations, anomaly detection, and classification tasks.

description.zh_CN: Text Embedding 3 Small 是 OpenAI 高性能嵌入模型，在性能和成本之间取得良好平衡，是 ada-002 的升级替代品，适合大规模嵌入场景。
description.en_US: text-embedding-3-small is OpenAI's improved, more performant version of the ada embedding model. Embeddings are a numerical representation of text that can be used to measure the relatedness between two pieces of text. Embeddings are useful for search, clustering, recommendations, anomaly detection, and classification tasks.

description.zh_CN: Text Embedding Ada 002 是 OpenAI 的经典文本嵌入模型，曾广泛用于语义搜索和内容推荐，现已被 text-embedding-3 系列取代。
description.en_US: text-embedding-ada-002 is OpenAI's legacy text embedding model.

description.zh_CN: OpenChat 3.5 7B 是采用 C-RLFT 条件强化学习微调的开源对话模型，受离线强化学习启发，在指令遵循与多轮对话上表现优秀。
description.en_US: OpenChat 7B is a library of open-source language models, fine-tuned with "C-RLFT (Conditioned Reinforcement Learning Fine-Tuning)" - a strategy inspired by offline reinforcement learning. It has been trained on mixed-quality data without preference labels. - For OpenChat fine-tuned on Mistral 7B, check out OpenChat 7B. - For OpenChat fine-tuned on Llama 8B, check out OpenChat 8B. -source

description.zh_CN: OpenChat 3.6 8B 是采用 C-RLFT 条件强化学习微调的开源对话模型，在指令遵循与多轮对话上较 7B 版本有进一步提升。
description.en_US: OpenChat 8B is a library of open-source language models, fine-tuned with "C-RLFT (Conditioned Reinforcement Learning Fine-Tuning)" - a strategy inspired by offline reinforcement learning. It has been trained on mixed-quality data without preference labels. It outperforms many similarly sized models including Llama 3 8B Instruct and various fine-tuned models. It excels in general conversation, coding assistance, and mathematical reasoning. - For OpenChat fine-tuned on Mistral 7B, check out OpenChat 7B. - For OpenChat fine-tuned on Llama 8B, check out OpenChat 8B. -source

description.zh_CN: InternVL3 14B 是 InternVL3 系列的 14B 版本，先进多模态大模型，相较 InternVL 2.5 在整体性能与视觉推理上有显著提升。
description.en_US: The 14b version of the InternVL3 series. An advanced multimodal large language model (MLLM) series that demonstrates superior overall performance. Compared to InternVL 2.5, InternVL3 exhibits superior multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities, while further extending its multimodal capabilities to encompass tool usage, GUI agents, industrial image analysis, 3D vision perception, and more.

description.zh_CN: InternVL3 2B 是 InternVL3 系列的 2B 轻量版本，追求更高推理速度与合理性能，适合边缘部署与实时多模态应用。
description.en_US: The 2b version of the InternVL3 series, for an even higher inference speed and very reasonable performance. An advanced multimodal large language model (MLLM) series that demonstrates superior overall performance. Compared to InternVL 2.5, InternVL3 exhibits superior multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities, while further extending its multimodal capabilities to encompass tool usage, GUI agents, industrial image analysis, 3D vision perception, and more.

description.zh_CN: InternVL3 78B 是 InternVL3 系列的旗舰版本，相较 InternVL 2.5 在多模态感知与推理能力上有显著提升，支持文档理解与视觉问答。
description.en_US: The InternVL3 series is an advanced multimodal large language model (MLLM). Compared to InternVL 2.5, InternVL3 demonstrates stronger multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities. In addition, InternVL3 is benchmarked against the Qwen2.5 Chat models, whose pre-trained base models serve as the initialization for its language component. Benefiting from Native Multimodal Pre-Training, the InternVL3 series surpasses the Qwen2.5 series in overall text performance.

description.zh_CN: Mistral OpenOrca 7B 是使用 OpenOrca 数据集微调的 Mistral 模型，是首个在 30B 以下规模超越其他模型的 7B 模型，在指令遵循上表现突出。
description.en_US: A fine-tune of Mistral using the OpenOrca dataset. First 7B model to beat all other models <30B.

description.zh_CN: OlympicCoder 32B 是基于 CodeForces-CoTs 数据集微调的高性能开源模型，包含约 10 万条链式思维编程样本，擅长复杂竞赛编程与算法任务。
description.en_US: OlympicCoder-32B is a high-performing open-source model fine-tuned using the CodeForces-CoTs dataset, containing approximately 100,000 chain-of-thought programming samples. It excels at complex competitive programming benchmarks, such as IOI 2024 and Codeforces-style challenges, frequently surpassing state-of-the-art closed-source models. OlympicCoder-32B provides advanced reasoning, coherent multi-step problem-solving, and robust code generation capabilities, demonstrating significant potential for olympiad-level competitive programming applications.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Llama3 Sonar 70B 是 Perplexity 最新 Sonar 系列离线对话模型，在成本、速度与性能上超越早期 Sonar，支持 32K 上下文。
description.en_US: Llama3 Sonar is Perplexity's latest model family. It surpasses their earlier Sonar models in cost-efficiency, speed, and performance. This is a normal offline LLM, but the online version of this model has Internet access.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Llama3 Sonar 70B Online 是 Sonar 70B 的在线版本，集成实时网络搜索，在需要最新信息的问答与研究中表现突出。
description.en_US: Llama3 Sonar is Perplexity's latest model family. It surpasses their earlier Sonar models in cost-efficiency, speed, and performance. This is the online version of the offline chat model. It is focused on delivering helpful, up-to-date, and factual responses.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Llama3 Sonar 8B 是 Perplexity Sonar 系列的 8B 离线对话模型，在成本与性能间取得平衡，支持 32K 上下文。
description.en_US: Llama3 Sonar is Perplexity's latest model family. It surpasses their earlier Sonar models in cost-efficiency, speed, and performance. This is a normal offline LLM, but the online version of this model has Internet access.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Llama3 Sonar 8B Online 是 Sonar 8B 的在线版本，集成实时网络搜索，适合需要最新信息的轻量级问答场景。
description.en_US: Llama3 Sonar is Perplexity's latest model family. It surpasses their earlier Sonar models in cost-efficiency, speed, and performance. This is the online version of the offline chat model. It is focused on delivering helpful, up-to-date, and factual responses.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Llama 3.1 Sonar 70B Online 是 Sonar 系列的 70B 在线版本，支持 128K 上下文，集成网络搜索，适合长文档与实时信息检索。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 Sonar is Perplexity's latest model family. It surpasses their earlier Sonar models in cost-efficiency, speed, and performance. This is the online version of the offline chat model. It is focused on delivering helpful, up-to-date, and factual responses.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Llama 3.1 Sonar 8B Online 是 Sonar 系列的 8B 在线版本，支持 128K 上下文，集成网络搜索，适合轻量级实时问答。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 Sonar is Perplexity's latest model family. It surpasses their earlier Sonar models in cost-efficiency, speed, and performance. This is the online version of the offline chat model. It is focused on delivering helpful, up-to-date, and factual responses.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity R1 1776 是 DeepSeek-R1 的后训练版本，针对部分敏感话题解除审查约束，保留原有推理能力，面向特定使用场景。
description.en_US: R1 1776 is a version of DeepSeek-R1 that has been post-trained to remove censorship constraints related to topics restricted by the Chinese government. The model retains its original reasoning capabilities while providing direct responses to a wider range of queries. R1 1776 is an offline chat model that does not use the perplexity search subsystem. The model was tested on a multilingual dataset of over 1,000 examples covering sensitive topics to measure its likelihood of refusal or overly filtered responses. Evaluation Results Its performance on math and reasoning benchmarks remains similar to the base R1 model. Reasoning Performance Read more on the Blog Post

description.zh_CN: Sonar 是 Perplexity 的轻量联网搜索模型，以低成本提供实时网络信息检索能力，响应中包含引用来源，适合需要快速联网问答的场景。
description.en_US: Sonar is Perplexity's lightweight web search model providing real-time web information retrieval at low cost, with citations included in responses, suitable for scenarios requiring quick web-connected question answering.

description.zh_CN: Sonar Deep Research 是 Perplexity 的多步骤深度研究模型，能够执行复杂的网络信息检索、分析和综合，生成带有完整引用的深度研究报告，适合专业研究场景。
description.en_US: Sonar Deep Research is Perplexity's multi-step deep research model capable of executing complex web information retrieval, analysis, and synthesis, generating in-depth research reports with complete citations for professional research scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Sonar Pro 是 Perplexity 的高级联网推理模型，在 Sonar 基础上提供更深的推理能力和更丰富的引用来源，适合需要高质量联网推理的专业应用。
description.en_US: Sonar Pro is Perplexity's advanced web-connected reasoning model, providing deeper reasoning capabilities and richer citation sources than Sonar, suitable for professional applications requiring high-quality web-connected reasoning.

description.zh_CN: Sonar Pro Search 是 Perplexity 面向深度联网搜索场景的增强版本，采用精细化搜索分解策略对复杂查询进行多轮检索与综合，提供高质量、带引用来源的实时信息检索结果。
description.en_US: Perplexity's enhanced web search model applying fine-grained query decomposition and multi-round retrieval to complex questions, delivering high-quality, citation-backed real-time information results for deep research scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Perplexity Sonar Reasoning 是基于 DeepSeek R1 的推理模型，支持长链式思维与内置网络搜索，在需要深度推理与实时信息的场景中表现突出。
description.en_US: Sonar Reasoning is a reasoning model provided by Perplexity based on DeepSeek R1. It allows developers to utilize long chain of thought with built-in web search. Sonar Reasoning is uncensored and hosted in US datacenters.

description.zh_CN: Sonar Reasoning Pro 是 Perplexity 联网推理旗舰模型，将强大的推理能力与实时网络搜索结合，能够在检索信息的基础上进行深度多步骤分析，适合高难度研究任务。
description.en_US: Sonar Reasoning Pro is Perplexity's flagship web-connected reasoning model, combining powerful reasoning with real-time web search to perform deep multi-step analysis on retrieved information, suitable for high-difficulty research tasks.

description.zh_CN: Phind CodeLlama 34B v2 是基于 CodeLlama-34B 在内部数据集上微调的模型，在 HumanEval 等基准上超越 GPT-4，擅长代码生成与编程辅助。
description.en_US: A fine-tune of CodeLlama-34B on an internal dataset that helps it exceed GPT-4 on some benchmarks, including HumanEval.

description.zh_CN: Pika 2.5 视频生成模型，生成速度最快（30–90 秒）、易上手，具备 Pikaframes 关键帧动画与特效套件，适合社交短视频与快速迭代。
description.en_US: Pika 2.5 offers the fastest generation (30–90s) and ease of use. Features Pikaframes keyframe animation and effects. Ideal for social short-form and rapid iteration.

description.zh_CN: INTELLECT-3 是 Prime Intellect 的 106B MoE 模型（12B 激活参数），通过去中心化训练方式构建，具备强大的推理能力，是去中心化 AI 训练领域的重要里程碑。
description.en_US: INTELLECT-3 is Prime Intellect's 106B MoE model (12B active parameters) built through decentralized training, with powerful reasoning capabilities and representing an important milestone in decentralized AI training.

description.zh_CN: Mythalion 13B 是 Pygmalion-13b 与 MythoMax 的融合模型，结合两者优势，擅长创意写作与角色扮演。
description.en_US: A blend of the new Pygmalion-13b and MythoMax.

description.zh_CN: Qwen 1.5 110B Chat 是 Qwen1.5 系列参数量最大的对话模型，是 Qwen2 的 Beta 测试版本，具备强大的多语言理解和生成能力。
description.en_US: Qwen1.5 110B is the beta version of Qwen2, a transformer-based decoder-only language model pretrained on a large amount of data. In comparison with the previous released Qwen, the improvements include: - Significant performance improvement in human preference for chat models - Multilingual support of both base and chat models - Stable support of 32K context length for models of all sizes For more details, see this blog post and GitHub repo. Usage of this model is subject to Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT.

description.zh_CN: Qwen 1.5 14B Chat 是 Qwen1.5 系列的 14B 参数对话模型，在语言理解和生成任务上性能出色，是 Qwen2 的 Beta 测试版本。
description.en_US: Qwen1.5 14B is the beta version of Qwen2, a transformer-based decoder-only language model pretrained on a large amount of data. In comparison with the previous released Qwen, the improvements include: - Significant performance improvement in human preference for chat models - Multilingual support of both base and chat models - Stable support of 32K context length for models of all sizes For more details, see this blog post and GitHub repo. Usage of this model is subject to Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT.

description.zh_CN: Qwen 2 72B Instruct 是 Qwen2 系列旗舰指令微调模型，在语言理解、数学运算、代码生成和多语言任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Qwen2 72B is a transformer-based model that excels in language understanding, multilingual capabilities, coding, mathematics, and reasoning. It features SwiGLU activation, attention QKV bias, and group query attention. It is pretrained on extensive data with supervised finetuning and direct preference optimization. For more details, see this blog post and GitHub repo. Usage of this model is subject to Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT.

description.zh_CN: Qwen 2 7B Instruct 是 Qwen2 系列的轻量指令微调版本，具备多语言理解和生成能力，适合高效对话和任务处理。
description.en_US: Qwen2 7B is a transformer-based model that excels in language understanding, multilingual capabilities, coding, mathematics, and reasoning. It features SwiGLU activation, attention QKV bias, and group query attention. It is pretrained on extensive data with supervised finetuning and direct preference optimization. For more details, see this blog post and GitHub repo. Usage of this model is subject to Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT.

description.zh_CN: Qwen2.5 72B 是通义千问上一代旗舰文本模型，在多项基准上表现出色，适合高质量通用推理和代码任务。
description.en_US: Qwen2.5 72B is Qwen's previous generation flagship text model with strong performance across multiple benchmarks, suitable for high-quality general reasoning and coding tasks.

description.zh_CN: Qwen2.5 7B 是通义千问上一代小型文本模型，适合资源受限环境下的基本推理和对话任务。
description.en_US: Qwen2.5 7B is Qwen's previous generation small text model, suitable for basic reasoning and conversational tasks in resource-constrained environments.

description.zh_CN: Qwen2.5 Coder 32B 是通义千问上一代代码生成旗舰模型，在代码补全、修复和解释任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Qwen2.5 Coder 32B is Qwen's previous generation flagship code generation model, excelling in code completion, bug fixing, and explanation tasks.

description.zh_CN: Qwen2.5 VL 7B 是通义千问上一代轻量视觉语言模型，适合资源受限场景下的基本图像理解任务。
description.en_US: Qwen2.5 VL 7B is Qwen's previous generation lightweight vision-language model, suitable for basic image understanding tasks in resource-constrained scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Qwen 1.5 32B Chat 是 Qwen1.5 系列的 32B 参数对话模型，在性能和效率之间取得较好平衡，是 Qwen2 的 Beta 测试版本。

description.zh_CN: QwQ 32B Preview 是 Qwen 团队发布的实验性推理研究模型，专注于提升 AI 的自主思考和推理能力，在数学和编程推理上取得优异表现。
description.en_US: QwQ-32B-Preview is an experimental research model focused on AI reasoning capabilities developed by the Qwen Team. As a preview release, it demonstrates promising analytical abilities while having several important limitations: 1. **Language Mixing and Code-Switching**: The model may mix languages or switch between them unexpectedly, affecting response clarity. 2. **Recursive Reasoning Loops**: The model may enter circular reasoning patterns, leading to lengthy responses without a conclusive answer. 3. **Safety and Ethical Considerations**: The model requires enhanced safety measures to ensure reliable and secure performance, and users should exercise caution when deploying it. 4. **Performance and Benchmark Limitations**: The model excels in math and coding but has room for improvement in other areas, such as common sense reasoning and nuanced language understanding.

description.zh_CN: RWKV v5 World 3B 是采用 RNN 架构达到 Transformer 性能的模型，结合 RNN 与 Transformer 优势，支持无限上下文，推理高效、显存占用低。
description.en_US: RWKV is an RNN (recurrent neural network) with transformer-level performance. It aims to combine the best of RNNs and transformers - great performance, fast inference, low VRAM, fast training, "infinite" context length, and free sentence embedding. RWKV-5 is trained on 100+ world languages (70% English, 15% multilang, 15% code). RWKV 3B models are provided for free, by Recursal.AI, for the beta period. More details here.

description.zh_CN: Eagle 7B 是基于 RWKV-v5 架构的模型，在 100+ 语言、1.1 万亿 token 上训练，推理成本较 Transformer 低 10-100 倍，适合多语言与代码任务。
description.en_US: Eagle 7B is trained on 1.1 Trillion Tokens across 100+ world languages (70% English, 15% multilang, 15% code). - Built on the RWKV-v5 architecture (a linear transformer with 10-100x+ lower inference cost) - Ranks as the world's greenest 7B model (per token) - Outperforms all 7B class models in multi-lingual benchmarks - Approaches Falcon (1.5T), LLaMA2 (2T), Mistral (>2T?) level of performance in English evals - Trade blows with MPT-7B (1T) in English evals - All while being an "Attention-Free Transformer" Eagle 7B models are provided for free, by Recursal.AI, for the beta period till end of March 2024 Find out more here rnn

description.zh_CN: RWKV v5 3B AI Town 是专为 AI Town 项目微调的 RWKV 3B 模型，采用 RNN 架构实现 Transformer 级性能，适合游戏与智能体场景。
description.en_US: This is an RWKV 3B model finetuned specifically for the AI Town project. RWKV is an RNN (recurrent neural network) with transformer-level performance. It aims to combine the best of RNNs and transformers - great performance, fast inference, low VRAM, fast training, "infinite" context length, and free sentence embedding. RWKV 3B models are provided for free, by Recursal.AI, for the beta period. More details here.

description.zh_CN: Reka Flash 3 是 Reka 的 210 亿参数通用指令模型，在对话、代码、指令遵循和函数调用上表现优秀，适合生产部署与多任务场景。
description.en_US: Reka Flash 3 is a general-purpose, instruction-tuned large language model with 21 billion parameters, developed by Reka. It excels at general chat, coding tasks, instruction-following, and function calling. Featuring a 32K context length and optimized through reinforcement learning (RLOO), it provides competitive performance comparable to proprietary models within a smaller parameter footprint. Ideal for low-latency, local, or on-device deployments, Reka Flash 3 is compact, supports efficient quantization (down to 11GB at 4-bit precision), and employs explicit reasoning tags ("<reasoning>") to indicate its internal thought process. Reka Flash 3 is primarily an English model with limited multilingual understanding capabilities. The model weights are released under the Apache 2.0 license.

description.zh_CN: Relace Apply 3 是专为代码补丁应用设计的 LLM，能够将 AI 建议的代码修改精准合并到现有代码库中，在代码编辑任务的准确性上远超通用模型。
description.en_US: Relace Apply 3 is an LLM designed specifically for code patch application, accurately merging AI-suggested code modifications into existing codebases, far surpassing general-purpose models in code editing task accuracy.

description.zh_CN: Relace Search 是专为代码库搜索优化的模型，通过并行执行多个文件查看和 grep 工具实现高效的代码库信息检索，适合大型代码库的精准搜索场景。
description.en_US: Relace Search is a model optimized for codebase searching, achieving efficient codebase information retrieval through parallel execution of multiple file view and grep tools, suitable for precise search scenarios in large codebases.

description.zh_CN: Runway Gen 4.5 视频生成模型，具备运动笔刷、导演模式、多镜头编排，支持 4K 输出与角色一致性，部分基准超越 Veo 3、Sora 2。
description.en_US: Runway Gen 4.5 features motion brush, director mode, and multi-shot orchestration. Supports 4K output and character consistency. Surpasses Veo 3 and Sora 2 on select benchmarks.

description.zh_CN: Typhoon2 70B Instruct 是泰国 SCB10X 基于 Llama 3.1 的泰英双语指令模型，70B 参数，在泰语推理、指令遵循和代码任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: Llama3.1-Typhoon2-70B-Instruct is a Thai-English instruction-tuned language model with 70 billion parameters, built on Llama 3.1. It demonstrates strong performance across general instruction-following, math, coding, and tool-use tasks, with state-of-the-art results in Thai-specific benchmarks such as IFEval, MT-Bench, and Thai-English code-switching. The model excels in bilingual reasoning and function-calling scenarios, offering high accuracy across diverse domains. Comparative evaluations show consistent improvements over prior Thai LLMs and other Llama-based baselines. Full results and methodology are available in the technical report.

description.zh_CN: Typhoon2 8B Instruct 是泰国 SCB10X 基于 Llama 3.1 的泰英双语指令模型，8B 参数，在泰语推理与指令遵循上较基座有显著提升。
description.en_US: Llama3.1-Typhoon2-8B-Instruct is a Thai-English instruction-tuned model with 8 billion parameters, built on Llama 3.1. It significantly improves over its base model in Thai reasoning, instruction-following, and function-calling tasks, while maintaining competitive English performance. The model is optimized for bilingual interaction and performs well on Thai-English code-switching, MT-Bench, IFEval, and tool-use benchmarks. Despite its smaller size, it demonstrates strong generalization across math, coding, and multilingual benchmarks, outperforming comparable 8B models across most Thai-specific tasks. Full benchmark results and methodology are available in the technical report.

description.zh_CN: Fimbulvetr 11B v2 是创意写作模型，速度快、对话连贯、角色一致，支持 Alpaca 或 Vicuna 格式的原始提示，适合角色扮演与故事生成。
description.en_US: Creative writing model, routed with permission. It's fast, it keeps the conversation going, and it stays in character. If you submit a raw prompt, you can use Alpaca or Vicuna formats.

description.zh_CN: Euryale 70B v2.1 是 Sao10k 基于 Llama 3 70B 的创意角色扮演专属模型，在复杂角色互动、叙事深度和情感表达上表现出色，是开源 RP 模型的领先之作。
description.en_US: Euryale 70B v2.1 is Sao10k's creative roleplay-focused model based on Llama 3 70B, excelling in complex character interaction, narrative depth, and emotional expression, a leading open-source RP model.

description.zh_CN: Lunaris 8B 是 Sao10K 基于 Llama 3 的通用角色扮演模型，结合了多个高质量模型的优点，在保持良好通用性的同时提供出色的角色扮演体验。
description.en_US: Lunaris 8B is Sao10K's general-purpose roleplay model based on Llama 3, combining the strengths of multiple high-quality models while maintaining good general-purpose capabilities alongside an excellent roleplay experience.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3 Stheno 8B v3.3 32K 是 Sao10k 的创意写作与角色扮演模型，先以 8K 训练再扩展至 32K 上下文，在叙事质量上较旧版有显著提升。
description.en_US: Stheno 8B 32K is a creative writing/roleplay model from Sao10k. It was trained at 8K context, then expanded to 32K context. Compared to older Stheno version, this model is trained on: - 2x the amount of creative writing samples - Cleaned up roleplaying samples - Fewer low quality samples

description.zh_CN: Hanami x1 是 Sao10K 基于 Llama 3.1 70B 的实验性创意模型，是 Euryale 系列的探索性变体，在创意写作和角色互动上有独特的表现风格。
description.en_US: Hanami x1 is Sao10K's experimental creative model based on Llama 3.1 70B, an exploratory variant of the Euryale series with a unique expression style in creative writing and character interaction.

description.zh_CN: Euryale L3.1 70B v2.2 是 Sao10K 基于 Llama 3.1 70B 的创意角色扮演旗舰模型，支持 12.8 万 token 长上下文，在长篇叙事和复杂角色扮演场景中表现卓越。
description.en_US: Euryale L3.1 70B v2.2 is Sao10K's creative roleplay flagship model based on Llama 3.1 70B, supporting 128K token long context, excelling in extended narrative and complex roleplay scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Euryale L3.3 70B 是 Sao10K 基于 Llama 3.3 70B 的最新创意角色扮演模型，融合了 Llama 3.3 的多语言能力，在叙事质量和角色深度上进一步提升。
description.en_US: Euryale L3.3 70B is Sao10K's latest creative roleplay model based on Llama 3.3 70B, incorporating Llama 3.3's multilingual capabilities with further improvements in narrative quality and character depth.

description.zh_CN: Sarvam M 是基于 Mistral-Small-3.1-24B 的 24B 指令模型，后训练支持英语及 11 种印度主要语言，在印度多语言场景中表现突出。
description.en_US: Sarvam-M is a 24 B-parameter, instruction-tuned derivative of Mistral-Small-3.1-24B-Base-2503, post-trained on English plus eleven major Indic languages (bn, hi, kn, gu, mr, ml, or, pa, ta, te). The model introduces a dual-mode interface: “non-think” for low-latency chat and a optional “think” phase that exposes chain-of-thought tokens for more demanding reasoning, math, and coding tasks. Benchmark reports show solid gains versus similarly sized open models on Indic-language QA, GSM-8K math, and SWE-Bench coding, making Sarvam-M a practical general-purpose choice for multilingual conversational agents as well as analytical workloads that mix English, native Indic scripts, or romanized text.

description.zh_CN: Dobby Mini Plus Llama 3.1 8B 是基于 Llama 3.1 8B Instruct 微调的语言模型，在个人自由、去中心化等主题上立场鲜明，适合创意与自由创作。
description.en_US: Dobby-Mini-Leashed-Llama-3.1-8B and Dobby-Mini-Unhinged-Llama-3.1-8B are language models fine-tuned from Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct. Dobby models have a strong conviction towards personal freedom, decentralization, and all things crypto — even when coerced to speak otherwise. Dobby-Mini-Leashed-Llama-3.1-8B and Dobby-Mini-Unhinged-Llama-3.1-8B have their own unique, uhh, personalities. The two versions are being released to be improved using the community’s feedback, which will steer the development of a 70B model.

description.zh_CN: Snowflake Arctic Instruct 是 Snowflake AI 团队从零预训练的密集-MoE 混合架构模型，结合 10B 密集 Transformer 与 128x3.66B MoE，在推理与代码上表现优秀。
description.en_US: Arctic is a dense-MoE Hybrid transformer architecture pre-trained from scratch by the Snowflake AI Research Team. Arctic combines a 10B dense transformer model with a residual 128x3.66B MoE MLP resulting in 480B total and 17B active parameters chosen using a top-2 gating. To read more about this model's release, click here.

description.zh_CN: Riverflow V2 Fast 是 Sourceful Riverflow 2.0 系列最快版本，适合生产部署与延迟敏感工作流，在图像生成质量与速度上达到 SOTA。
description.en_US: Riverflow V2 Fast is the fastest variant of Sourceful's Riverflow 2.0 lineup, best for production deployments and latency-critical workflows. The Riverflow 2.0 series represents SOTA performance on image generation and editing tasks, using an integrated reasoning model to boost reliability and tackle complex challenges. Additional features: - Custom font rendering via font_inputs ($0.03/font, max 2) - Image enhancement via super_resolution_references ($0.20/reference, max 4) See the image generation docs for details: https://openrouter.ai/docs/features/multimodal/image-generation Note: Sourceful imposes a 4.5MB request size limit, therefore it is highly recommended to pass image URLs instead of Base64 data.

description.zh_CN: Riverflow V2 Fast Preview 是 Riverflow V2 预览系列最快版本，性能超越 Riverflow 1，是 Sourceful 首款统一文生图模型。
description.en_US: Riverflow V2 Fast Preview is the fastest variant of Sourceful's Riverflow V2 preview lineup. This preview version exceeds the performance of Riverflow 1 Family and is Sourceful's first unified text-to-image and image-to-image model family. Sourceful imposes a 4.5MB request size limit, therefore it is highly recommended to pass image URLs instead of Base64 data.

description.zh_CN: Riverflow V2 Max Preview 是 Riverflow V2 预览系列最强版本，在图像生成质量与控制力上达到顶级水平，超越 Riverflow 1 系列。
description.en_US: Riverflow V2 Max Preview is the most powerful variant of Sourceful's Riverflow V2 preview lineup. This preview version exceeds the performance of Riverflow 1 Family and is Sourceful's first unified text-to-image and image-to-image model family. Sourceful imposes a 4.5MB request size limit, therefore it is highly recommended to pass image URLs instead of Base64 data.

description.zh_CN: Riverflow V2 Pro 是 Sourceful Riverflow 2.0 系列最强版本，适合顶级控制与完美文字渲染，在图像生成质量上达到 SOTA。
description.en_US: Riverflow V2 Pro is the most powerful variant of Sourceful's Riverflow 2.0 lineup, best for top-tier control and perfect text rendering. The Riverflow 2.0 series represents SOTA performance on image generation and editing tasks, using an integrated reasoning model to boost reliability and tackle complex challenges. Additional features: - Custom font rendering via font_inputs ($0.03/font, max 2) - Image enhancement via super_resolution_references ($0.20/reference, max 4) See the image generation docs for details: https://openrouter.ai/docs/features/multimodal/image-generation Note: Sourceful imposes a 4.5MB request size limit, therefore it is highly recommended to pass image URLs instead of Base64 data.

description.zh_CN: Riverflow V2 Standard Preview 是 Riverflow V2 预览系列标准版本，性能超越 Riverflow 1，是 Sourceful 首款统一文生图预览模型。
description.en_US: Riverflow V2 Standard Preview is the standard variant of Sourceful's Riverflow V2 preview lineup. This preview version exceeds the performance of Riverflow 1 Family and is Sourceful's first unified text-to-image and image-to-image model family. Sourceful imposes a 4.5MB request size limit, therefore it is highly recommended to pass image URLs instead of Base64 data.

description.zh_CN: Step3 是阶跃星辰的尖端多模态推理模型，采用 321B 总参数、38B 激活的 MoE 架构，端到端优化以降低解码成本，在推理与多模态任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Step3 is a cutting-edge multimodal reasoning model—built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with 321B total parameters and 38B active. It is designed end-to-end to minimize decoding costs while delivering top-tier performance in vision–language reasoning. Through the co-design of Multi-Matrix Factorization Attention (MFA) and Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD), Step3 maintains exceptional efficiency across both flagship and low-end accelerators.

description.zh_CN: Step 3.5 Flash 是阶跃星辰最强开源基础模型，在推理、代码和中英文理解上表现出色，支持超长上下文和多模态输入，适合高质量通用生产场景。
description.en_US: Step 3.5 Flash is StepFun's most capable open-source foundation model, excelling in reasoning, coding, and Chinese/English understanding with extended context and multimodal input support for high-quality general production scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Step 3.5 Flash 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与研究场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of Step 3.5 Flash, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and research.

description.zh_CN: Switchpoint Router 是智能路由模型，能够即时分析请求内容并将其分配到最优的模型提供商，在保证质量的同时优化成本和延迟，适合构建灵活的多模型 AI 系统。
description.en_US: Switchpoint Router is an intelligent routing model that instantly analyzes request content and directs it to the optimal model provider, optimizing cost and latency while ensuring quality, suitable for building flexible multi-model AI systems.

description.zh_CN: GLM 4 32B 是智谱 AI 的 32B 中英双语开源模型，针对代码生成、函数调用和智能体任务优化，在 15T 高质量与推理数据上预训练。
description.en_US: GLM-4-32B-0414 is a 32B bilingual (Chinese-English) open-weight language model optimized for code generation, function calling, and agent-style tasks. Pretrained on 15T of high-quality and reasoning-heavy data, it was further refined using human preference alignment, rejection sampling, and reinforcement learning. The model excels in complex reasoning, artifact generation, and structured output tasks, achieving performance comparable to GPT-4o and DeepSeek-V3-0324 across several benchmarks.

description.zh_CN: GLM 4 9B 是智谱 AI GLM-4 系列的 9B 模型，采用与 32B 相同的强化学习与对齐策略，在代码、推理和指令遵循上表现优秀。
description.en_US: GLM-4-9B-0414 is a 9 billion parameter language model from the GLM-4 series developed by THUDM. Trained using the same reinforcement learning and alignment strategies as its larger 32B counterparts, GLM-4-9B-0414 achieves high performance relative to its size, making it suitable for resource-constrained deployments that still require robust language understanding and generation capabilities.

description.zh_CN: GLM 4.1V 9B Thinking 是智谱 AI 的 9B 视觉语言推理模型，基于 GLM-4-9B，引入以推理为中心的思考范式，经强化学习增强，支持视觉推理。
description.en_US: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking is a 9B parameter vision-language model developed by THUDM, based on the GLM-4-9B foundation. It introduces a reasoning-centric "thinking paradigm" enhanced with reinforcement learning to improve multimodal reasoning, long-context understanding (up to 64K tokens), and complex problem solving. It achieves state-of-the-art performance among models in its class, outperforming even larger models like Qwen-2.5-VL-72B on a majority of benchmark tasks.

description.zh_CN: GLM Z1 32B 是 GLM-4-32B 的增强推理变体，针对深度数学、逻辑与代码问题求解设计，采用扩展强化学习，在复杂推理任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: GLM-Z1-32B-0414 is an enhanced reasoning variant of GLM-4-32B, built for deep mathematical, logical, and code-oriented problem solving. It applies extended reinforcement learning—both task-specific and general pairwise preference-based—to improve performance on complex multi-step tasks. Compared to the base GLM-4-32B model, Z1 significantly boosts capabilities in structured reasoning and formal domains. The model supports enforced “thinking” steps via prompt engineering and offers improved coherence for long-form outputs. It’s optimized for use in agentic workflows, and includes support for long context (via YaRN), JSON tool calling, and fine-grained sampling configuration for stable inference. Ideal for use cases requiring deliberate, multi-step reasoning or formal derivations.

description.zh_CN: GLM Z1 9B 是智谱 AI GLM-4 家族的 9B 推理模型，融合 GLM-Z1 大模型技术，包括扩展强化学习，在数学与代码推理上表现突出。
description.en_US: GLM-Z1-9B-0414 is a 9B-parameter language model developed by THUDM as part of the GLM-4 family. It incorporates techniques originally applied to larger GLM-Z1 models, including extended reinforcement learning, pairwise ranking alignment, and training on reasoning-intensive tasks such as mathematics, code, and logic. Despite its smaller size, it demonstrates strong performance on general-purpose reasoning tasks and outperforms many open-source models in its weight class.

description.zh_CN: GLM Z1 Rumination 32B 是智谱 AI GLM-4-Z1 系列的深度推理模型，针对需要长时间思考的复杂开放任务优化，在深思型推理上表现卓越。
description.en_US: THUDM: GLM Z1 Rumination 32B is a 32B-parameter deep reasoning model from the GLM-4-Z1 series, optimized for complex, open-ended tasks requiring prolonged deliberation. It builds upon glm-4-32b-0414 with additional reinforcement learning phases and multi-stage alignment strategies, introducing “rumination” capabilities designed to emulate extended cognitive processing. This includes iterative reasoning, multi-hop analysis, and tool-augmented workflows such as search, retrieval, and citation-aware synthesis. The model excels in research-style writing, comparative analysis, and intricate question answering. It supports function calling for search and navigation primitives (`search`, `click`, `open`, `finish`), enabling use in agent-style pipelines. Rumination behavior is governed by multi-turn loops with rule-based reward shaping and delayed decision mechanisms, benchmarked against Deep Research frameworks such as OpenAI’s internal alignment stacks. This variant is suitable for scenarios requiring depth over speed.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1T Chimera 是 DeepSeek-R1 与 DeepSeek-V3 的合并模型，结合 R1 推理能力与 V3 的 token 效率改进，基于 DeepSeek-MoE 架构。
description.en_US: DeepSeek-R1T-Chimera is created by merging DeepSeek-R1 and DeepSeek-V3 (0324), combining the reasoning capabilities of R1 with the token efficiency improvements of V3. It is based on a DeepSeek-MoE Transformer architecture and is optimized for general text generation tasks. The model merges pretrained weights from both source models to balance performance across reasoning, efficiency, and instruction-following tasks. It is released under the MIT license and intended for research and commercial use.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek R1T2 Chimera 是 TNG Tech 的第二代 Chimera 混合模型，将 DeepSeek 推理能力与对话流畅性融合，在需要同时兼顾推理深度和自然交互的场景中表现出色。
description.en_US: DeepSeek R1T2 Chimera is TNG Tech's second-generation Chimera hybrid model, fusing DeepSeek's reasoning capability with conversational fluency, excelling in scenarios requiring both reasoning depth and natural interaction.

description.zh_CN: R1T Chimera 是 TNG 的实验性创意叙事与角色交互模型，衍生自 DeepSeek-R1T-Chimera，在创意故事与角色对话上表现突出。
description.en_US: TNG-R1T-Chimera is an experimental LLM with a faible for creative storytelling and character interaction. It is a derivate of the original TNG/DeepSeek-R1T-Chimera released in April 2025 and is available exclusively via Chutes and OpenRouter. Characteristics and improvements include: We think that it has a creative and pleasant personality. It has a preliminary EQ-Bench3 value of about 1305. It is quite a bit more intelligent than the original, albeit a slightly slower. It is much more think-token consistent, i.e. reasoning and answer blocks are properly delineated. Tool calling is much improved. TNG Tech, the model authors, ask that users follow the careful guidelines that Microsoft has created for their "MAI-DS-R1" DeepSeek-based model. These guidelines are available on Hugging Face (https://huggingface.co/microsoft/MAI-DS-R1).

description.zh_CN: OpenHermes 2 Mistral 7B 基于 90 万条指令训练，超越所有 Hermes 13B 及以下版本，在部分基准上媲美 70B，具备强大多轮对话与系统提示能力。
description.en_US: Trained on 900k instructions, surpasses all previous versions of Hermes 13B and below, and matches 70B on some benchmarks. Hermes 2 has strong multiturn chat skills and system prompt capabilities.

description.zh_CN: OpenHermes 2.5 Mistral 7B 是 OpenHermes 2 的延续版本，在额外代码数据集上训练，约 7-14% 代码比例带来显著的代码能力提升。
description.en_US: A continuation of OpenHermes 2 model, trained on additional code datasets. Potentially the most interesting finding from training on a good ratio (est. of around 7-14% of the total dataset) of code instruction was that it has boosted several non-code benchmarks, including TruthfulQA, AGIEval, and GPT4All suite. It did however reduce BigBench benchmark score, but the net gain overall is significant.

description.zh_CN: 混元 A13B 是腾讯的 13B 激活参数 MoE 指令调优语言模型，在中英文推理、代码和多轮对话任务上表现出色，适合中文互联网场景的生产部署。
description.en_US: Hunyuan A13B is Tencent's 13B active parameter MoE instruction-tuned language model, excelling in Chinese and English reasoning, coding, and multi-turn dialogue tasks, suitable for production deployment in Chinese internet scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Cydonia 24B V4.1 是基于 Mistral Small 3.2 24B 的无过滤创意写作模型，擅长多样化的成人内容和创意叙事，在创意表达自由度上高度开放。
description.en_US: Cydonia 24B V4.1 is an uncensored creative writing model based on Mistral Small 3.2 24B, adept at diverse adult content and creative narratives with a high degree of freedom in creative expression.

description.zh_CN: Rocinante 12B 是 TheDrummer 为沉浸式故事叙述和丰富散文写作设计的创意语言模型，在情节构建和人物刻画上具有独特的艺术感，适合高质量文学创作场景。
description.en_US: Rocinante 12B is TheDrummer's creative language model designed for engaging storytelling and rich prose writing, with a unique artistic sensibility in plot construction and character portrayal, suitable for high-quality literary creation scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Skyfall 36B V2 是 TheDrummer 基于 Mistral Small 2501 的创意写作增强迭代版，在故事叙述、对话质量和角色深度上进一步优化，适合高质量创意写作场景。
description.en_US: Skyfall 36B V2 is TheDrummer's enhanced creative writing iteration based on Mistral Small 2501, with further optimization in storytelling, dialogue quality, and character depth, suitable for high-quality creative writing scenarios.

description.zh_CN: UnslopNemo 12B 是 TheDrummer 的去刻板化创意模型，专注于消除 AI 写作中的陈词滥调和过度安全化输出，在更自然、更有个性的创意表达上表现出色。
description.en_US: UnslopNemo 12B is TheDrummer's de-stereotyping creative model focused on eliminating clichés and overly safety-filtered outputs in AI writing, excelling in more natural and personalized creative expression.

description.zh_CN: Valkyrie 49B V1 是基于 NVIDIA Llama 3.3 Nemotron Super 49B 构建的 TheDrummer 创意写作模型，在叙事与创意生成上表现突出。
description.en_US: Built on top of NVIDIA's Llama 3.3 Nemotron Super 49B, Valkyrie is TheDrummer's newest model drop for creative writing.

description.zh_CN: StripedHyena Hessian 7B 是 Together 开发的 StripedHyena 系列基础模型，采用新架构在长上下文数据处理上可与传统 Transformer 竞争。
description.en_US: This is the base model variant of the StripedHyena series, developed by Together. StripedHyena uses a new architecture that competes with traditional Transformers, particularly in long-context data processing. It combines attention mechanisms with gated convolutions for improved speed, efficiency, and scaling. This model marks an advancement in AI architecture for sequence modeling tasks.

description.zh_CN: StripedHyena Nous 7B 是 Together 与 Nous Research 合作的 StripedHyena 对话模型，采用新架构，在长上下文与对话任务上表现优秀。
description.en_US: This is the chat model variant of the StripedHyena series developed by Together in collaboration with Nous Research. StripedHyena uses a new architecture that competes with traditional Transformers, particularly in long-context data processing. It combines attention mechanisms with gated convolutions for improved speed, efficiency, and scaling. This model marks a significant advancement in AI architecture for sequence modeling tasks.

description.zh_CN: Llama 3.1 Swallow 8B 是东京工业大学基于 Meta Llama 3.1 8B 持续预训练的日语增强模型，显著提升日语能力，适合日语对话与文本生成。
description.en_US: Llama 3.1 Swallow 8B is a large language model that was built by continual pre-training on the Meta Llama 3.1 8B. Llama 3.1 Swallow enhanced the Japanese language capabilities of the original Llama 3.1 while retaining the English language capabilities. Swallow used approximately 200 billion tokens that were sampled from a large Japanese web corpus (Swallow Corpus Version 2), Japanese and English Wikipedia articles, and mathematical and coding contents, etc (see the Training Datasets section of the base model) for continual pre-training. The instruction-tuned models (Instruct) were built by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on the synthetic data specially built for Japanese.

description.zh_CN: Solar Pro 3 是 Upstage 的旗舰 MoE 语言模型，具备 2560 亿总参数和 220 亿激活参数，在推理和通用任务上表现出色，支持 32K token 上下文，适合企业级生产部署。
description.en_US: Solar Pro 3 is Upstage's flagship MoE language model with 256B total and 22B active parameters, excelling in reasoning and general tasks with 32K token context, suitable for enterprise-grade production deployment.

description.zh_CN: Palmyra X5 是 Writer 专为企业级生产力和 AI 应用构建而设计的最先进商业模型，在文档写作、内容生成和企业工作流自动化任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Palmyra X5 is Writer's most advanced model purpose-built for enterprise productivity and AI application development, excelling in document writing, content generation, and enterprise workflow automation tasks.

description.zh_CN: MiMo V2 Flash 是小米的开源基础语言模型，专注于通过思维链推理提升数学和代码任务能力，在紧凑尺寸下提供出色的推理性能，适合资源受限的推理场景。
description.en_US: MiMo V2 Flash is Xiaomi's open-source foundation language model focused on improving mathematical and coding task capabilities through chain-of-thought reasoning, delivering outstanding reasoning performance in a compact size for resource-constrained scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Yi 1.5 34B Chat 是零一万物的 34B 参数对话模型，具备强大的知识储备和多语言交流能力，在推理和语言生成方面表现均衡。
description.en_US: The Yi series models are large language models trained from scratch by developers at 01.AI. This is a predecessor to the Yi 34B model. It is continuously pre-trained on Yi with a high-quality corpus of 500B tokens and fine-tuned on 3M diverse fine-tuning samples..

description.zh_CN: Yi 34B 是零一万物的 34B 参数基础预训练语言模型，具备广泛的知识储备和多语言理解能力，适合下游微调研究。
description.en_US: The Yi series models are large language models trained from scratch by developers at 01.AI. This is the base 34B parameter model.

description.zh_CN: Yi 34B 200K 是 Yi 34B 的超长上下文扩展版本，支持 20 万 token 超大上下文窗口，适合处理超长文档和大型代码库。
description.en_US: The Yi series models are large language models trained from scratch by developers at 01.AI. This version was trained on a large context length, allowing ~200k words (1000 paragraphs) of combined input and output.

description.zh_CN: Yi 34B Chat 是零一万物 34B 参数的对话指令微调模型，在自然语言交互和知识问答场景中表现优秀。
description.en_US: The Yi series models are large language models trained from scratch by developers at 01.AI. This 34B parameter model has been instruct-tuned for chat.

description.zh_CN: Yi 6B 是零一万物的 6B 参数基础预训练模型，以轻量参数实现较好的语言理解和生成能力，适合资源受限的部署场景。
description.en_US: The Yi series models are large language models trained from scratch by developers at 01.AI. This is the base 6B parameter model.

description.zh_CN: Yi Large 是零一万物面向知识获取、代码生成和数学推理场景设计的大型语言模型，在中英文复杂任务处理上表现出色。
description.en_US: The Yi Large model was designed by 01.AI with the following usecases in mind: knowledge search, data classification, human-like chat bots, and customer service. It stands out for its multilingual proficiency, particularly in Spanish, Chinese, Japanese, German, and French. Check out the launch announcement to learn more.

description.zh_CN: Yi Large FC 是零一万物专为工具调用场景优化的 Yi Large 版本，具备强大的函数调用和工具集成能力，适合 AI 智能体开发。
description.en_US: The Yi Large Function Calling (FC) is a specialized model with capability of tool use. The model can decide whether to call the tool based on the tool definition passed in by the user, and the calling method will be generate in the specified format. It's applicable to various production scenarios that require building agents or workflows.

description.zh_CN: Yi Large Turbo 是零一万物在高性能和高性价比之间取得平衡的商用模型，提供快速响应和稳定的生成质量。
description.en_US: The Yi Large Turbo model is a High Performance and Cost-Effectiveness model offering powerful capabilities at a competitive price. It's ideal for a wide range of scenarios, including complex inference and high-quality text generation. Check out the launch announcement to learn more.

description.zh_CN: Yi Vision 是零一万物发布的视觉语言模型，专注于复杂视觉理解任务，提供高性能的多模态分析和视觉问答能力。
description.en_US: The Yi Vision is a complex visual task models provide high-performance understanding and analysis capabilities based on multiple images. It's ideal for scenarios that require analysis and interpretation of images and charts, such as image question answering, chart understanding, OCR, visual reasoning, education, research report understanding, or multilingual document reading.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4 32B 是智谱 AI 的 32B 参数高效文本模型，在推理和对话任务上表现稳定，支持 12.8 万 token 上下文，适合本地部署。
description.en_US: GLM-4 32B is Zhipu AI's efficient 32B parameter text model with stable performance in reasoning and conversational tasks, supporting 128K token context and suitable for local deployment.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.5 是智谱 AI 的通用旗舰文本模型，支持约 13 万 token 上下文，在推理、写作和代码任务上表现出色。
description.en_US: GLM-4.5 is Zhipu AI's general-purpose flagship text model supporting ~131K token context, excelling in reasoning, writing, and coding tasks.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.5 Air 是 GLM-4.5 的轻量高效版本，在较低成本下提供接近旗舰版的推理和对话能力，支持约 13 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: GLM-4.5 Air is a lightweight and efficient version of GLM-4.5, providing near-flagship reasoning and conversational capabilities at lower cost with ~131K token context.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.5 Air 的免费访问版本，功能与标准版一致，适合探索与测试场景。
description.en_US: The free-tier access version of GLM-4.5 Air, offering the same capabilities as the standard version for exploration and testing.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.5V 是智谱 AI 的视觉语言模型，支持图像输入，在图像理解和视觉问答任务上表现良好，最大输出 16384 token。
description.en_US: GLM-4.5V is Zhipu AI's vision-language model supporting image input, performing well in image understanding and visual question answering tasks with up to 16384 token output.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.6 是智谱 AI 的稳定版旗舰模型，支持 20 万 token 上下文和最大 13 万 token 输出，在代理任务和推理能力上比 4.5 提升约 15%。
description.en_US: GLM-4.6 is Zhipu AI's stable flagship model supporting 200K token context with up to 131K token output, improving agent tasks and reasoning by approximately 15% over GLM-4.5.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.6 的固定提供商版本，锁定到特定推理节点以确保稳定的服务质量与延迟一致性，适合对性能可预测性有要求的生产部署场景。
description.en_US: A provider-locked variant of GLM-4.6, pinned to a specific inference provider to ensure consistent service quality and predictable latency, suitable for production deployments requiring stable and reliable performance.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.6V 是智谱 AI 支持图像和视频输入的多模态视觉语言模型，在视觉理解和视频分析任务上表现突出。
description.en_US: GLM-4.6V is Zhipu AI's multimodal vision-language model supporting image and video inputs, excelling in visual understanding and video analysis tasks.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.7 是智谱 AI 强化了代理和代码能力的新一代模型，支持 20 万 token 上下文，适合需要复杂多步骤处理的任务。
description.en_US: GLM-4.7 is Zhipu AI's new-generation model with enhanced agent and coding capabilities, supporting 200K token context for tasks requiring complex multi-step processing.

description.zh_CN: GLM-4.7 Flash 是 GLM-4.7 的快速经济版本，在保持 20 万 token 上下文的同时降低延迟和成本，适合高频场景。
description.en_US: GLM-4.7 Flash is the fast and economical version of GLM-4.7, reducing latency and cost while maintaining 200K token context, suitable for high-frequency scenarios.

description.zh_CN: GLM-5 是智谱 AI 最新旗舰模型，采用约 745B MoE 参数架构，支持 20 万 token 上下文，在推理、代码和多轮对话任务上全面领先。
description.en_US: GLM-5 is Zhipu AI's latest flagship model with approximately 745B MoE parameters, supporting 200K token context and leading across reasoning, coding, and multi-turn conversational tasks.

description.zh_CN: Grok 2 是 xAI 的前沿大语言模型，在推理、编程和对话能力上达到最先进水平，并集成了实时信息检索能力。
description.en_US: Grok 2 is xAI's frontier language model with state-of-the-art reasoning capabilities, best for complex and multi-step use cases. To use a faster version, see Grok 2 Mini. For more information, see the launch announcement.

description.zh_CN: Grok 2 1212 是 Grok 2 的 2024 年 12 月更新版本，在准确性、指令遵循和长篇写作方面进行了显著改进。
description.en_US: Grok 2 1212 introduces significant enhancements to accuracy, instruction adherence, and multilingual support, making it a powerful and flexible choice for developers seeking a highly steerable, intelligent model.

description.zh_CN: Grok 2 mini 是 xAI 的快速轻量语言模型，在保持 Grok 2 核心能力的同时提供更低的延迟和成本，适合高频交互场景。
description.en_US: Grok 2 Mini is xAI's fast, lightweight language model that offers a balance between speed and answer quality. To use the stronger model, see Grok Beta. For more information, see the launch announcement.

description.zh_CN: Grok 2 Vision 1212 是 Grok 2 的视觉增强版本，在多模态分析和视觉文档处理场景中提供更强的图像理解能力。
description.en_US: Grok 2 Vision 1212 advances image-based AI with stronger visual comprehension, refined instruction-following, and multilingual support. From object recognition to style analysis, it empowers developers to build more intuitive, visually aware applications. Its enhanced steerability and reasoning establish a robust foundation for next-generation image solutions. To read more about this model, check out xAI's announcement.

description.zh_CN: Grok 3 支持 Think Mode 深度推理和实时网络搜索，在写作、分析和研究任务上表现优秀，支持 13 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Grok 3 supports Think Mode deep reasoning and real-time web search, excelling in writing, analysis, and research tasks with 131K token context.

description.zh_CN: Grok 3 的 Beta 测试版本，功能与正式版基本一致，适合希望提前体验 Grok 3 特性的开发者。
description.en_US: The beta test version of Grok 3, functionally equivalent to the release version, suitable for developers wanting early access to Grok 3 features.

description.zh_CN: Grok 3 Mini 是 Grok 3 的轻量推理版本，在数学和逻辑推理任务上高效经济，支持 13 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Grok 3 Mini is the lightweight reasoning version of Grok 3, delivering efficient and economical performance on mathematical and logical reasoning tasks with 131K token context.

description.zh_CN: Grok 3 Mini 的 Beta 测试版本，功能与正式版基本一致，适合希望提前体验 Grok 3 Mini 特性的开发者。
description.en_US: The beta test version of Grok 3 Mini, functionally equivalent to the release version, suitable for developers wanting early access to Grok 3 Mini features.

description.zh_CN: Grok 4 是 xAI 的旗舰单代理推理模型，擅长复杂科学、数学和工程任务，支持视觉理解，拥有 25.6 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Grok 4 is xAI's flagship single-agent reasoning model excelling at complex scientific, mathematical, and engineering tasks with visual understanding and 256K token context.

description.zh_CN: Grok 4 Fast 是 xAI 旗舰 Grok 4 的高速版本，在推理能力和响应速度之间取得良好平衡，拥有 200 万 token 超长上下文。
description.en_US: Grok 4 Fast is the high-speed version of xAI's flagship Grok 4, achieving a good balance between reasoning capability and response speed with a 2M token context.

description.zh_CN: Grok 4.1 Fast 是 xAI 最新的高速推理模型，幻觉率比前代降低 65%，支持实时搜索和视觉理解，拥有 200 万 token 超长上下文。
description.en_US: Grok 4.1 Fast is xAI's latest high-speed reasoning model with 65% fewer hallucinations than its predecessor, supporting real-time search and visual understanding with a 2M token context.

description.zh_CN: Grok Beta 是 xAI 的实验性语言模型，具备最先进的推理能力，同时支持网络搜索和实时信息访问。
description.en_US: Grok Beta is xAI's experimental language model with state-of-the-art reasoning capabilities, best for complex and multi-step use cases. It is the successor of Grok 2 with enhanced context length.

description.zh_CN: Grok Code Fast 1 是 xAI 专为代码生成设计的快速模型，在代码补全和编程辅助任务上响应迅速，支持 25.6 万 token 上下文。
description.en_US: Grok Code Fast 1 is xAI's fast model designed specifically for code generation, providing rapid responses in code completion and programming assistance tasks with 256K token context.

description.zh_CN: Grok Vision Beta 是 xAI 的实验性视觉语言模型，能够理解和分析图像内容，结合 Grok 的推理能力处理多模态任务。
description.en_US: Grok Vision Beta is xAI's experimental language model with vision capability.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Image 2.0 是通义千问的图像生成模型，支持高质量图像创作和编辑。
description.en_US: Qwen Image 2.0 is Qwen's image generation model supporting high-quality image creation and editing.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Image 2.0 Pro 是通义千问的专业级图像生成模型，提供更高质量的图像生成能力。
description.en_US: Qwen Image 2.0 Pro is Qwen's professional-grade image generation model with enhanced quality.

description.zh_CN: Qwen3.5 Flash 是通义千问的超快速低成本多模态模型，适合高并发实时应用。
description.en_US: Qwen3.5 Flash is Qwen's ultra-fast, low-cost multimodal model for high-concurrency real-time applications.

description.zh_CN: Qwen3.5 Plus 是通义千问的旗舰多模态模型，采用线性注意力混合 MoE 架构，在推理与多模态能力上表现卓越。
description.en_US: Qwen3.5 Plus is Qwen's flagship multimodal model using hybrid linear attention and MoE architecture with outstanding reasoning and multimodal capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Image Edit Plus 是通义千问的图像编辑增强版模型，支持精细化图像编辑。
description.en_US: Qwen Image Edit Plus is Qwen's enhanced image editing model supporting fine-grained image editing.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Image Edit Max 是通义千问的图像编辑旗舰版模型，提供最高质量的图像编辑能力。
description.en_US: Qwen Image Edit Max is Qwen's flagship image editing model with the highest quality editing capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Image Plus 是通义千问的图像生成增强版模型，提供更高质量的图像生成能力。
description.en_US: Qwen Image Plus is Qwen's enhanced image generation model with improved quality.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Image Max 是通义千问的图像生成旗舰版模型，提供最高质量的图像生成能力。
description.en_US: Qwen Image Max is Qwen's flagship image generation model with the highest quality generation capabilities.

description.zh_CN: Qwen Flash 是通义千问的快速文本生成模型，适合高并发场景。
description.en_US: Qwen Flash is Qwen's fast text generation model for high-concurrency scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Qwen3 Max（2026年1月23日版）是通义千问的旗舰文本生成模型检查点版本。
description.en_US: Qwen3 Max (January 23, 2026) is Qwen's flagship text generation model checkpoint version.

description.zh_CN: DeepSeek Reasoner 是深度求索的推理专用模型，在复杂推理任务上表现卓越。
description.en_US: DeepSeek Reasoner is DeepSeek's reasoning-specialized model excelling in complex reasoning tasks.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2 Turbo Preview 是月之暗面的快速模型预览版，适合高并发场景。
description.en_US: Kimi K2 Turbo Preview is Moonshot AI's fast model preview for high-concurrency scenarios.

description.zh_CN: Kimi K2 0905 Preview 是月之暗面 K2 系列模型的 2025年9月5日预览版本。
description.en_US: Kimi K2 0905 Preview is Moonshot AI's K2 series model preview version from September 5, 2025.

description.zh_CN: Doubao Seedream 4.0 250828 是字节跳动的图像生成模型，支持高质量图像创作。
description.en_US: Doubao Seedream 4.0 250828 is ByteDance's image generation model supporting high-quality image creation.
